Name: AMS
Description:
Established in 2001, AMS has over two decades of international expertise in providing defense support services for military land systems and equipment. Our successful track record includes delivering critical defense support services to governments across Europe, Asia, Africa, and the Middle East in highly dynamic operational environments.

We specialize in equipment maintenance, repair, overhaul, and modernization programs, encompassing logistics, end-to-end supply chain, and infrastructure management. Our proven credibility lies in being a trusted partner chosen to mobilize, manage, and execute some of the world's largest and most complex MRO projects.

We challenge boundaries to redefine what's achievable. Staying ahead, we set the standards for future demands.

We Provide.
We Deliver.
We are Committed.
We are AMS.

Name: Safelite
Description:
We’re the auto glass experts. Since 1947, we’ve helped people get back to driving safely. They count on us to repair and replace their glass and recalibrate their vehicle’s advanced safety systems — and that’s something we don’t take lightly.

But we’re more than just a glass company. Our teams go above and beyond, pushing the limits to innovate new ways to bring unexpected happiness to people every day. We empower our associates with the support they need to make a difference, deliver memorable service, and do the right thing. Because we know our people make our purpose possible. It’s this philosophy that drives our culture.

Come join us. We want to be the best place you’ll ever work. Apply today at safelitecareers.com.

Name: Advanced Military Maintenance Repair & Overhaul Center (AMMROC)
Description:
AMMROC provides industry-leading maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) services and integrated logistics support for the military and civil aviation sectors. Our world-class facilities, innovative partnerships, and a highly qualified workforce make us a leading international third-party MRO service provider. Our capabilities allow us to undertake fleet-wide, Performance Based Logistics (PBL) programs for Air Force customers.

We are also the region’s only authorized Lockheed Martin C-130 Service Centre, dynamic blade testing facility and depot MRO hub for comprehensive BLACK HAWK components; We offer one of the region’s largest military and civil MRO hangar capacities including a dedicated state-of-the-art strip / paint shop.

At AMMROC, we ensure customer operational readiness through superior fleet deployability and unparalleled safety. To deliver this we:

Leverage gold-standard partnerships
Collaborate with industry leaders
Engineer innovation
Develop a talent pipeline across verticals

Our state-of-the-art facility in Al Ain further further strengthens our standing as an innovation hub.

Name: TETRACE
Description:
TETRACE es un Grupo Empresarial dedicado a ingeniería,  construcción y mantenimiento de activos renovables, constituido en 2010. Estamos especializados en ingeniería, supervisión, inspección, mantenimiento y gestión de spare parts tanto en on shore como offshore

Disponemos de delegaciones en diferentes países como ESPAÑA, INDIA, FILIPINAS, EGIPTO, BRASIL, CHILE, ARGENTINA, URUGUAY, PERÚ, MÉXICO, PANAMÁ, COSTA RICA, USA Y SUDAFRICA.

Name: Qatar Shipyard Technology Solutions
Description:
Established in 2008, Qatar Shipyard Technology Solutions is a premier offshore and marine facility based in the State of Qatar, a global leader in ship repair, ship conversion and construction of offshore drilling rigs. The world-class Erhama Bin Jaber Al Jalahma shipyard, which is strategically located near to the LNG terminals in Ras Laffan Industrial City, was inaugurated by H.H. Sheikh Hamad Bin Khalifa Al Thani, Father Emir of the State of Qatar, on 23rd November 2010.

Qatar Shipyard Technology Solutions, Qatar’s premiere shipyard, has some of the most technologically advanced equipment for increased efficiency, quality and safety. The yard is designed with optimal flexibility to undertake the entire spectrum of repair works, conversion fabrication and maintenance.

•Ship repair
•Ship conversion
•Fabrication & maintenance of offshore structures
Location: Ras Laffan Industrial City, State of Qatar

Name: GoMechanic.in
Description:
GoMechanic is fully technology-integrated one stop focussed in making the car servicing experience affordable, hassle-free & easy for everyone. We are the pioneers in enabling tech-based solutions, which has disrupted the unorganised Auto-servicing industry.
Our highly trained people & partners serve as an extension of our customer’s car servicing needs to proactively elevate customers’ experience, simplify processes, and make car servicing more cost-effective.

Our business models cover the end-to-end care that a car requires and our ongoing evolution from being a car servicing aggregator in 2016 to the pioneer in tech-based auto servicing model keeps us on a look-out for people who are ready to evolve with us. With a strong network of over 1000+ workshops spread across 150+ cities, GoMechanic envisions car servicing across the length and breadth of the country.

GoMechanic is a proud people-driven organisation with a reputation for technology innovation, service, and culture. We are recognised as one of the most preferred workplaces by India Today.

Name: Grupo TECH.WIND
Description:
Grupo TECH.WIND SERVICES
Excelência em soluções para o setor de energia renovável

O Grupo TECH.WIND SERVICES é formado por três empresas com atuação complementar e integrada no segmento de energia renovável, oferecendo serviços especializados em toda a cadeia de geração eólica:

TECH.WIND SERVICES
Especializada em serviços técnicos em torres eólicas — metálicas e de concreto — com foco em manutenção, inspeções estruturais, ensaios não destrutivos, torqueamento e tensionamento de elementos de fixação, além de soluções em acesso por cordas.

BIO.ENERGIA
Especialista em serviços elétricos, incluindo cabeamento de média tensão, manutenção de subestações, ensaios com VLF e Tangente Delta, inspeções e certificações de linha de vida.

G.WIND
Atuação dedicada à inspeção, reparo e revitalização de pás eólicas, com expertise em SPDA, pesagem de pás, moldes e soluções de engenharia aplicadas ao desempenho aerodinâmico.

Com presença nacional e internacional, o grupo entrega soluções técnicas de alta performance, aliando inovação, segurança e sustentabilidade. Nosso compromisso é contribuir com o avanço das fontes renováveis de energia, apoiando nossos clientes com qualidade, agilidade e excelência operacional.

A G.WIND é uma empresa do Grupo Tech Wind Services!

Name: Monro, Inc.

Name: Norauto France
Description:
Leader de l’entretien et de l’équipement automobile, Norauto, enseigne du Groupe Mobivia, accompagne depuis plus de 50 ans les automobilistes. Aujourd’hui, Norauto s’impose comme l’acteur majeur de la transition responsable des automobilistes en leur proposant des solutions innovantes, accessibles et durables adaptées aux nouveaux usages de la route et à toutes les mobilités. Engagée depuis plus de 30 ans dans une démarche RSE ambitieuse et structurée, l’entreprise est également pionnière des technologies électriques et ambassadrice d’une mobilité moins carbonée. La marque appuie son développement sur un réseau de plus de 650 centres-auto dans le monde (5 pays d’implantation) dont plus de 410 centres en France. Impliqués au cœur de la stratégie de l’entreprise, les collaborateurs Norauto évoluent dans une équipe aux pratiques managériales innovantes. Norauto compte 7 000 collaborateurs en France et près de 11 000 dans le monde.

Notre mission d’entreprise : rendre accessibles à chaque automobiliste des solutions durables de mobilité. 

Norauto accompagne la montée en compétences de ses collaborateurs afin qu'ils s'adaptent aux nouveaux besoins et nouveaux usages de la route et ainsi les rendre acteurs de la transformation de l’entreprise.

Norauto est de nouveau élue "Marque Préférée des Français" et "Meilleure Chaîne de Magasin de l'Année" dans la catégorie Centres Automobiles. Deux belles distinctions qui soulignent l'expertise de nos 7 500 collaborateurs.

Données clés : 
7 000 collaborateurs • 105 000 heures de formation par an • x3 sur le nombre d’heures de formation pour les collaborateurs sur les prestations d’avenir. Labellisée “Enseigne Responsable”. Plan stratégique de développement durable visant la neutralité carbone pour 2050. 24 filières de recyclage. 

Plus d’informations sur : www.norauto-recrute.fr

Name: Acrobatica Spider Access
Description:

We aim to develop this practice effectively and establish partnerships with GCC-based clients.

We are specialists in providing prime diversified services on heights; from inspection, panel/glass installation, electrical, cleaning to general maintenance & annual maintenance contracts.

We, at Spider Access, develop bespoke solutions to difficult access challenges created by today’s and tomorrow’s modern and architectural designs and thus ensure the ongoing maintenance of the buildings rather than see the architecture as a barrier to efficient maintenance schedules.

+971 4 236 0356 / +971 52 726 3167

Name: Actren, Mantenimiento Ferroviario
Description:
Actren Mantenimiento Ferroviario S.A. es una empresa participada por CAF y Renfe Operadora para el mantenimiento integral, de alta calidad e innovador de trenes de Cercanías, de Alta Velocidad y de Media Distancia fabricados por CAF y operados por Renfe en toda España. 
Nuestros valores están basados en el trabajo en equipo, la mejora continua, la apuesta por la innovación, el compromiso con el entorno, la seguridad y la formación de nuestros profesionales y la aportación de nuestro capital humano, formado por profesionales cualificados con experiencia contrastada y en permanente formación y reciclaje. 
Nuestro trabajo se desarrolla en talleres ferroviarios de Madrid, Barcelona, Salamanca, León, Granada, Sevilla, Valencia y La Sagra (Toledo). Allí, nuestros profesionales se dedican al mantenimiento integral de trenes eléctricos de Alta Velocidad, de Cercanías y de Media Distancia y de trenes diésel de Media Distancia. 
La calidad de nuestro trabajo redunda en la satisfacción de nuestros accionistas, de nuestros clientes y, por extensión, de los usuarios de los trenes cuyo mantenimiento realizamos.

Name: VehicleCare
Description:
Motor insurance claims in India suffer from unpredictable outcomes, inconsistent repairs, and poor customer experience.

VehicleCare is building a full-stack motor claims fulfillment platform that delivers predictable, transparent, and reliable claim outcomes by managing the repair ecosystem end-to-end.

We work with independent vehicle workshops to create a disciplined, accountable repair network—bringing standard pricing, SOPs, quality benchmarks, and SLA-driven execution.

In parallel, we partner with insurers and brokers to reduce claims leakage, improve turnaround time, and provide real-time visibility across the repair and settlement lifecycle.

This is an operations-first business, powered by technology—where execution, trust, and incentives matter as much as software.

Our focus areas:
• Managed & franchise workshop networks
• Motor claims operations & fulfillment
• Repair standardization & cost control
• Claims transparency & auditability
• Faster, fairer claims experience for customers

We believe fixing motor claims requires controlling outcomes—not just digitizing processes.

Name: Grupo Pana
Description:
Somos Grupo Pana una empresa peruana de movilidad con una trayectoria única de más de 59 años trabajando con las marcas líderes de vehículos y camiones: Toyota y Hino.

Estamos orgullosos de ser un equipo sólido al servicio de sus clientes con un propósito que nos inspira: Acerca personas y conectar el mundo con movilidad sostenible.

Name: JLS ApS
Description:
JLS ApS Er beliggende I Tilst v. Aarhus.

JLS har siden starten i 1985 specialiseret sig inden for vedligeholdelse og reparation af lastvognstrailere i Danmark. JLS tilbyder tre kerneydelser: service, vedligeholdelse og klargøring til syn.

Udover de tre kerneområder tilbyder JLS 24 timers breakdown service. Uanset hvor traileren befinder sig i Europa, sørger vi gennem vores samarbejdspartnere for at alvorlige skader bliver udbedret.

Idegrundlag og målsætning
Virksomhedens idégrundlag er at være et serviceværksted for lastvognstrailere af så forskellig art som: presenningstrailere, køletrailere, blokvogne samt containerchassiser. Vi vil tilbyde flest mulige services under samme tag og dermed fortsat være vores kunders første valg.

Det er virksomhedens mål at bevare og cementere den markedsposition JLS har fået siden starten i 1985. Vi vil tiltrække nye kunder ved hele tiden at være opmærksomme på udviklingen inden for transportområdet og lytte til vores kunders behov og ønsker.
Gennem kurser og en kontrolleret tilførsel af nye medarbejdere, er det vores mål at være på forkant med udviklingen. En stadig større fokus på moderne IT systemer til fejlsøgning af rullende materiel, kræver dygtige medarbejdere med den rette 'know how'. 

Vi er derfor meget opmærksomme på, at vore medarbejdere har de nødvendige kompetencer til at udføre deres arbejde

Name: Euromaster
Description:
1. Who We Are

Founded in 1991, Euromaster is a wholly-owned Michelin’s Group subsidiary.

Our mission is to offer tyres services and fast-fitting maintenance with no compromise on safety.

We are committed to deliver a best in class experience to drivers and fleets.
Our interactions and actions are driven by our core values: honesty, customer care and expertise.

Our ambition is offer to our customers more simplicity, hassle free experience, immediacy and proximity.

 

2. Customer Experience

We offer a full range of tyre and maintenance services to both private and professional customers, adapted to their specific needs, stakes and type of vehicles (light, heavy, agricultural, earthmover and industrial).



3. One Network

Euromaster is present in 18 countries in Europe (Austria, Bulgaria, Czech Republic, Finland, France, Germany, Italy, Lithuania, Moldova, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Turkey and United-Kingdom,) thanks to its own subsidiaries and a large network of franchisees.



4. Our Safety Commitment

In 2019, the Group decided to go a step further by taking a strong commitment translated into “No Compromise on Safety” that encompassed all its internal and external stakeholders. Our aim is to become a safety reference for our customers and the market.

Our “No Compromise on safety” commitment relies on two key winning attitudes that animate everyone in the Company:

⦁ “Always alert” meaning that “safety should lead every of my actions”

⦁ “All for one” meaning that “I pay attention to my colleagues and my customers and do not hesitate to react if they don’t act safely.

Name: Grupo Gerardo Bastos
Description:
Com 58 anos de estrada, a Gerardo Bastos, revendedora oficial Pirelli, é referência nacional no mercado de pneus, graças ao contínuo aperfeiçoamento dos seus serviços, dos seus modernos equipamentos e da vasta linha de produtos oferecidos. Tudo para garantir a satisfação e, principalmente, a segurança dos clientes. Não é à toa que a rapidez, a qualidade e o bom atendimento da Gerardo Bastos são tão conhecidos quanto o famoso e consagrado slogan "Onde um pneu é um pneu".

O sucesso da empresa está intimamente ligado à trajetória empresarial do Sr. Gerardo Bastos, que começou a trabalhar em 1938 e, em 1967, inaugurou a sua primeira loja no Centro de Fortaleza.

Aqui na Gerardo Bastos, os clientes têm bons motivos para levar seus carros até nossas lojas. A empresa possui atuação em diversos segmentos: Centro Automotivo; Auto Express nos principais shoppings de Fortaleza e região metropolitana; Truck Center; Renovadora de Pneus e Distribuidora de Peças.

Nossas oficinas são completas com vários serviços: venda de pneus, alinhamento, balanceamento, troca de óleo, arrefecimento, troca de filtros diversos, higienização de ar-condicionado, regulagem de farol, dentre outros. Name: EDYSTON
Description:
EDYSTON’s proprietary spray on solution migrates into the damaged concrete and rebuilds the pores and cracks, protecting the concrete from future damage.

EDYSTON IS THE ONLY CONCRETE ANTIBIOTIC.

1.	The derivation of the name find its roots at the Eddystone Lighthouse, designed by John Smeaton, which stood for 120 years designed by off the coast of Plymouth. The lighthouse was use to light the way for seafarers coming into the port. This was one of most difficult places to build a lighthouse as it was the first offshore installation. The rocks for the foundation were 40 miles offshore and saw a lot of tough weather. John Smeaton comes in and revolutionizes the construction of light houses by adopting an architecture of the lighthouse similar to an oak tree that could be flexible and allow for sway with the wind but also have an internal three-dimensional structure that was solid enough to endure the waves and storms. After 120-years the lighthouse was taken down but not because of cracks in the lighthouse, but because of in the rock foundation. EDYSTON products were designed rejuvenate deteriorate concrete to withstand the test of time by healing deteriorated sections, increasing resiliency to environmental conditions and using the impurities within the deteriorated concrete to bring it back to life.

Name: Leaseway España SLU
Description:
Bienvenido a Leaseway España!

Nacimos hace más de 15 de años en Francia en la región donde hoy somos los lideres para suministrar vehículos para su uso como vehículos de sustitución, a los talleres de reparación y a redes de asistencia. En Francia, trabajamos con la mayoría de las redes de talleres.
Nuestra filosofía se basa en ofrecer el alquiler de vehículos, hasta 36 meses, con las condiciones más competitivas y facilitando el acceso al alquiler a los clientes que lo deseen. 

Para poder ofrecer mensualidades competitivas nos basamos en la especialización y en unos procesos ágiles y sin tareas que no aporten valor añadido.
Leaseway España ha comenzado su andadura en febrero del 2022, con el objetivo de ser EL ALIADO de los talleres PARA SUS VEHÍCULOS DE SUSTITUCIÓN. Estamos convencidos de que vamos a escribir una historia de crecimiento, basada en unos clientes fieles y con un equipo comprometido en conseguir los mejores resultados de satisfacción hacia nuestros clientes. 

La imagen del vehículo de sustitución es la extensión de la imagen del taller, por lo que disponer de vehículos de poca antigüedad y en perfecto estado de funcionamiento e imagen exterior, impacta muy positivamente en la fidelización de los clientes. Un vehículo de sustitución siempre supone un coste para los talleres, y alquilarlo es la mejor opción. 

Alquilar con Leaseway, supone reducir gastos, maximizar el beneficio y tener vehículos a la última. 
Como estamos convencidos de esto, te ofrecemos una variedad de vehículos nuevos o de poca antigüedad a los precios más competitivos!

Our full package maintenance concept is based on more than 10 years of field experience and serve vessel all over the world.

Our full service concept includes:
• Active support during purchasing – and planning process,
• Check of maintenance & operating history,
• Job-preparation together with customer,
• Advise about necessary spare parts,
• Supply of our high quality compatible spares (suitable for EAL oils or alternative),
• Excellent availability of experienced service engineers,
• Overhaul service world wide,
• 1 year warranty on service and spares (if our spares or customers OEM spares are used),
• Independent realistic consulting/ aftersales.

Mack Mantención Industrial se encuentra certificada para el Sistema de Gestión de Calidad de acuerdo a la Norma ISO 9001:2015; Sistema de Gestión Medio Ambiental de acuerdo a la Norma ISO 14001:2015 y Gestión de la Seguridad y Salud en el Trabajo con acreditación internacional UKAS de acuerdo a la Norma ISO 45001:2018.

Description:
Euromaster Nederland is lid van de Euromaster groep: een netwerk van service- en verkooppunten voor banden en auto-onderhoud. Wij bedienen onze klanten met passie, en garanderen zo een continue, veilige en efficiënte mobiliteit. Op elk moment, waar ze zich ook bevinden en wat hun activiteiten ook zijn, bieden we de juiste banden en het beste voertuigonderhoud, voor de juiste prijs. Dit doen wij altijd op een eerlijke, vakkundige en attente manier. Daarom zijn onze klanten bij ons in goede handen.

Wij bedienen zowel de zakelijke als de particuliere markt vanuit circa 100 vestigingen waarvan 12 franchise vestigingen. Daarnaast rijden er ruim 150 mobiele bandenbussen, servicebussen gericht op ruitschadeherstel en telematica, pechservicetrucks en mobiele uitlijners rond om klanten op locatie te kunnen helpen. 

Op de zakelijke markt (leasemaatschappijen, transportondernemingen, industrie, landbouw en grondverzet) zijn wij Europees marktleider op het gebied van banden en bandenservice. In Nederland zijn wij in het Rotterdamse havengebied en op luchthaven Schiphol de belangrijkste partner voor al het rijdend materiaal. Euromaster levert maatwerk en is dé betrouwbare bandenpartner voor bedrijven met 1 tot meer dan 1.000 voertuigen. 

Particulieren kunnen bij Euromaster terecht voor de beste bandenservice en het volledige onderhoud van hun auto zoals APK, grote en kleine beurt en aircoservice. Wij stemmen het auto-onderhoud af op het kenteken, het aantal gereden kilometers en de fabriekseisen.

Name: POLE POSITION - Salon de la carrosserie
Description:
Cette année, en remplacement du Salon de la Carrosserie, MOBILIANS a le plaisir de vous proposer un nouveau format de manifestation à destination des professionnels de l’automobile : Pole Position / les talents de la mobilité.

Dédié aux professionnels des métiers de la branche automobile et de la mobilité, ce nouveau rendez-vous des professionnels, a pour ambition de fédérer et valoriser la filière. 

Rassemblant les principaux acteurs de la profession, "POLE POSITION | Les talents de la mobilité" propose un large panel de compétences et de partenaires présents.

Cet événement fera également place aux enjeux et mutations de nos métiers par le biais de 5 ateliers/workshop proposés tout au long de l'après-midi pour approfondir vos compétences et gérer votre activité professionnelle.

Venez donc retrouver au Domaine des Griffiers à Niort dés 12h00 pour partager cet évenement professionnel en toute convivialité !

Le salon est organisé par #MOBILIANS (ex-CNPA), organisation patronale fondée en 1902 pour défendre les intérêts des entreprises de la distribution et des services de l’automobile en France. Avec 160 000 entreprises, 500 000 salariés, 70 000 jeunes formés et un chiffre d’affaires de 170 milliards €, MOBILIANS œuvre en faveur d’un secteur innovant et pourvoyeur d’emploi, à travers 3 missions principales : défendre les intérêts de la profession, fournir des services (social, juridique, fiscal, environnement, risques professionnels) aux entreprises du secteur et mener une prospective sur les métiers de l’automobile.

En cuanto a nuestra visión, en Elecox aspiramos a ser una compañía referente en el sector por nuestro nivel de especialización, nuestra capacidad para ofrecer servicios integrales, nuestra infraestructura y la gran formación de nuestro personal. Ces professionnels qualifiés doivent être capables de diagnostiquer et de réparer rapidement les pannes de leurs équipements pour garantir la sécurité des aliments transportés et éviter les pertes économiques pour les entreprises de transport.

Ils doivent également être conscients de l'importance de la réglementation en matière de sécurité alimentaire et de la nécessité de maintenir des températures constantes pour garantir la qualité des produits transportés.

C'est un métier qui requiert des compétences techniques spécialisées, une attention méticuleuse aux détails et une capacité à travailler dans des conditions difficiles sur la route.

Name: DIACS SpA
Description:
The company "Diagnostic complexes and systems" (DIAСS) was founded by the Ministry of Atomic Energy and Industry of the USSR in 1990 to monitor the state of high-voltage electrical equipment at nuclear power plants.

Over the 25 years of DIAСS’s work, fundamentally new methods and means have been developed to determine the technical condition of critical electrical equipment to prevent damage to it in operation and to determine a set of measures for maintenance and repair, i.e. a technology has been worked out to determine the presence of latent defects, their type and location inside the machines without decommissioning them. 

The method is included in the international standard "IEEE Std1436".

DIAСS carries out diagnostics of the entire fleet of electrical equipment of industrial enterprises: chemical, oil, energy, metallurgy and other energy-intensive industries.

We deal with the following tasks:

1) Detection of defects (partial discharges, breakdowns of insulation, increased vibrations, etc.) at an early stage
2) Prevention of emergency shutdown of electrical equipment
3) Planning for repair and maintenance of electrical equipment
4) Prevention of process disruption and shutdown
5) Energy Efficiency and Elimination of Electrical Losses

Diagnostics of electrical equipment is a set of tools and methods designed to determine the technical condition and find faults.

Diagnostics of electrical equipment allows, using modern devices, to determine the condition of the equipment without resorting to its "deep" disassembly.

Timely diagnosis allows you to control the degree of reliability of electrical equipment, while reducing the cost of its operation and repair.

Thanks to the measures taken in time, it becomes possible to avoid accidents and failure of expensive equipment.

Name: Yeply
Description:
The short version is that Yeply is a bike shop on wheels, but in reality, it is much more than that.

Our motto is that we keep you riding, and so, we're constantly looking for new ways to get involved in sustainable mobility projects, building urban ecosystems one healthy bike at a time. We consider ourselves a friendly and helpful neighbour, the kind that will conveniently lend you a hand when you most need it.

On the ground, we offer a revolutionary, same-day bike maintenance service that takes away the pain and hassle of taking your bike to a shop and then waiting for who-knows-how-long to get it back. We service neighbourhoods in convenient shifts, so that you can simply drop off your bike with us, and pick it up a few hours later. On top of this, our own MyYeply app keeps your service records safe, and notifies you when your next service is due. It doesn’t get easier than this.

To our business partners, we offer bike maintenance days for the office. Simply book us for a day, and we'll fix your entire team's bikes, and maybe even teach them a thing or two about tires and pumps. No worries.

We also support companies of all sizes on their bike fleet maintenance, whether traditional or electronic. From food delivery services to large corporations with contract bikes, we can tailor our services to suit any maintenance needs. Our tech platform makes sure you always have up-to-date insights into your bike fleet, and that the uptime on your entire fleet stays positive of 90%.

We currently offer multi-city coverage in Finland as well as nationwide coverage in Germany, Austria, and The Netherlands, but we've no intention of stopping there - we already have the largest maintenance network in Europe, so the next logical step is to be the #1 player in the world. So, we'll see you around, neighbours!

YEPLY. WE KEEP YOU RIDING.

Name: Endless Creations Company
Description:
OUR PURPOSE
We believe we can always make a positive impact on the lives of our team, partners and customers we are working with. Our values are based on our vast knowledge and experience, our talented team, our positive company culture, and our diversified premium products & services portfolio.

OUR STORY:
Endless Creations was founded in 1999 as an engineering and trading company. With an entrepreneurial approach, the company started by importing, marketing, and selling Diesel fuel/water separators. Recognizing the growing trend of predictive and preventive maintenance for heavy-duty vehicles and the industrial sectors, the company succeeded in offering its customers smart solutions that achieve optimum operations, reduced downtime for their equipment and better maintenance cost. These solutions included special diesel engine parts and analysis of used oil.
In 2007, Endless Creations added speed limiters to its products portfolio and developed this division over the years which now includes vehicle GPS tracking and fleet management solutions with more than 10,000 vehicle installations.
In 2010,Endless Creations decided to incorporate premium lubricants into the products portfolio, as a result of the extended knowledge in used-oil analysis and different Lubrication applications in Africa, middle and far east regions, and it became the core business ever since.
In 2015, Endless Creations developed a new dynamic business model to achieve sustainable growth objectives.
In 2017, it expanded its products portfolio to include batteries and automotive aftermarket parts in 2018.
In 2020, Endless Creations invested heavily in team organization, development, and digital transformation infrastructure.
In 2022, the company started implementing a top-notch integrated ERP system to support its expansion and ensure a flawless team and customer experience. Later the same year, Endless Creations launched its retail services arm “ElCatalog” and a Products range under the same name

Nuestro enfoque de mejora continua, seguridad industrial y excelencia técnica nos permite adaptarnos a las necesidades del sector energético e industrial, brindando un servicio ágil, confiable y altamente especializado.

Más que un proveedor, somos un aliado estratégico en la operación, mantenimiento y diagnóstico de maquinaria eléctrica crítica, construyendo relaciones sólidas y duraderas con nuestros clientes en México y Latinoamérica.

Name: IPSul Oficial
Description:
A partir de 23.10.2020 a IPSul Concessionária de Iluminação Pública S.A., sociedade de propósito específico, se tornou a responsável pela manutenção e modernização da iluminação pública de Porto Alegre até o ano de 2040. Qualidade na prestação de serviço, transparência, eficiência, ética, inovação e sustentabilidade são premissas que embasam a operação da empresa.



Nossa credibilidade e solidez é resultado da união de quatro empresas com décadas de experiência e centenas de obras e projetos executados em todo o Brasil. A Concessionária IPSul tem o compromisso de tornar Porto Alegre uma cidade energeticamente inteligente, mais iluminada, moderna e segura.



Pelos próximos 20 anos, o grupo formado por Quantum Engenharia, GCE S.A., Fortnort Desenvolvimento Ambiental e Urbano e STE Serviços Técnicos de Engenharia S.A. será responsável por manter e modernizar toda a iluminação pública da cidade, buscando aplicar o que há de mais moderno em gestão. A parceria unirá experiências em setores distintos para aplicar na capital dos gaúchos e gaúchas o conceito de “Cidade Inteligente”.



Sabemos que o pioneirismo das parcerias-público-privadas (PPPs) no Rio Grande do Sul nos impõe uma imensa responsabilidade. Teremos sempre como regra a atuação em parceria. E parceria não apenas com a prefeitura, mas parceria com cada cidadão e cidadã. Queremos que cada habitante atue conosco na manutenção dos espaços públicos, proporcionando a todos uma cidade mais bonita, segura e moderna.



Em abril de 2023 a IPSUL recebeu as certificações das ISO 9.001, ISO 14.001,  ISO 20.000-1 e ISO 27.001, evidenciando que está em conformidade com as normas internacionalmente reconhecidas para os Sistemas de Gestão da Qualidade, Gestão Ambiental, Gestão de Serviços  e Gestão de Segurança da Informação.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Description:
At Mobrage, we're transforming the automotive industry. Our journey began in Reading, UK, after the COVID-19 pandemic when we identified a significant challenge: small-scale mechanics wanted to go mobile due to high shop purchase and rental costs, while vehicle owners were seeking convenient repair services.

In response, we created Mobrage—a platform where mechanics can showcase their skills, and customers can effortlessly book both mobile and static repairs. With over 150 users already on board, we're bridging the gap between mechanics and vehicle owners.

We are driven by a passion for reshaping the automotive sector and making car maintenance more accessible. Join us on this journey of innovation and convenience. Together, we are changing the way cars receive the care they deserve.

Name: Panindia Marine Services Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
PanIndia Marine Services Pvt. Ltd. is a leading container depot and marine services company supporting containerised trade with precision and accountability.

With over a decade of experience, PanIndia Marine partners with Shipping Lines, NVOCCs, and logistics providers, specialising in empty container storage, IICL-standard maintenance and repair, reefer services, and value-added solutions. Strategic locations at JNPA (Nhava Sheva) and Mundra (Gujarat) enable seamless integration with terminals, CFSs, and hinterland movements.

PanIndia Marine distinguishes itself through operational control and capacity. Every container entering the facility undergoes structured inspection protocols conducted by IICL-certified surveyors, supported by a comprehensive digital workflow that ensures transparency, efficiency, and consistency in estimates, approvals, and repairs. From minor wear and tear to complex structural and reefer repairs, dedicated in-house repair teams deliver quality that meets global shipping line standards.

An in-house inventory of essential parts and reefer components minimises turnaround time and ensures containers remain trade-ready.

PanIndia Marine prioritises long-term partnerships, continuous process improvement, technology adoption, and workforce development, ensuring reliability and service integrity even during peak surges.

In a time-critical industry, PanIndia Marine is a dependable partner, recognised for efficiency, quality, and sustainable growth.

Strategic locations | IICL-certified M&R | Dedicated Reefer expertise | Integrated depot operations

Let’s keep containers moving—right, every time.

Name: ALOUSS
Description:
Alouss est bien plus qu’une entreprise de maintenance multitechnique et multiservices. Depuis 1999, nous sommes le moteur du progrès et de l'innovation au service des entreprises marocaines et au-delà. Basés à Rabat, nous avons forgé une expertise unique dans l’amélioration continue de la performance des infrastructures grâce à des solutions globales, fiables et à la pointe de la technologie.

Notre ambition : devenir le partenaire stratégique des entreprises qui souhaitent optimiser leurs performances à long terme, en offrant des services intégrés de maintenance, d’assistance technique et de gestion des installations. Nous agissons comme un catalyseur de croissance, en mettant à disposition de nos clients non seulement notre savoir-faire technique, mais également notre capacité à anticiper leurs besoins futurs dans un monde en perpétuelle évolution.

Notre vision est claire : accompagner nos clients dans un avenir où la fiabilité, l’efficacité et l’innovation ne sont pas seulement des objectifs, mais des réalités concrètes. Chaque projet que nous menons est une occasion de réinventer l’excellence, d’apporter une véritable valeur ajoutée, et de créer des solutions durables qui font une différence tangible.

Chez Alouss, nous ne nous contentons pas de répondre aux besoins actuels, nous créons des solutions qui préparent l’avenir. En investissant dans des technologies de pointe et en misant sur une équipe hautement qualifiée, nous nous engageons à être un acteur clé du développement des entreprises d’aujourd’hui et de demain.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette vision où chaque action, chaque projet, chaque partenariat est une étape vers un futur plus performant, plus durable, et plus connecté.
Cette version met davantage l'accent sur la vision à long terme, l'innovation, et la transformation et développement de la performance des entreprises dans le domaine de la maintenance multi technique et multiservice depuis 1999, avec une expérience extensive dans ce domaine .

Name: Activate Group Limited
Description:
We’re Activate Group - The faster, smarter accident management partner. Our brands service hundreds of thousands of motor claims every year from end-to-end, on behalf of some of the UK’s best-known insurers, brokers, and fleet operators.

Our mission is to get drivers and policyholders back on the road quickly and safely after an incident, supporting them through every step of the claims and repair journey, while controlling costs and repair quality.

Together, our group businesses form a fully-connected, data-driven claims & repair ecosystem, delivering everything from incident reporting, to engineering, vehicle repair, parts supply, connected technologies, and specialist claims management:

 Motor Repair Network – Customer-focused motor claims partner, delivering cost-effective, right-first-time claims & repair journeys for insurers, MGAs and brokers.

 sopp+sopp – Fleet-specialist accident and claims management, reducing downtime, controlling costs, and protecting fleets’ commercial reputations.

 Activate Accident Repair – A UK-wide network of state-of-the-artrepair centres, strategically located where demand is highest, ensuring fast, high-quality repairs.

 Activate Parts – Our in-house vehicle parts supplier and aggregator, sourcing and delivering cost-effective, sustainable parts at speed.

We believe we have the power to ‘make someone’s bad day better’ - that’s our core purpose, applying to both our connections with claims customers, and our day-to-day workplace culture. Our people are the heart of everything we do, driving our market-leading service with empathy, innovation, and commitment - from our call handlers, to our operational support teams, and expert vehicle repairers.

To find out more about Activate Group, and our industry-leading accident and claims management solutions, visit: www.activate-group.com

Name: GO Car Wash
Description:
GO Car Wash’s ambition is to be the most admired car wash company by enriching the lives of its teammates and customers.  We do so by providing a convenient, consistent, and exceptional car wash experience.  Our values of teamwork, fun, integrity, caring, and continuous improvement are lived by everyone, every day.
GO Car Wash is one of the fastest growing consolidators in the car wash space, aggressively expanding across the United States through acquisitions, new builds, and partnerships. GO Car Wash currently operates 130 sites in 8 states, including Kansas, Missouri, Nevada, Texas, New York, California, Oregon and Virginia with several additional acquisitions in discussions and new build sites under development. The goal is surpassing 200 sites, in addition to being known as the number one customer-centric car wash brand. GO Car Wash is majority owned by Imperial Capital.

Name: Vizion Network
Description: Vizion Network supports more than 1000 accident repair centres in the UK, utilising a diverse approach to deliver agile solutions in claims involving passenger cars, LCV and commercial vehicles. Vizion is an inclusive business which acts to drive positive change, employing more than 300 people, and operating from three UK offices.

Name: Anpla
Description:
A sua gestora de nobreaks e energia corporativa.
Para empresas que querem cuidar dos seus nobreaks, energia e elétrica com eficiência.

Desde 1992 viemos ajudando as empresas do Brasil a organizarem e cuidarem de suas operações de nobreaks. Análise e Planejamento estão em nosso DNA.

Ajudamos times de infraestrutura, compras, manutenções, T.I., datas centers, tecnologia, MRO e operações a fazer a gestão estratégica de seus nobreaks e energia corporativa, com atuação multimarcas, multisites, em todo Brasil.

É mais que engenharia elétrica. Acreditamos que a engenharia humana tem mais potência, porque nosso foco é gerar experiências únicas para que nosso time e nossos clientes possam dormir em paz.

Vamos falar sobre gestão?

Name: C&D Industrial Maintenance LLC
Description:
C&D Industrial Maintenance was founded in 2018 and provides services across 7 states. Arkansas, Alabama, Florida, Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina and Tennessee.  We are an owner-operated organization and pride ourselves on our self-delivery of services.  In our short history, we have grown to over fifty (50) employees and have partnered with some of the nation’s largest retailers, supply chain & industrial warehouses, industry partners and manufacturers to provide our services.

C&D Industrial Maintenance is a self-performing, licensed and Certified General Contractor. We specialize in the repair, service, sales, and installation of Commercial Doors, Loading Dock Equipment, Hurricane & Security Shutters, Automatic Gate Systems, Trash Compactors, and Balers.

Our Field Support Team drives  fully stocked service vehicles placed throughout our operating area that remain ready to respond to your repair, service, installation and/or periodic maintenance needs.  We also maintain an in-house, on-call staff 24/7 to assist with your Maintenance emergencies.

The company is an International Door and Education Association (IDEA) accredited dealer. In 2024, the International Door Association (IDA) ranked C&D Industrial Maintenance the 7’th largest Commercial Door Dealer in the United States. We maintain certifications with the American Association of Automatic Door Manufacturers (AAADM) and the Accreditation & Certification Institution (ACI) for Gate Automation Design.

Name: Precision Tune Auto Care
Description:
Precision Tune Auto Care celebrates 45+ years of taking care of cars and the people who ride in them, providing car owners with a one-stop shop for factory scheduled maintenance service and repairs for autos, SUVs, MiniVans and Hybrids. Our trained and certified technicians can perform the same service as a dealer only at a much greater value.

Precision Tune Auto Care is not just another car repair and tune up service provider. We've been in business for over 45 years, and we have the best-in-class training and service warranties. While we have been experts on cars, we're also focused on the people who drive in them. We understand how people drive, and based on that, we can build a program catered to each person that keeps your car running how you want it. It's how Precision Tune Auto Care is in tune with customers.

Servicing 2.5 million vehicles each year and providing the driving public with car care education for personal safety and environmental health, PTAC is a global player with 287 professional service facilities in 5 countries.

Description:

Name: Vulco France
Description:
Vulco : les spécialistes des pneumatiques et de l'entretien tous véhicules

La marque Vulco a été créée en France, en 1996. Spécialiste des pneumatiques et de l’entretien tous véhicules, le réseau Vulco compte plus de 2 500 centres dans toute l'Europe, dont plus de 200 en France et Outre Mer. Ces centres sont aux services des particuliers et des professionnels ; pneus, révision garantie constructeur préservée, climatisation, vidange, freins, amortisseurs, parallélisme, échappement… des centres parfaitement équipés, et des techniciens formés en permanence aux évolutions technologiques de l’automobile, apportent le meilleur savoir-faire pour un service irréprochable et de qualité, y compris sur des véhicules hybrides et électriques.

Nous proposons également un ensemble de services spécialement dédiés aux professionnels. Artisans, PME, PMI, entreprises multi-sites, comptes nationaux et européens… Transporteurs, génie civil, agriculteurs…La clientèle professionnelle a toujours constitué une grande partie de l’activité de notre réseau Vulco.
Référencés par les principaux loueurs, les grandes entreprises nationales et privées et de nombreuses PME, nous apportons des solutions de proximité et de services qui répondent, à partir d’un standard de qualité basé sur les nouvelles techniques de maintenance, à toutes leurs exigences commerciales. De l'assistance dépannage à la gestion de flottes, Vulco accompagne au quotidien les professionnels pour leur rendre la route plus sûre.

Vous souhaitez intégrer un groupe dynamique et ambitieux où les opportunités d’évolution sont réelles ? Rejoignez vite l’aventure Vulco et faites grandir votre talent !

Name: GarageWa.com
Description:
GarageWa is an automotive service company born with the intention of providing mobile mechanics to car owners when needed 24/7 in a hassle free manner. We are on a mission to build the most convenient and trusted car repair service. Keeping in mind parameters like Customer Support, Total trust, Transparency , we are building the future of automotive service industry.
The GarageWa team is passionate about providing the best possible service to the customers. Our goal is to be the premier provider of car repair services in India. We want to be known for our quality workmanship, fair prices, and friendly customer service.
What's more, GarageWa offers Doorstep service and a free pick-up and drop-off service for major works within the city.
We know that finding a reliable and affordable car repair service can be a hassle, so we're here to make things easy. We're now offering our comprehensive repair services online and customers can easily book an appointment with a certified mechanic, get a quote, and have their cars repaired in no time. We believe in transparent pricing, so customers will always know how much the services will cost before they book.
Our platform connects customers with the best mechanics in the area so that they can get their car fixed quickly and easily. What sets us apart from other car repair services is that we offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. Whether it’s a simple oil change or a more complex repair, our mechanics will make sure you’re happy with the results..

Name: J.A Plant Pool Gh Ltd
Description:
J.A. Plant Pool Ghana Ltd is a leading force in Ghana’s equipment, automotive, and industrial solutions space. As part of the renowned Jospong Group of Companies, we serve a diverse range of sectors, including construction, mining, sanitation, energy, and transportation, through the provision of rugged, reliable machinery and unmatched after-sales support.

With a presence in all 16 regions of Ghana, we specialize in:
 Local assembly of construction equipment and vehicles
 24/7 nationwide mobile support
 Supply of genuine spare parts
 Capacity building and operator training
 Strategic partnerships with top global brands 

At J.A. Plant Pool, we understand that great machines are only as good as the support behind them. That’s why we’ve built a reputation for responsiveness, technical expertise, and an uptime commitment, making us a trusted partner for both public and private sector projects.

Through our local assembly operations, we are actively contributing to job creation, industrialization, and national development. Our training programs also empower Ghanaian youth with the hands-on skills they need to thrive in a growing technical economy.

Whether we’re delivering a single excavator or managing an entire fleet, our focus remains the same: delivering quality, service, and solutions that drive results.

J.A. Plant Pool. Rugged Performance. Reliable Support. Proudly Ghanaian.

Let’s build the future together.

Name: ComfortDelGro Engineering Pte Ltd
Description:
As a leading company in the automotive engineering industry for over 40 years, ComfortDelGro Engineering Pte Ltd (CDGE), a wholly-owned subsidiary of ComfortDelGro Corporation Limited, has been providing a suite of automotive services for taxis, as well as private and commercial vehicles. It is also the exclusive distributor for Volvo Bus & Parts, Davanti Tyres for passenger cars and Duraturn Tyres for commercial vehicles.

Recognising the role it plays in supporting the Singapore Green Plan 2030, CDGE had, in 2021, formed a joint venture (JV) company with ENGIE South East Asia – ComfortDelGro ENGIE Pte Ltd – which made its foray into the electric vehicle (EV) charging field by winning the first tender to install over 500 charging points in Singapore. It formed a solar JV with ENGIE – ComfortDelGro ENGIE Solar Pte Ltd – in 2022 to provide renewable energy services using solar power to support the Group’s electrification journey.

CDGE recognises that at the centre of its business is its “heartware” – its automotive technicians – and the importance of ensuring that they are given the knowledge and training to do their jobs well. For this purpose, CDGE set up the CDGE Academy in September 2021 and is collaborating with TÜV SÜD PSB to upskill its technicians as well as those in the industry.

Name: Arca Grup Otomotiv A.Ş.
Description:
Arca Otomotiv, yetkili olarak temsil ettiği toplam 7 marka için Ankara ve Bursa illerinde sıfır araç, ikinci el araç, yedek parça ve satış sonrası hizmetleri sunmaktadır.

Arca Otomotiv; VW Binek Araç, VW Ticari Araç, Audi, Porsche, SEAT, CUPRA, DOD markalarının yetkili satış, Filo satış ve servis hizmetlerini yürütmektedir. 

Arca Otomotiv Ankara, hizmet verdiği Etimesgut ilçesinde 27.451 m^2’lik alanda 200+ çalışanıyla faaliyet göstermektedir. Doğuş Otomotiv Yetkili Satıcısı Arca Grup Otomotiv İnş. San. ve Tic. A.Ş. Ankara tesisinde üstün hizmet anlayışı ve oluşan eğitimli uzman kadrosunu VW Binek Araç, VW Ticari Araç yetkili satış hizmetleri ve VW Binek Araç, VW Ticari Araç, Audi, SEAT, CUPRA yetkili servis hizmetlerini müşterileriyle buluşturuyor. Türkiye’nin ilk Volkswagen Dijital Satış Showroomu olan Arca Otomotiv Ankara, üstün hizmet anlayışı ve üst düzey müşteri memnuniyeti misyonu ile faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Arca Otomotiv Bursa, hizmet verdiği Osmangazi ilçesinde 37.477 m^2’lik alanda 250+ çalışanıyla faaliyet göstermektedir. Doğuş Otomotiv Yetkili Satıcısı Arca Grup Otomotiv İnş. San. ve Tic. A.Ş. Bursa tesisinde üstün hizmet anlayışı ve eğitimli uzman kadrosunu VW Binek Araç, VW Ticari Araç, Audi, Porsche, SEAT, CUPRA, DOD markalarının yetkili satış hizmetleri ve VW Binek Araç, VW Ticari Araç, Audi, SEAT, CUPRA yetkili servis hizmetlerini müşterileriyle buluşturuyor. Türkiye’nin ilk yeni nesil Porsche Showroomu olan Arca Otomotiv Bursa, üstün hizmet anlayışı ve üst düzey müşteri memnuniyeti misyonu ile faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.
Arca Otomotiv’in misyonu, temsil ettiği binek ve ticari araç markalarının, satış ve satış sonrası hizmetlerini en yüksek kalitede sunmaktır.

Name: TM Service
Description:
TM-Service, founded in 2020, is a modern company specializing in the maintenance and servicing of poultry processing machines. Operating across several European countries, we work with plants using the most advanced systems and technologies in the industry. Our team has extensive knowledge of all stages of poultry production, enabling us to perform every task with precision and efficiency.

Our goal is to deliver the highest quality of service. We invest in innovative technologies and continuous training to keep improving. This commitment makes TM-Service a trusted partner in the poultry processing industry, providing professional technical support and consultancy.

In addition to maintenance work, we offer technical consulting to help design and implement efficient processing systems. Each solution is tailored to our clients’ needs, focusing on process optimization, higher efficiency, and long-term reliability.

Sustainability is central to our operations. We aim for maximum productivity with minimal environmental impact, applying responsible and resource-efficient practices across all our activities.

At TM-Service, we value lasting relationships built on trust. We work closely with our clients to understand their goals and deliver solutions that exceed expectations.

TM-Service – your reliable partner in poultry processing. Our professionalism, expertise, and dedication make us the preferred choice for companies that value efficiency and quality.

Name: Massy Motors Colombia
Description:
Massy Motors Colombia es una compañía con más de 10 años de experiencia en la industria automotriz, comprometida con la excelencia y guiada por nuestro propósito del deleite. Con presencia en Cali, Bogotá, Medellín y la Costa Atlántica, hemos consolidado nuestra operación a través de adquisiciones estratégicas en el sector y la expansión de nuestras soluciones de movilidad.

Representamos un portafolio de 12 marcas de vehículos nuevos en Colombia: Kia, Mazda, Mercedes-Benz, Renault, Volvo, Peugeot, Ram, Fiat, Jeep, Volkswagen, Opel y Dodge, además de una amplia oferta de vehículos usados certificados con respaldo y garantía.

Nuestra propuesta de valor se extiende más allá de la comercialización de vehículos. A través de National, Alamo y Enterprise Rent-A-Car, ofrecemos soluciones de alquiler de vehículos para clientes corporativos y particulares, garantizando un servicio ágil y confiable en todo el país.

Complementamos nuestra oferta con servicios de seguros y financiamiento, brindando opciones flexibles para facilitar la adquisición y protección de cada vehículo.

En Massy Motors Colombia, la innovación, la confianza y la experiencia del cliente están en el centro de nuestra evolución. Trabajamos día a día para seguir transformando la movilidad en el país.

Name: HeliTech Solutions
Description:
HeliTech Solutions: Your Global Helicopter Maintenance & Airworthiness Partner

With over 30 years of expertise, HeliTech Solutions is a global leader in helicopter maintenance and airworthiness management. Certified under EASA PART145 and PARTCAMO, we ensure the highest standards of safety and compliance. Strategically located at Gap-Tallard Airfield in the French Alps, we provide both base and remote maintenance solutions to meet client needs worldwide.

Our Services Include:

- Full fleet maintenance for Airbus Helicopters, Robinson R22/R44, and Guimbal Cabri G2, ensuring each aircraft’s optimal performance.

- Complete maintenance solutions, from minor inspections to major overhauls. Our state-of-the-art Maintenance Center offers interior completion, avionics upgrades, and custom exterior paint design, delivering comprehensive care and personalization.

- Global deployment of engineers, providing short- and long-term assignments anywhere in the world, ensuring expert technical support when and where it's needed.

- Pre-purchase inspections, offering detailed assessments to guide informed investment decisions for helicopter acquisitions.

- Airworthiness management, ensuring that your helicopters comply with the latest aviation standards and regulatory requirements.

- Helicopter and spare parts sourcing, optimizing the supply chain for timely delivery and reliable parts access.

- On-the-job training, tailored to enhance your team’s technical skills and operational efficiency.

At HeliTech Solutions, we operate in both English and French, supporting a diverse international clientele. We are committed to delivering fast, reliable, and high-quality services to keep your fleet in top operational condition, wherever you are.

For more information or inquiries, please contact us at info@helitech.solutions.

Name: Ziebart International
Description:

Name: Otomol
Description:
Baykan Şirketler Grubu’nun otomotiv sektöründe 2012 yılından beri faaliyet gösteren Baykan Otomobil A.Ş. ticari unvanlı OTOMOL markası çok markalı ve çok lokasyonlu yapılanması ile otomotiv perakendeciliğinde en büyük hacimli ve öncü şirketlerden biri olmak hedefi ile sıfır satış, ikinci el satış, yetkili servis, kiralama ve sigorta alanlarında kendisini Premium segmentte konumlandırmıştır.

Otomol; yetkili servis hizmetleri toplamda 13 markasını (BMW, MINI, Mercedes Benz, Volvo, Audi, Nissan, Volkswagen, Skoda, Seat, Cupra, Renault, Dacia), yeni otomobil satışında ise Volvo, Nissan, Renault ve Dacia markalarını temsil etmektedir. İstanbul’da Merter, İstinye, Maslak, Ataşehir 1 ve Ataşehir 2, Esenyurt, Ankara’da Çankaya ve Çayyolu, İzmir, Antalya ve Bodrum lokasyonları olmak üzere 11 farklı lokasyonda faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir. Baykan Otomobil A.Ş.’nin (OTOMOL); İstanbul Merter’deki genel merkez lokasyonu ve diğer tüm şubelerinde toplam 850 çalışan istihdam edilmektedir.

Name: Protech Automotive Solutions
Description:
At Protech Automotive Solutions, we are dedicated to pioneering advanced diagnostic scanning, ADAS calibration, and mechanical expertise to ensure vehicle safety and reliability. Since 1993, we have consistently delivered high-tech, full-service diagnostics across various OE makes and models, maintaining an unwavering commitment to quality service.


Our Purpose: Giving Lives the All Clear

Customer safety is our top priority at every step of the repair process. We understand that customers entrust us not just with their cars but with their confidence. We honor that trust by ensuring that every issue is diagnosed accurately, every code is properly cleared, and every vehicle is returned to its pre-accident condition – inside and out.

 
Our Offerings

Our strength lies in our ability to combine advanced technology with personalized service, ensuring that every vehicle we touch is safe and road-ready.

+ On-Site Diagnostic Scanning: Performed by our fleet of highly trained mobile technicians.
+ Advanced ADAS Diagnosis and Recalibration: Ensuring proper precision and safety.
+ Mechanical Expertise: Comprehensive mechanical services to ensure all aspects of the vehicle are thoroughly inspected and repaired.
+ Virtual & On-Site Support: Provided by our team of ASE and I-CAR-certified technicians.


Why Choose Us?

With over 30 years of industry leadership and access to the nation’s largest network of static certified facilities, Protech Automotive Solutions combines advanced technology with personalized service to ensure every vehicle is safe and road-ready. We continuously innovate, develop and leverage new technologies to stay ahead of the industry curve, maintaining the highest standards of vehicle safety and reliability.

 
Discover how Protech Automotive Solutions can enhance your vehicle safety and reliability.

Description:

In Deutschland beschäftigt Carglass rund 2.700 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter, davon mehr als 1.950 in den deutschlandweit 410 Service-Centern. Etwa 210 Mitarbeiter sind im Customer Contact Center (Call-Center) beschäftigt. Das Unternehmen bearbeitet rund 1,4 Mio. Das Unternehmen gehört seit 1990 zur internationalen Belron-Familie und firmiert seit 1993 als Carglass GmbH. Belron ist weltweit das größte auf die Reparatur von Fahrzeugglasschäden, den Scheibenersatz und die erforderlichen Rekalibrierungen von Fahrerassistenzsystemen spezialisierte Unternehmen. Belron ist in 39 Ländern auf 6 Kontinenten mit eigenen und Franchise-Betrieben tätig. Belron beschäftigt rund 30.000 Mitarbeiter, die im Jahr 2023 15,8 Millionen Aufträge ausgeführt haben, wobei der Schwerpunkt auf der Servicequalität liegt, die eine sehr hohe Kundenzufriedenheit generiert.

Som företagskund hos Mekonomen kan du dessutom samla hela bilflottans verkstadsärenden på ett ställe. Ofta har företagskunden fordon av flera märken och modeller samt en geografisk spridning över stora delar av landet. Med M-Fleet ges företag möjlighet att samla sina verkstadsärenden på ett enkelt, tillgängligt, kvalitetssäkrat och kostnadseffektivt sätt. Allt för att ditt billiv ska fleeta på.

Description:
O Grupo Partner é a reunião de empresas do ramos de peças e
serviços voltadas para veículos leves, pesados e agrícolas. Nossas
atividades, se iniciaram em fevereiro de 2016, na cidade de
Curitiba-PR, após adquirirmos a unidade da Viscardi Peças, uma
tradicional concessionária com a bandeira ZF.
No ano de 2017, montamos a primeira filial na cidade de Sarandi- PR e, em 2019, a segunda filial na cidade de Curitiba- PR.
Em 2020, abrimos a nossa 4ª filial, desta vez em Santa Catarina, na
cidade de Joinville, levando nossos produtos e serviços para fora do nosso estado de origem.
Em 2025, Inauguramos a operação agrícola em Joinville - SC,
separando o ramo veicular para focar no setor. A nova unidade mira ser a maior distribuidora agrícola do Sul do país.
Neste mesmo ano, adquirimos a concessão de Câmbio Automático ZF. Com isso, foi-se introduzindo uma política de bons negócios, e principalmente qualidade no atendimento e nos serviços prestados por nossa equipe, guiados pelo nosso CEO, Renan Gomes.
Iniciou-se uma total reformulação na metodologia anteriormente
utilizada. Métodos estes, que vieram a dar resultados meses depois, como crescimento dos negócios e parcerias com transportadores e distribuidores.

Venha você fazer parte dessa história!

Owned by Ittihad International Investment LLC, ELNITCO has since evolved into a multi-disciplinary organization, equipped to manage the construction, operation, maintenance, and management of utilities infrastructure networks and facilities. Carglass forma parte de Belron, compañía líder mundial en reparación y sustitución de lunas de vehículos. Belron opera en 34 países y cuenta con un equipo de más de 21.000 empleados, alrededor de 1.800 centros de servicio y cerca de 8.000 unidades móviles que dan servicio a más de 10 millones de clientes al año; una media de un cliente cada tres segundos. Name: Plasser do Brasil
Description:
Desde 1973, a Plasser do Brasil é parceira estratégica no desenvolvimento da infraestrutura ferroviária brasileira. A empresa é parte do grupo Plasser & Theurer, líder global em tecnologias para manutenção e construção de ferrovias, com sede na Áustria. A trajetória da Plasser do Brasil reflete o compromisso com a inovação, eficiência e sustentabilidade nos trilhos.

Com unidades em Hortolândia (SP), Itajaí (SC) e Rio de Janeiro (RJ), oferece soluções completas para manutenção, reforma, revisão, retrofit e overhaul de equipamentos Plasser & Theurer. O portfólio inclui comissionamento técnico e fornecimento de peças e componentes para máquinas de via da P&T. 

A Plasser do Brasil também ajuda a transformar o setor ferroviário da América do Sul, aliando tradição, especialidade e tecnologia de ponta. Com mais de 50 anos de atuação, lidera projetos desafiadores e fortalece parcerias locais para desenvolver ferrovias mais seguras, eficientes e sustentáveis.

Highline Warren takes the safety of candidates and teammates seriously. In light of recent employment scams, we’d like to reinforce that we will never ask for personal data or banking information, nor will we request an applicant to purchase equipment during the interview process. All recruiting communications will come via @highlinewarren.com or @clearcompany.com email addresses. Name: Belron Canada inc
Description:
At Belron, you are walking into an environment where people go out of their way to get to know you, support you, and help you be the best that you can be. You will quickly understand that everyone is rooting for you to thrive. This is because we understand that when you succeed, we all succeed. 

Once you experience the Belron culture for yourself, you will wonder how so many genuine and inspiring people could work at the same place, and why it is so easy for you to belong.

Belron was born in Cape Town, South Africa in 1897. Since then, our mission to solve people’s problems with great care has spread across the globe, and we are now the world’s leader in automotive glass repair. With over 32,000 employees in 34 countries, we don’t take this responsibility lightly. We are always looking for ways to innovate in a changing industry, create unexpected happiness, and to make a difference in the world.

This is what makes Belron Canada one of a kind.

Name: Rydon
Description:
At Rydon we provide hard facilities management and property maintenance services for housing, healthcare and local authorities. Across the UK we maintain hospitals, homes, local authority buildings and emergency service facilities.

Our experience has taken us across a variety of sensitive healthcare environments, including specialist mental healthcare facilities, community hospitals and rehabilitation units. Our expertise ranges from the construction of substantial community hospitals to our current provision of maintenance services to over 300 buildings for 20 Trusts

Across London, our Maintenance teams maintain thousands of homes. We work closely with residents across many housing schemes, aiming to minimise disruption when repairs are required and ultimately aiming to ensure that the communities we work with are better places to live

Rewarding Careers:

We take pride providing an environment in which individuals can develop their careers. We offer exciting career opportunities and excellent training, a diverse workplace and competitive benefits across all our business divisions.

Rydon's Culture:

Rydon’s culture is one of commitment, excellent professional standards and respect for our employees, clients, partners and suppliers. We approach everything we do with transparency, honesty and respect.

Our business is built on the foundations of Integrity, Teamwork, Professionalism and Partnership. Our people share these principles in whichever role they work – on site as a skilled maintenance engineer, contract management teams, corporate services, within our contact centre or in our branch offices

For more details, please visit: http://www.rydon.co.uk

Elle développe son activité sur deux marchés distincts : le marché du grand public (tourisme, camionnette, 4x4) et celui des professionnels (flottes automobiles, poids lourds, agraire, industriel, manutention, génie civil).

Name: Lufthansa Technik Middle East
Description:
Lufthansa Technik Middle East encompasses the complete range requirements for operators of modern commercial aircraft. Furthermore, the company maintains close relationships with all relevant manufacturers. The company offers comprehensive component supply and the repair of structural and composite materials for airline and VIP customers as well as maintenance operations on all short and medium-haul Airbus and Boeing aircraft including Cyclean Engine Wash service. The Airframe Related Components (ARC) pool provides access to the complete range of spare parts for CFM56-5B and GE90 engines.

Lufthansa Technik Middle East in Dubai is also the central location for the AOG Help Desk and the base for the mobile Airline Support Team, assisting with rapid and comprehensive material and spare parts supply for unplanned incidents around the clock. Depending on the nature of damage, repairs can be arranged and undertaken directly and efficiently at the customer site or, without additional transport costs, in Dubai or elsewhere our tightly integrated network.

Description:

We offer a comprehensive range of software solutions and original hardware tools to meet the specific needs of our customers. Our products and services are designed to provide accurate and efficient diagnosis of vehicle issues, whether you are a professional mechanic, a DIY enthusiast, or a car dealership owner.

At Techroute66, we understand the importance of reliable and accurate diagnostics. That's why we provide software and hardware solutions that are of the highest quality, sourced directly from the manufacturers. 

Our team of experienced technicians is dedicated to providing exceptional customer support and clear instructions to ensure that you can use our products with ease and confidence.

Our product range includes diagnostic and coding software, hardware tools, cables, connectors, scanners, and more. We offer software installation and activation services, as well as a variety of hardware tools and scanners to complement the software. Our software solutions are regularly updated to ensure that you have access to the latest features and functionality.

At Techroute66, we are committed to providing our customers with the highest level of satisfaction. We believe in building long-term relationships with our customers and providing ongoing support to ensure that you get the most out of our products and services. 

Choose Techroute66 for all your diagnostic and repair needs, and experience the difference that our expertise and dedication can make.

Name: Big O Tires
Description:
The Big O Tires story begins back in 1962, just as America's new love affair with the automobile was hitting high gear. The market for replacement tires was exploding, and independent tire dealers found themselves struggling to compete in the face of low prices offered by major tire manufacturers' own company stores. Big O's founding fathers were a handful of progressive independent tire dealers who decided to band together to form a tire-buying cooperative so that they could secure volume pricing and keep their customers happy. Their concept worked. In the years that followed, The Big O Tires co-op evolved into a full-fledged franchise as it continued to find innovative ways to harness the power of the collective to benefit independent dealerships and their customers.
 
Almost a half-decade later, Big O Tires has become North America's largest retail tire franchisor, with over 400 independently-owned and operated locations, providing customers with a broad range of automotive services in addition to quality tires, wheels and accessories. Big O has become an industry role model admired for its innovative approach to franchising and unmatched customer loyalty ratings.
 
In 1996, Big O Tires joined forces with one of the largest and most respected tire marketers in the nation when it became part of TBC Corporation. Big O's reach was broadened again in 2005, when TBC Corporation was acquired by Sumitomo Corporation of America, the largest wholly-owned subsidiary of Tokyo-based Sumitomo, one of the world's leading traders of goods and services.
 
As Big O Tires continues to thrive and adapt to an ever-changing marketplace, it remains rooted in its humble beginnings as a proud collective of independent dealers committed to putting its customers first.

Name: DAT Deutsche Automobil Treuhand
Description:
Deutsche Automobil Treuhand GmbH (DAT) is an international company operating within the automotive
industry. In accordance with its mandate, it collects and prepares comprehensive vehicle data and provides
the sector with cost-effective, nationwide access to it via the SilverDAT System.
DAT sees itself as a neutral intermediary between all the stakeholders in the automotive industry. Ever since
1931 it has been funded by its three partners: the VDA (Association of the German Automotive Industry),
the VDIK (Association of International Motor Vehicle Manufacturers) and the ZDK (German Federation
for Motor Trades and Repairs). This structure gives DAT a unique status and a special mandate within the
automotive industry.
In addition to providing a nationwide network of automotive experts in Germany, DAT’s main tasks are to
observe the market and document technical data for all makes of vehicles and to augment this with
additional relevant facts. This know-how is consolidated in the SilverDAT software, which offers its users
numerous options for the digitisation of their processes. This includes e.g. precise vehicle identification via
VIN queries (Vehicle Identification Number), repair-cost calculations, used-car valuations, key-data analyses
and residual-value forecasts. Hire-car costs and compensation for loss of use can also be automatically
calculated where necessary. Process-oriented online claims-management systems facilitate paperless
communication between all parties involved in a claim and allows them to process digital claims files.
DAT leverages its immensely valuable collection of data to develop new products and services, such as the
analysis of vehicle groups by their equipment levels and the combination with other equipment features.
The DAT Group is represented in numerous international markets by its subsidiaries and holding companies.

DAT Imprint: http://www.dat.de/en/company/imprint.html

Why Power Testing?  Quite simply, we believe our company values are industry-leading, ensuring value for money and an excellent working relationship with any size client. 

Our Purpose:  ‘To ensure a safe and secure future for our people by delivering the best electrical solutions to our customers.’

Our Client Focus:  We have built our reputation and subsequent long-lasting client relationships by continuously delivering service excellence cost effectively, on time and within budget, whilst being responsive to our clients’ needs. Communication channels are always open and we actively undertake customer satisfaction surveys on a monthly basis to ensure we are delivering optimum service. Name: Macleasy BV | Sociaal-circulaire Mac Reparatie
Description:
Macleasy makes Repair easy

1 Mac = 3x waarde = 10 jaar levensduur

Te vaak wordt reparatie gepresenteerd als ingewikkeld, tijdrovend, te duur of ‘niet mogelijk’. 

Het pijnlijke gevolg is dat jaarlijks miljoenen computers onnodig worden vervangen, vernietigd, gerefurbished of gerecycled.

De industrie stuurt aan op afschrijving na 3–5 jaar. Macleasy kiest een andere route: wij verlengen de levensduur tot wel 10 jaar. 

Wij maken repareren weer wat het hoort te zijn: makkelijker, sneller, goedkoper en eerlijker. Geen onnodige vervanging, maar herstel van wat je al hebt.

Onze Sociale R-ladder
Wij passen circulaire strategieën toe met een sociaal hart. Impact op techniek én talent: 

• Rethink: Een ‘afgeschreven’ Mac is een kans. Wij bieden toegang tot de arbeidsmarkt; talent groeit hier tot specialist.

• Refuse: Wij weigeren de wegwerpmaatschappij en onnodige nieuwkoop.

• Reduce: Preventief onderhoud (‘APK’, batterij, schone installatie) voorkomt vroege afschrijving.

• Repair: Onze core business. In-house board-level (solderen). O.a. waterschade, schermen, toetsenborden, topcases. Goedkoper & behoudt data.

• Recovery: Data redden óf veilig wissen (voorkomt vernietiging harde schijven uit angst voor lekken). We oogsten onderdelen voor hergebruik.

• Reuse: Defect? Lesmateriaal voor de Mac Repair-opleiding. Opgeknapt? Donatie aan wie geen laptop kan betalen.

Waarom Macleasy?
Wij elimineren drempels voor reparatie:
•  Eerlijker: Gratis onderzoek & 'Right to Know'
•  Goedkoper: Max €550 reparatiekosten
•  Beter: Board-level (solderen ipv vervangen)
•  Veiliger: Databehoud standaard inbegrepen
•  Sneller: 24u service mogelijk
•  Zekerheid: 6-12 mnd garantie & inruil

Impact
Wij denken niet in afval, maar in waarde.
 Utrecht (Alles in-house) |  PSO 30+ & ICMR |  SDG 4, 8, 12, 17

Name: MOTOO eG
Description:
MOTOO ist die einzige Werkstattkette, die den Werkstätten selbst gehört
Die Marke MOTOO gibt es bereits seit 2005. Ursprünglich als Werkstattsystem geführt, bei dem die Kfz-Betriebe durch den Systemgeber lizensiert wurden, etablierte sich die Marke erfolgreich.
Nach dem Wegfall des Systemgebers kauften 13 MOTOO Betriebe im Jahr 2022 die Markenrechte und gründeten die MOTOO eG, eine eingetragene Genossenschaft, die den MOTOO Werkstätten selbst gehört. Bereits drei Jahre nach der Gründung der neuen Genossenschaft zählen über 70 Mitglieder dazu.
Die MOTOO Betriebe bieten Wartungen und Reparaturen nach Herstellervorgaben für Kraftfahrzeuge aller Fabrikate an. In vielen Fällen gehört auch der Fahrzeughandel zum Angebot.
Häufig sind die MOTOO Betriebe auch auf bestimmte Fahrzeuge spezialisiert, zum Beispiel auf Caravans oder auf Young- & Oldtimer.
Über die Genossenschaft organisiert MOTOO den Bezug von Kfz-Ersatzteilen in Top-Qualität, die technische Ausstattung und die notwendigen technischen Informationen und Daten. Nur so ist eine qualitativ hochwertige Fahrzeugwartung und -reparatur möglich.
Auch die regelmäßige Weiterbildung aller Mitarbeitenden in den MOTOO Betrieben ist eine Selbstverständlichkeit und wird über enge Kooperationen mit dem Teilegroßhandel und der Zuliefererindustrie sichergestellt.

Description:

To further support our clients on-site, we have a growing team of mobile engineers providing rapid-response coverage across the South and the wider UK.

At Acumec, we understand that operational downtime is the greatest challenge our customers face. Our service model is built on efficiency and technical excellence, ensuring that whether you are an independent contractor or a major utility provider, your fleet remains compliant and operational.

By combining the innovation of the Revive Group with our extensive engineering heritage, we deliver the parts, servicing, and machinery that the modern wastewater industry demands.

Name: NSNW AG
Description:
Vom Kanton zur Privatwirtschaft

Mit der Neugestaltung des Finanzausgleiches und der Aufgabenteilung zwischen Bund und Kantonen (NFA) wurde der Bund mit Stichtag 1. Januar 2008 Eigentümer der Nationalstrassen. Für die Sicherstellung des Betriebes und Unterhaltes wurden Kantone oder spezielle Trägerschaften, sogenannte Gebietseinheiten gebildet und beauftragt.

Die Kantone AG, BL und SO haben dafür die Firma NSNW AG (Nationalstrassen Nordwestschweiz) gegründet. Das Personal und die Infrastruktur der ehemaligen Autobahnwerkhöfe wurden in dieses Unternehmen integriert. Die beteiligten Kantone sind Eigentümerinnen der NSNW.

Hauptauftraggeberin ist das Bundesamt für Strassen ASTRA.
