Name: Techyuga |  India's Leading Laptop & Phone Repair Company
Description:
Techyuga: India’s Leading Laptop & Mobile Repair Service Provider

Welcome to Techyuga, the ultimate destination for all your laptop, mobile, and gadget repair needs in India. With years of experience, a team of highly skilled technicians, and a commitment to delivering excellence, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the repair industry. Whether it’s a cracked laptop screen, a dead smartphone battery, or chip-level repairs, we’ve got you covered.

Who Are We?

Techyuga is a one-stop solution for repairing laptops, mobiles, desktops, MacBooks, iPads, and other electronic devices. From minor fixes to the most intricate repairs, our certified technicians bring expertise, precision, and innovation to every job. With a focus on quality, affordability, and fast service, we serve clients across India, ensuring that no gadget problem goes unresolved.

Why Choose Techyuga?

1. Nationwide Coverage

Based in Kolkata, we offer services in cities and towns across India. Our extensive network allows us to provide quick pickup and drop facilities, ensuring that you can get your gadgets repaired from the comfort of your home.

2. Expert Technicians

Our team includes certified chip-level technicians who specialize in handling complex hardware and software issues. We stay updated with the latest technologies to provide the best solutions for modern gadgets.

3. Affordable Pricing

At Techyuga, we believe in transparent pricing. We offer competitive rates for high-quality repairs, ensuring value for money without compromising on quality.

4. Warranty on Repairs

We stand by the quality of our work. That’s why we provide a warranty on all repairs, giving you peace of mind and confidence in our service.

5. Comprehensive Services

From screen replacements to liquid damage repair, our services cover everything you need to get your gadgets back to perfect working condition.

6. Customer Support

Name: The CAPS Consortium Ltd
Description:
The Common Automotive Platform Standard (CAPS) is uniquely committed to expanding data access to remove friction whilst driving efficiency throughout the automotive insurance claims industry. We ensure that collaboration and information exchange can happen seamlessly among insurers, work providers, supply chain partners, systems, and drivers. Clearer communication equals a more efficient claims process from top to bottom.

Our platform was created specifically for all stakeholders in the Automotive claims process. The technology is fully scalable, and users control how their data is viewed and exchanged. CAPS is a secure automated platform/service allowing real-time data exchange. 

CAPS is user-configurable and connects to all major body shop management systems, and its ecosystem continues to grow. This means users of existing systems can connect now or change systems in the future without worry. CAPS is agnostic, and therefore, operates to serve the entire automotive claims industry better.

CAPS users can maximise productivity with customised workflows aligned to how their business works. There’s no complex implementation process or software to install—it’s quick and easy to get started with the CAPS community. 

We are committed to facilitating more effective data exchange and a stronger digitised claims industry overall.

Name: Just Like New Overspray Removal, Inc.
Description:
Just Like New Overspray Removal, Inc. has been the leading overspray company for over 30 yrs.  We specialize in the overspray removal of cars, boats, RV’s, aircraft and buildings just to name a few.  Our exclusive overspray removal processes are performed by highly skilled technicians who are capable of handling any overspray type.  Our overspray specialists can respond to most claims within 24 hours nationwide.  To assure claimant confidence we provide 24 hr 800 toll-free lines to answer any questions.  Whether it’s 1 vehicle or 1,000, Just Like New Overspray Removal, Inc. is your best choice for expert quality management and impeccable service.

Reducing the liability on an overspray claim begins with the important first step, documentation.  Vehicles are thoroughly inspected before the cleaning process begins.  Claimants sign pre-inspection reports, which separate prior damage independent from the overspray claim.  Parts of the vehicle that cannot be cleaned are noted as well.  After the cleaning, claimants sign a release to show ensure satisfaction and to further reduce future liability problems.

Our on-site specialists will meet with the claimants at times convenient to their work schedules.  They will demonstrate our cleaning process and answer any inquiries.  Vehicles will be cleaned on-site.  Our uniformed technicians will complete the vehicle before the claimant leaves work the same day, thus eliminating the high cost of auto rentals.

Just Like New Overspray Removal, Inc.  Specializes in the removal of all types of contaminants, including but not limited to:
Latex, Enamel, Acrylic, Polyurethane Foam, Vandalism, Cement and Concrete, Acid Rain, Industrial Fallout, Urethane, Epoxy, Fire Soot, Graffiti, Iron Filings, Tar/Oil, Volcanic Ash and essentially all other overspray contaminate possibilities.

We understand the complexity that an overspray claim can present.  Our skilled staff has all your answers.

Name: InduMar Products, Inc.
Description:
InduMar Products, Inc. has provided a unique solution since 1986 with our STOP IT PIPE REPAIR SYSTEM for pipe leak repair that has won world wide acceptance and is now being used in a variety of environments where lost time is lost money.  In refineries and chemical plants, where many miles of piping carry products that are often highly flammable, toxic or corrosive, the STOP IT PIPE REPAIR SYSTEM provides a method to restore product flow, and profit flow, in minutes, instead of the many hours required to cut out a pipe section, fabricate and install a new piece.  

The product line was extended in 2006, to include a line of Emergency Leak Repair Kits.  These kits merged the flexibility of the STOP IT PIPE REPAIR SYSTEM with kits for repairing drum, tank and vessel leaks of all shapes and sizes, further expanding the 

2010 saw the release of StopIt HP and Flat Patch from our newly formed InduMar Systems LP division.  StopIt HP provides leak repair or thinned wall rehabilitation for pipes operating at up to 2,000psi.  Stop It Flat Patch is a leak sealant product designed for applications where localized repair is needed or full pipe wraps are impractical.

We celebrated our 30th year in business in 2016.  Let us help you develop a solution to your leak or corrosion concerns.

Name: Cabral Reefer Service
Description:
Somos a Cabral Reefer Service, uma empresa premiada e autorizada das marcas Carrier, Thermo King, Daikin e Star Cool, dedicada à excelência em manutenção e reparos em contêineres refrigerados. Há mais de 35 anos, atuamos no mercado, oferecendo soluções inovadoras e serviços de alta qualidade, com o objetivo de garantir a satisfação total de nossos clientes.

Nosso compromisso é oferecer aos nossos clientes uma experiência excepcional, por isso, investimos constantemente em nossa equipe e infraestrutura. Nossos técnicos são treinados pelos principais fabricantes do setor e estão sempre atualizados com as últimas tendências e tecnologias. Dispomos de uma ampla rede de oficinas, peças de reposição originais, automóveis equipados e ferramentas de última geração, garantindo rapidez e eficiência em nossos serviços.

Além disso, oferecemos uma ampla gama de serviços, incluindo manutenção preventiva, corretiva e emergencial, retrofit de equipamentos, instalação de novos sistemas e monitoramento remoto. Com uma presença nacional, estamos presentes em 13 portos brasileiros, 24 horas por dia, todos os dias, prontos para atender nossos clientes sempre que necessário.

Acreditamos que o sucesso de nossa empresa é o resultado do compromisso constante com a excelência em nossos serviços e na busca pela satisfação total de nossos clientes. Trabalhamos diariamente para superar as expectativas e criar soluções personalizadas para cada necessidade, com um atendimento ágil e eficiente.

Conheça mais sobre a Cabral Reefer Service e veja como podemos ajudá-lo a alcançar seus objetivos. Conte conosco para oferecer o melhor serviço em manutenção e reparos em contêineres refrigerados, com a garantia de qualidade que somente uma empresa líder em seu segmento pode oferecer.

Name: Core Diagnostics - Remote Diagnostics
Description:
Core Diagnostics is a cloud-based remote diagnostics company. Helping you repair more vehicles through 1 tool.
Our team work remotely to fix your chosen vehicle in three easy steps:
Step 1. Plug-in
Locate the OBDII port and insert the Core Remote Interface.
Download our dedicated remote assistance app onto your tablet from the Google Play Store.
Step 2. Select
Select the vehicle and job required. Launch the remote service.
While a Secure Connection is established, it is recommended that a battery support unit is connected to the vehicle to ensure stable battery voltage is maintained (especially for any flash programming jobs).
Step 3. Connect to a Core Technician
Our expert technicians will now complete the requested jobs in real-time.
Once you are connected to a technician, you will be able to use the live chat feature within the app in case any further information is required and so we can keep you updated on the job progress. Getting your job completed in the minimum amount of time.

Name: Anson International Sdn Bhd
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn company page for Anson International Sdn Bhd (“Anson International”)!

About Anson International

Anson International is formed through a joint venture between the Government of His Majesty The Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan of Negara Brunei Darussalam via the Ministry of Finance and Economy, with local partner – Qaswa Holdings Sdn Bhd, and reputable Foreign Direct Investors namely CessCon Decomm Limited from the United Kingdom and Dongil Shipyard Co. Ltd from the Republic of Korea.

As the first integrated Marine Maintenance Yard and Decommissioning Yard in Brunei Darussalam, Anson International represents a significant investment towards the development of Brunei's maritime industry. The two yards will offer state-of-the-art infrastructure and specialised services tailored to the evolving needs of Brunei’s oil and gas sector and the project shall be developed in several phases throughout its course.

The first phase will primarily focus on vessel maintenance and repair and environmentally responsible Decommissioning Practices. The second phase will expand into specialized solutions for companies who are ready to embark on their energy transition journey.

The prime location of the yards will be in Pulau Muara Besar. The yards are currently under construction and aimed to be operational by 2025, if there are no major unforeseen obstacles.

Name: Voltest
Description:
Voltest
Bringing transparency and trust to the used electric vehicle market

Voltest is dedicated to making EV battery health accessible and clear, enabling buyers, sellers, and service providers to make informed decisions. Our portable, easy-to-use OBD2 diagnostic tool delivers real-time, reliable battery health insights, transforming how dealerships, repair shops, fleet operators, and auctions assess EV battery value.

What We Offer
Our device generates data-driven battery health reports with key metrics like State of Health (SOH) and charge cycles, supporting accurate appraisals and fair pricing. Compatible with most major EV models, Voltest empowers everyone in the used EV market to understand and manage battery condition confidently.

Our Vision
To set the standard for EV battery diagnostics in North America and support sustainable transportation by making battery health information universally accessible.

 Join us in driving trust and clarity in the EV market for smarter, more sustainable choices.

Name: M. J. Hydraulik ApS
Description:
Virksomhedens vision

Vores vision er at være Danmarks største og førende leverandører af lifte og teleskoplæssere, samt største og førende udbyder af serviceydelser til lifte og teleskoplæssere. Vi vil være kendt for vores høje kompetence- og kvalitets niveau og for vores værdiskabende løsninger – der sikrer vore kunder den højest mulige driftssikkerhed.

Virksomhedens mission

Med M.J. Hydraulik ApS i øst og KK Materiel ApS i vest er vi en af Danmarks mest erfarne leverandører af lifte og teleskoplæssere, samt en af Danmarks mest professionelle serviceudbydere inden for servicering og reparation af lifte og teleskoplæssere. 

M.J. Hydraulik ApS er beliggende i Holbæk på Sjælland, værksted og kontor er på 2000 m2, herfra importeres og forhandles nye maskiner og udstyr fra Magni, Omme, Dingli og Oil & Steel.

KK Materiel ApS er beliggende i Vejle i Jylland, værksted og kontor er på 1200 m2, herfra importeres og forhandles nye maskiner og udstyr fra Snorkel og Instant Upright.

Virksomheden består af 30 dedikerede medarbejdere heriblandt 15 servicemontører som hovedsageligt arbejder on site. 

Vi har Danmarks største udvalg af nye og brugte lifte, teleskoplæssere, entreprenørmaskiner og andet beslægtet materiel.

Vi har et mangfoldigt lager af reservedele til lifte, teleskoplæssere, kraner og andet entreprenørmateriel, herved sikres vores kunder hurtig service. Alle vores servicevogne er udrustet med slangepresse.

Name: Skorstensgaard – Tyske værkstedspriser
Description:
Skorstensgaard ”tyske værkstedspriser” er en af landets førende, frie autoværkstedskæder. Siden 2009 har vi serviceret knap 500.000 danske personbiler. Hos os bevarer du din fabriksgaranti, da vi gennemgår samme servicepunkter som mærkeværkstederne via fabrikkernes data. Vi har et mål om at være den mest attraktive frie værkstedskæde i Danmark. 

Vi stræber efter at give dig og din bil den bedste kvalitet og service. 150 kvalitetskontroller viser, at vores kvalitet er lige så høj som på danske mærkeværksteder. Vores slogan ”Tyske værkstedspriser” betyder, at vi matcher ethvert tilbud, du måtte have fået fra et tysk værksted. Vores virksomhed er bygget op omkring værdierne: at sprede glæde, at gøre mere end forventet, at være kvalitetsbevidste og effektive.
 
En stor del af vores markedsføring er baseret på et mål om at give dig en lavere værkstedsregning, end den du får på et mærkeværksted. Derfor kan du få op til 40% PrisPres på dit tilbud fra et mærkeværksted, alt efter hvor gammel din bil er, og om der er tale om service eller reparation. Se vilkår her: https://skorstensgaard.dk/privat/op-til-40-prispres 
 
Kigger man på vores værksteder, så er det funktionelle bygninger med en pæn og genkendelig Skorstensgård facade, et rart venterum med gratis wi-fi, kaffe/te og plads til arbejdsro samt et pænt og ryddet værksted med det rette udstyr og testere. Driften bliver nøje målt på forskellige nøgletal, så vi får en optimal udnyttelse af ressourcerne. Vi kan hurtigt sætte ind, hvis nøgletallene kræver det, idet vores beslutningsproces er hurtig — der er aldrig langt fra ord til handling.
 
Kunderne giver Skorstensgaard — eller Skorstensgård, som mange fejlagtigt skriver — positive anmeldelser, og 9 ud af 10 af vores kunder siger, at de vil anbefale os til andre. Ønsker du at se, hvor tilfredse vores kunder er med Skorstensgaard/Skorstensgård, så tag et kig på vores hjemmeside. Her finder du blandt andet kundernes anmeldelser af Skorstensgaard/Skorstensgård på Trustpilot

Description:
Condition monitoring solutions
We help industrial organizations improve the reliability and availability of their critical assets through specialized condition monitoring and vibration analysis solutions.

Our activities are built around three main pillars:
- Condition monitoring services, vibration analysis, and fault diagnosis of rotating machinery.
- Technical consulting in machinery reliability, commissioning support, and evaluation of critical equipment.
- Training programs in condition monitoring and vibration analysis, ranging from introductory to advanced levels.

We hold international certification as a Vibration Analyst Category IV (ISO 18436) issued by the Mobius Institute, reflecting a high level of technical expertise in both advanced analysis and professional training.

Our focus is on delivering practical knowledge, applicable solutions, and effective transfer of experience, helping clients and trainees reduce unexpected failures, optimize maintenance costs, and enhance the overall reliability of their industrial processes.

Name: Spheretech
Description:
Depuis plus de 25 ans, Spheretech Environnement, le département recherche de Ecosphere, analyse et étudie la combustion des moteurs par le biais de milliers d’analyses de gaz moteur collectées depuis les ateliers équipés de l’analyseur de Gaz 5 gaz EASYDIAG.

De cette expertise unique est née le concept original d’ECOMAINTENANCE qui permet aux professionnels de l’automobile de s’engager dans une démarche d’entretien écoresponsable des véhicules thermiques. Pour l'aspect correctif et le "verdissement" du parc nous accompagnons cette démarche par la conception d'additifs "solutions" spécialement formulés pour décarboner et assainir les moteurs : un moteur propre et bien entretenu c'est une voiture qui pollue moins ! 

Spheretech Environnement apporte des solutions aux professionnels et de la pédagogie auprès des automobilistes afin d’agir sur la « santé » de leur moteur pour préserver celle de notre planète. Nous pensons qu’agir pour l’environnement n’est pas seulement réservé à ceux qui peuvent changer de voiture…

Découvrez notre démarche écoresponsable sur notre site Spheretech-environnement.org

Name: CARFLEX
Description:
Des carrossiers en réseau

CARFLEX a été créé par des carrossiers indépendants, pour des carrossiers indépendants, avec un objectif simple : pérenniser les entreprises de carrosserie. 

Pour cela, nous avons créé notre propre méthodologie de travail, IMOV, qui signifie :
- INNOVER
- MASSIFIER
- ORGANISER
- VALORISER

INNOVER
CARFLEX possède sa propre équipe informatique qui développe, en interne, des solutions digitales en fonction des besoins de ses membres. En collaboration avec le comité informatique, composé de carrossiers membres, nos outils naissent des besoins remontés par les carrossiers. Nos outils leur appartiennent et évoluent, en fonction de leurs demandes.

MASSIFIER
Le chef d'entreprise de carrosserie, seul, a peu de poids lors de ses négociations. Mais quand des carrossiers indépendants se regroupent, pour peser plus, ils obtiennent des conditions tarifaires et de services qu'ils n'auraient pu obtenir seuls. Et c'est exactement la manière dont fonctionne CARFLEX.

ORGANISER
CARFLEX peut intervenir et accompagner ses membres à tous les niveaux, dans la gestion d'une entreprise de carrosserie. Nous travaillons en fonction des besoins de nos membres sur des sujets comme la mutuelle, les énergies, la formation,... 
La rupture de l'isolement est également l'une des raisons d'être de CARFLEX. À ce titre, nous organisons des évènements annuels qui permettent à nos membres de sortir la tête de l'eau et de grandir, au côtés de leurs pairs. Nous avons, entre autre, les CARFLEX DAYS, notre séminaire annuel. Mais aussi des réunions de zone, où l'équipe CARFLEX part à la rencontre de ses membres dans les différentes régions de nos membres.

VALORISER
CARFLEX accompagne ses membres dans leur communication locale. Gestion des réseaux sociaux, création de site Internet, gestion de fiche Google, création de supports de communication personnalisés,... Notre équipe communication contribue à valoriser le savoir-faire de nos artisans carrossiers.

Name: TAGPRO
Description:
A TAGPRO é uma associação de proteção veicular licenciada pela SUSEP, que trouxe inovação para o segmento, sendo o principal parceiro do motorista profissional e uma das principais associações de proteção veicular do Brasil. 

Nosso propósito vai além do básico: estamos aqui para superar expectativas e resolver os problemas de quem dirige, oferecendo segurança nas rotas e com benefícios reais. 

Somos apaixonados por cuidar dos nossos associados e daqueles que os levam aos melhores destinos. Protegemos o patrimônio e a ferramenta de trabalho do motorista profissional com condições exclusivas, além de investir em qualidade, humanização e processos personalizados para cada membro da nossa base.

Nosso maior diferencial é a proteção de renda de até R$ 5.000,00 que protege muito mais que só o veículo, mas mantém a família unida, o alimento na mesa e o motorista profissional tranquilo. Com o reboque ilimitado para todo o Brasil em caso de acidente, batida ou colisão, vantagens como socorro pneu furado, pane seca, telemedicina, carro reserva, danos a terceiros, desconto em combustível e seguro APP de até R$ 250.000,00 tornam a nossa proteção ainda mais completa. 

Prezamos acima de tudo por uma comunicação assertiva voltada para servir bem, com empatia e trabalho em equipe, a fim de instigar o senso de pertencimento dos propulsores da marca e fomentando tudo em dados, números e resultados. 

Acesse nosso site e veja o que nossa solução pode fazer para proteger a sua rotina como motorista profissional, trazer segurança para sua família e seus passageiros ou converse diretamente com nossos especialistas: 

 - (31) 2532-0890 (Telefone e WhatsApp) 
 - Redes sociais: @tagpro.brasil

Name: R.A Ingenieria S.A
Description:
R.A. Ingeniería S.A. | Soluciones mecánicas para una industria que no se detiene

En R.A. Ingeniería S.A. nos especializamos en brindar servicios de mantenimiento mecánico integral para equipos rotativos industriales, con foco en hornos de cemento, cal y yeso, así como en molinos, rodillos, llantas y polines. A través de diagnósticos mecánicos precisos, rectificados in situ y asistencia técnica especializada, ayudamos a nuestros clientes a minimizar tiempos de parada, optimizar el funcionamiento de sus plantas y extender la vida útil de sus activos.

 Nuestros servicios permiten realizar correcciones sin detener la producción, evitando pérdidas económicas y asegurando la continuidad operativa.

 Hemos trabajado en más de 70 plantas industriales de Argentina, Brasil, Paraguay, Chile, México y Suiza, incluyendo empresas como Holcim, Loma Negra, YPF, Cementos Avellaneda, Ternium-Siderar, Terminal 6, BIO4, Imbal y muchas más.

 Nuestra historia
Fundada en 2003 por el Ing. Raúl Ángel Ambrosi, R.A. Ingeniería S.A. tiene sus raíces en más de 50 años de experiencia en la industria del cemento. El Ing. Ambrosi inició su carrera en 1968 en Loma Negra Olavarría y fue responsable técnico del montaje y dirección de planta en Juan Minetti S.A. (actual Holcim). Su visión técnica y operativa sentó las bases para una empresa que hoy cuenta con un equipo consolidado y comprometido con la mejora continua.

 Lo que nos diferencia
 Más de 60 años acumulados de experiencia técnica en mantenimiento mecánico.

 Equipamiento propio, software y métodos desarrollados in-house.

 Intervenciones sin detener producción (“on the run”).

Our Vision
To be the leading maintenance and operations Company in the Gulf and the Middle East by providing best-in-class consumer experience that contribute to wellbeing of our customers lives, and to become the preferred service partner representing the symbol of excellence, trust, and sustainability.

Our Mission
Leveraging our expertise and capabilities to provide value-added and professional services to our business partners through offering top-notch services that surpass customer expectations to become the service go-to destination for them.

You make the final decision about which service(s) to purchase. 

 Jiffy Lube will recommend services based on manufacturer's time and mileage intervals for "severe" driving conditions. However, if you don't drive in "severe" conditions or your need more information about different driving conditions, simply let us know.

This is the Jiffy Lube Pledge to you, the customer, and we take this pledge very seriously.

Name: Rino Blindagens
Description:
Conhecer a história da Rino Blindagens é se encantar com uma empresa que nasceu com DNA industrial na área da segurança.

Unindo os conhecimentos fabris ao know-how do mercado automotivo, já presente conosco há mais de 20 anos, nasce a Rino Blindagens, em 2015. Nossa história começou com um objetivo claro: oferecer aos nossos clientes a segurança e proteção necessárias para que possam desfrutar da vida com tranquilidade. Investindo em tecnologia e infraestrutura para oferecer um serviço de qualidade inigualável.

Somos vinculados à ABRABLIN – Associação Brasileira dos Blindadores Veiculares, e credenciados pelo Ministério do Exército Brasileiro, órgão que regulamenta a Blindagem no Brasil.

Com sede em São Paulo e alcance em diversas regiões do Brasil, a Rino Blindagens é reconhecida por sua excelência em atendimento e qualidade em serviços. Nossos profissionais são altamente capacitados e treinados para oferecer o melhor em tecnologia de blindagem veicular e atender às necessidades específicas de cada cliente.

Além da conversão de veículos para blindagem, utilizamos as melhores ferramentas e materiais disponíveis no mercado para garantir a eficácia do processo. A nossa produção é rigorosamente controlada e submetida a testes que verificam o nível de segurança oferecido, seguindo as diretrizes e normas dos órgãos competentes.

Com uma estrutura física completa, hoje comportamos: Linha de produção da blindagem, Centro de assistência técnica de blindados, Centro de revisão da blindagem, Centro de estética e reparos automotivos e Setor de documentação da blindagem.

Acreditamos que a nossa história de sucesso é resultado de muita dedicação, paixão e um profundo compromisso em oferecer a melhor experiência possível aos nossos clientes.

A Rino Blindagens é a escolha certa para quem busca segurança em primeiro lugar. Venha conhecer os nossos serviços e comece agora mesmo a proteger quem você ama.

Rino Blindagens – Segurança que você confia!

Specialising in erosion, corrosion and chemical protection, Belzona is a world leader in the design and manufacture of repair composites and protective coatings for machinery, equipment, buildings and structures.
Founded in 1952, we are one of the few global companies which offer innovative solutions combined with the technical know-how to meet the demands of a variety of industries. From full turnkey solutions such as vessel linings to pump efficiency coatings, our extensive experience ensures that we can provide cost effective systems which offer long-term repair and protection with minimal downtime; meeting our clients’ specific requirements. 
With a global distribution network covering over 120 countries, we offer 24-hour technical support and on-site assistance. Our solutions offer a simple, safe and effective means to assist with demanding projects by providing benefits rarely found elsewhere including:

o	In-situ repairs which can reduce downtime and need to dismantle equipment
o	Reduced health and safety risks using solvent free polymer products 
o	Cold cure materials which do not shrink, eliminating the hazards of hot work
o	Simple application techniques allowing for in-house repairs

Discover Belzona's products, the industries we serve and specific details on our application areas, or to learn more about Belzona's history, accreditations or services please call us on 305-512-3212 or visit our website www.belzonaflorida.com. You can always email us @ florida@belzona.com

Name: Renove Fachada
Description:
A Renove Fachada é uma empresa especializada em manutenção predial com foco em fachadas, atuando nas cidades de Recife e João Pessoa. Surgimos com o propósito de profissionalizar o setor de obras condominiais, entregando soluções técnicas completas, com excelência operacional, segurança e respeito à rotina dos moradores.

Nosso trabalho vai além da execução. Entendemos que obras em condomínios são naturalmente sensíveis, exigem cuidado com comunicação, planejamento e, principalmente, confiança. Por isso, adotamos uma abordagem que une engenharia com gestão. Cada obra é conduzida com cronogramas realistas, protocolos de segurança do trabalho, registros fotográficos, relatórios técnicos, acompanhamento presencial e canais abertos com síndicos, administradoras e moradores.

Atuamos com serviços de revitalização e lavagem de fachadas, substituição de revestimentos, recuperação estrutural, impermeabilizações, juntas de movimentação, substituição de emboço, tratamento de fissuras, retrofit e pintura. Trabalhamos com diversos tipos de acabamentos: cerâmica, pastilha, textura, pedras, granilite, entre outros.

Nosso time é formado por engenheiros civis experientes e profissionais qualificados, com treinamentos contínuos e alinhados aos princípios da segurança e qualidade. Utilizamos tecnologia para controle interno, relatórios digitais por trecho de fachada, gestão de produtividade e medição de avanço físico da obra.

Mais do que entregar um resultado técnico, entregamos tranquilidade. Nossa missão é garantir que a obra traga valorização ao patrimônio, confiança à gestão condominial e segurança à estrutura do edifício.

Se você é síndico, gestor ou faz parte de uma administradora de condomínios e deseja ter uma experiência positiva com obra em fachada, conte com a Renove. Transformamos sua fachada com engenharia, planejamento e responsabilidade.

Name: FAST PRO

Pendant 20 ans, depuis sa création, Fast Pro était la master franchise au Maroc d’une franchise internationale. En 2018, le management de Fast Pro a décidé de changer de franchise et de créer sa propre franchise dénommé FAST PRO.

Toutes les pièces de rechange utilisées par les centres FAST PRO sont des pièces de 1ère monte produites par les plus grands fabricants de pièces de rechange au monde.
FAST PRO s’engage à assurer à ses clients un service rapide et sans rendez-vous, qui offre le meilleur rapport qualité/prix. Ce service est réalisé en toute transparence ; Les clients peuvent s’inviter à assister eux-mêmes à la prestation demandée.
Avant toute prestation, les centres FAST PRO proposent au client un devis gratuit. Et suite à toute prestation, le client bénéficie d’une garantie pièces et main d’œuvre.

Name: SERMI Association
Description:
Welcome to SERMI – the Association created to further develop, own, operate and maintain a scheme and process initially proposed by the EU Forum on Access to Vehicle RMI (Repair and Maintenance Information) to approve and authorise independent operators (IO’s) working in the European automotive aftermarket industry sector, to enable them to access security-related RMI.

SERMI has been created as part of the requirements of the Delegated Regulation (EU) N° 2021/1244, Regulation (EU) N° 2018/858 and Regulation (EC) N° 692/2008, which grant standardised access to technical information whilst establishing specific provisions for access to vehicle security features. Subsequently the ‘EU Forum on Access to Vehicle RMI’ was established and issued in October 2009 a report describing the complete process and architecture on access to security related RMI, including an accreditation scheme for Independent Operators. This scheme is currently under revision to align with the latest Regulation.

SERMI has been established as de-facto association under Belgian law. It is organised as a joint responsibility between Vehicle Manufacturers and Independent Operators as stakeholders who are primarily involved in the process to obtain or provide access to security-related RMI, parts and functions.

SERMI acts as scheme owner to the European co-operation for Accreditation (EA).

The updated SERMI scheme is validated by the European Accreditation association on the 3rd of February 2023. The scheme will become operational in August 2023. The SERMI organisation is responsible for this. Currently authorisation for access to anti-theft related RMI is handled by vehicle manufacturers directly. Parties requiring such authorisation in advance of SERMI becoming operational should contact the vehicle manufacturer concerned.

Name: HeavyEquip Mechanical Services Pty Ltd
Description:
HeavyEquip Mechanical Services (HEMS) is a South Australian owned and operated business providing trusted heavy diesel and mining equipment solutions across Australia.

Established in 2012, HEMS has grown from one service truck into a leading provider of mechanical repairs, maintenance, diagnostics, labour hire, field service and plant hire for the mining, civil, and construction sectors. With over a decade of experience, we deliver safe, reliable, and cost-effective support for heavy equipment of all makes and models.

We are proud to be ISO certified in Quality, Environmental, and Health & Safety Management Systems, reflecting our commitment to excellence and continual improvement across every aspect of our operations.

Our Services Include:
 Caterpillar and late-model Caterpillar Earthmoving Equipment Repairs, Support & Diagnostics
 Hitachi & Komatsu Equipment Servicing
 Civil and Mining Equipment Repairs
 Road-Going Vehicle Maintenance
 Industrial Machinery, Forklift & Stationary Motor Repairs
 Total Machine Rebuilds and Drill Rig Services
 Labour Hire and Site-Based Support
 Plant Hire – including mine-spec CAT 745 water trucks for dust suppression and earthmoving projects

Based in Direk, South Australia, HEMS operates a fully equipped workshop with a 10T gantry crane, wash bay, and modern diagnostic tooling, complemented by a fleet of field service vehicles ready to respond to client needs across the state and beyond.

Our experienced tradespeople take pride in their workmanship and customer relationships, working to OEM standards with full transparency and clear communication. Whether you need a major component rebuild, site labour support, or reliable plant hire, HEMS delivers practical solutions that keep your operations moving.

At HEMS, we don’t just fix machines, we partner with your business for success.

Name: Unicar Group
Description:

Part of Inter360° Group since 2022 , UniCar occupies the premier position in gathering worldwide handover inspection data and deployment of this rich information to avoid the avoidable and contain the inevitable damage costs stemming from the increasingly long and unprotected finished vehicle supply chain.

Our services help manage the financial risk and improve the business performance of companies involved in moving vehicles. Using bespoke technologies we capture vehicle condition data and analyse trends in damage to fuel practical and cost effective risk management strategies.

Group services include surveys at all points of transfer handover, operational quality audits at end of line, rail, sea and road movements, compound management, catastrophe event management plus damage claims & recovery management.

Our services include everything from routine maintenance and repairs to custom builds and performance upgrades. We work on all types of vehicles , Whatever your needs, we have the skills and expertise to get the job done right.

Name: Prospeed
Description:
Prospeed is the organization behind the official Porsche one-make series in the Benelux. The organization established the first one-make series in the Benelux market in 2013. In 2019, the championship was awarded Carrera Cup status as the first independently organized Porsche one-make series. In the following years, the championship portfolio was extended to include an entry-level sprint championship, an endurance format, and an off-season sprint challenge in Spain and Portugal.

In addition to organizing the championships, Prospeed provides a technical and support platform for racing teams and track day customers, including:

• Racing Parts – Prospeed supplies the full range of Porsche Motorsport, Porsche Genuine and Manthey parts, ensuring teams and drivers have access to high-quality components for their race and track cars.

• Specialized Workshop – The Prospeed workshop provides maintenance, upgrades, and setup for drivers active in track day programs, ensuring their Porsche GT street and race cars are always performing at the highest level.

• Technical Assistance – A dedicated team of engineers and mechanics offers on-site technical support at race events and track days.

With its deep expertise in motorsport and a strong focus on service and support, Prospeed is the go-to partner for both competitive racing teams and enthusiasts looking to push their limits on track.

Notre offre s’étend également à l’exploitation de centrales de cogénération, l’installation et la maintenance de mâts de mesure, ainsi que le développement de systèmes autonomes (SAAM) destinés à l’alimentation de capteurs LIDAR ou SODAR. 

Conscients des enjeux énergétiques et environnementaux, nous nous engageons dans une démarche responsable : recyclage des composants en fin de vie, utilisation de pièces reconditionnées, respect des normes QHSE, sécurité des équipes, et réduction de l’impact environnemental de nos interventions. 

Fiers d’un savoir-faire technique reconnu, entretien sur site, rétrofit, remplacement de gros composants, revente de pièces, gestion d’exploitation et d’une équipe qualifiés, nous accompagnons nos clients (exploitants, propriétaires de parcs, collecteurs d’énergie) vers la performance, la fiabilité et la durabilité de leurs installations. 

Notre mission : garantir la disponibilité, la performance et la longévité des parcs éoliens, tout en maîtrisant les coûts d’exploitation et en contribuant à la transition énergétique.

Découvrez notre E-SHOP : https://energiemaintenancewindparts.com/

Je propose aux professionnels des aménagements avec des solutions sur-mesure qui permettent :

- De personnaliser votre aménagement en fonction de vos besoins en installant des étagères, des tiroirs pour sécuriser vos outils. 
- Ranger vos outils sous un double plancher afin de garder un espace de chargement. 
- Accessoirisez votre aménagement avec des organiseurs de tiroirs, des boites et mallettes de rangement …
- Pensez à installer des éclairages supplémentaires dans votre véhicule pour utilisation sereine toute l'année. Un SAV de proximité.
- Les aménagements sont soumis aux crash test afin d'assurer votre sécurité.
- Garantie 5 ans.

Le Van de L'ouest vous aide à concevoir et réaliser votre aménagement qui vous reflète en vous projetant avec un outils 3D pour visualiser votre aménagement final. 

J'aménage également les véhicules de loisirs pour les transformer en vans aménagés.

Name: Scientific Calibration, Inc.
Description:
Scientific Calibration is a full-service laboratory supply and maintenance company. Our mission is to fuel science and innovation through providing premium services and equipment. Our portfolio includes consumables, chemicals, laboratory equipment and equipment services. 

We provide individualized customer service, competitive pricing and a comprehensive product offering for every lab. 

Lab Supplies: Scientific Calibration distributes thousands of products from over 150 leading manufacturers. Whether you have specific needs or are looking for cost-effective solutions, we can help. Shop competitive pricing from our top manufacturers: Globe, Microflex, Nalge/Nunc, Eppendorf, Wheaton, Corning, Nichiryo, Simport, Biotix, Sanyo, PolyScience, Ritter, BD, ThermoFisher and LabChem. 

Equipment: With an expansive product offering, we supply both new and pre-owned laboratory equipment as a way to meet every lab’s budget. As a certified partner of Thermo Scientific, Corning, Labnet, Wheaton and Microlit, we are able to provide all customers with innovative products at the competitive prices. Pre-owned equipment provides a more affordable option; clients have access to technical specifications, images, accessories, and warranties are available for most products. 

Chemicals: We offer over 25,000 fine chemicals all produced and packaged under strict quality standards and industry guidelines. If your projects require bulk chemical orders, trust us to deliver these supplies as well. You will receive the same quality products and timely delivery. 

Services: Scientific Calibration offers a complete package of laboratory services: equipment calibration and validation, asset management, equipment repair, appraisal and liquidation. With ISO/IEC 17025 accreditations for our facility as well as off-site locations, you can trust us to maintain your lab’s GLP and GMP standards.

Name: Loogman Carwash
Description:
Bij Loogman Carwash geloven we dat elke auto het verdient om te schitteren. Met 9 geavanceerde locaties in de Randstad bieden wij een uitmuntende waservaring waarbij innovatie en klantgerichtheid centraal staan. Onze diensten variëren van een grondige wasbeurt tot een zorgvuldige binnenreiniging op de lopende band, waarbij onze ervaren teams elke auto met de grootste zorg behandelt.

Maar Loogman is meer dan een wasstraat. Wij zijn een totaaloplossing voor autoverzorging met doe-het-zelf wasboxen en stofzuigpleinen voorzien van alle gemakken voor een schoon resultaat. Daarnaast bieden we op enkele locaties ook mogelijkheden tot tanken, elektrisch laden en horeca. Onze succesvolle Loogman Was app met de Zakelijke Wasbubbel is speciaal ontwikkeld voor de zakelijke markt. Deze biedt interessante kortingen en spaarprogramma’s aan, waardoor je als bedrijf kunt genieten van topservice met ultiem gemak. 

Vertrouw je auto’s toe aan Loogman Carwash zodat je bedrijfsauto’s altijd een representatieve uitstraling hebben. Wij begrijpen hoe belangrijk een goede eerste indruk is. Laat ons je helpen die indruk onvergetelijk te maken. Ontdek de voordelen van onze Zakelijke Wasbubbel en laat Loogman het verschil maken, iedere wasbeurt weer!

Unser Ziel ist es, eine zukunftsorientierte und nachhaltige Lösung anzubieten, die sowohl unseren Kunden als auch der Umwelt zugutekommt.

Mit unserer Erfahrung garantieren wir nicht nur höchste Qualität bei der Ausführung, sondern auch eine rasche Umsetzung. „Bodenständig, einfach, direkt und transparent". Nur einige Eigenschaften, die uns stark machen.

Wir entwickeln für jeden Kunden und jede Anlage eine individuelle und massgeschneiderte Wartungsstrategie. Denn die intensive Analyse und der enge Kontakt mit unseren Kunden bilden unsere Basis für unsere tägliche Arbeit.

Name: Pneus do Alcaide, SA
Description:
Somos uma empresa que opera no mercado de Pneus, no ramo da Recauchutagem de Pneus, fazendo parte de um grupo restrito de empresas europeias da rede Next Tread Recauchutadores Autorizados das marcas Goodyear, somos também um dos maiores revendedores de Pneus novos, sendo agente das principais marcas de pneus presentes no mercado e comercializando todos os tipos de pneus para todos os tipos de serviços. 

Oferecemos através dos nossos Postos de Assistência (Tremoceira, Santeira, Benedita,) quer através de uma rede móvel de assistência que cobre já uma área considerável do nosso país.
Somos uma empresa certificada de acordo com a norma ISO 9001:2015 no âmbito do Sistema Português da Qualidade.

Os nossos produtos de recauchutagem são Homologados desde Junho de 2002, através do Regulamento 109 da CEE/ONU.

História:

A empresa nasce em 1981, nas mãos de Augusto Laureano, com a atividade de revenda de Pneus Ligeiros e Pesados, num pequeno posto em Porto de Mós. Prestando assistência aos seus clientes e procurando sempre satisfazer as necessidades dos seus clientes a empresa cresce e daí surgem umas novas instalações em Tremoceira, lugar onde ainda hoje nos encontramos sediados.

Em 1991, alargamos o mercado para a indústria de Recauchutagem de Pneus, tornamo-nos um Recauchutator Oficial da Goodyear e contamos já com quatro postos de assistência, um deles, a Alcaide & Salco em Leça da Palmeira. Este posto nasce em 2019 de uma parceria entre o Grupo Salco e Pneus do Alcaide.

Em 2022, cimenta-se uma história que já tem vindo a correr: David e Jânia Laureano assumem o controlo total da empresa, reforçando assim o compromisso e confiança no projeto futuro.

Esta é a nossa história até hoje: procuramos ser únicos no mercado, procurando soluções amigas do ambiente, investindo em equipamentos que permitem reduzir a pegada ambiental e ao mesmo tempo conseguirmos ser mais competitivos.

Quality assurance is our cornerstone. This uncompromising approach to quality control allows us to offer a confident six-month warranty against manufacturing and material defects on all our products.

We understand the importance of authenticity in the automotive parts market. That's why all EUROREPAR products feature secure labels on packaging, protecting against counterfeiting and ensuring genuine quality with every purchase.

EUROREPAR by Stellantis is the smart choice for aftermarket automotive parts, providing the best balance between quality and price for a reliable driving experience.

Name: AllTracks Engineering
Description:
AllTracks – Redonnez une nouvelle vie à vos machines de damage

Saviez-vous qu’une dameuse, c’est :

    10 tonnes d’acier et de technologie,
    500 chevaux de puissance,
    8000 heures de fonctionnement en moyenne, pour une durée de vie souvent limitée à seulement 7 ans ?

 Un impact écologique sous-estimé :
Chaque machine construite mobilise des ressources considérables. Lorsqu'une dameuse atteint la fin de son cycle traditionnel, la majorité de ses pièces, pourtant très coûteuses en énergie à produire, ne sont pas réutilisées.

Chez AllTracks, nous avons choisi une autre voie :
En reconditionnant les engins existants, nous permettons d’économiser jusqu’à 55 tonnes de CO₂ par machine, soit l'équivalent de :

    793 tours de la Terre en TGV,
    55 allers-retours Paris-New York en avion,
    484 000 gobelets en plastique,
    2970 jours de chauffage domestique.

 Notre expertise unique :
Grâce à notre parfaite connaissance des machines de damage, nous restaurons leur performance d’origine :

    Pression au sol réduite : 100 g/cm²,
    Capacité ascensionnelle : 100%,
    Capacité de poussée : 9 tonnes,
    Vitesse de déplacement : 23 km/h.

 Et nous allons plus loin !
Nous adaptons également ces machines pour des usages agricoles et environnementaux :

    Travaux de méthanisation,
    Préparation des pistes de ski,
    Broyage en zones humides,
    Épandage spécialisé,
    Débardage...

 Découvrez nos réalisations sur notre chaîne YouTube :
https://www.youtube.com/@alltracksengineering/playlists 

AllTracks – Pour des machines plus durables, plus responsables, et toujours plus performantes.

Name: Mezatech
Description:
Mezatech is a leading provider of technology repair services in the MENA, dedicated to empowering SMEs, corporates and organizations to reach their full potential through the optimization of their technological longevity. The company offers a comprehensive range of services to keep devices running at its best.

At the core of Mezatech's offerings is the provision of instant maintenance services. The company understands that when technology fails, time is of the essence, and that is why Mezatechs provides on-demand repairs to get devices up and performing again as quickly as possible. Battwheels Garages is redefining the electric vehicle (EV) aftersales experience with cutting-edge onsite service and maintenance solutions. We specialize in delivering precision repairs and proactive care, ensuring minimal downtime and maximum efficiency for your EVs.

With a mission to support India’s EV revolution, we cater to fleets, businesses, and individual owners by providing swift, reliable, and expert services directly in the field. Whether it’s electric two-wheelers, e-rickshaws, or other EVs, our team is dedicated to resolving over 90% of issues on the spot, eliminating unnecessary part replacements and reducing costs.

At Battwheels, we understand that time is crucial, especially for vehicles driving the quick commerce and logistics sectors. That’s why our services are tailored to keep your EVs running smoothly, powered by a team of skilled technicians and a deep understanding of EV components and technology.

Join us in shaping the future of sustainable mobility with smarter, faster, and more efficient EV servicing.

Description:
Big Country Equipment Repair Ltd. (BCER), established in Kamloops, B.C., in 2017, is a family-owned company delivering top-tier service with a focus on safety and customer satisfaction. With over 100 skilled employees, BCER provides tailored services to meet the needs of various industries.

Core Services:

- Skilled Tradespeople: Providing high quality vetted experienced licensed red sealed heavy-duty mechanics, welders, machinists, and more to keep equipment running efficiently.
- Full Service Maintenance: Expertise in maintaining and repairing equipment such as dozers, graders, excavators, hydraulic shovels, and underground machinery.
- Project Management: Maintenance planners, maintenance schedulers supervisors, and project managers ensure operational efficiency and uptime.

Our Brand Representation:

- Safegauge: BCER represents Safegauge, offering wireless testing solutions that enhance safety by keeping technicians at a distance during live equipment testing. Widely used in industries like Mining and Oil & Gas.
- Phillips 66 Lubricants: As dealers of Phillips 66, we provide high-performance oils and greases that protect machinery in extreme conditions, ensuring durability and reliability.
- Ground Force Worldwide: BCER partners with Ground Force, offering mining support equipment, including fuel and lube trucks and custom dump bodies for rugged environments.
- TowHaul: BCER works with TowHaul, providing custom towing and hauling solutions for harsh locations, including the Arctic Circle and Australian Outback.

BCER also sources reliable, inspected used equipment globally, including haul trucks, drills, dozers, and excavators.

BCER is your trusted partner for equipment services, offering expert maintenance and tailored solutions to keep your machinery running efficiently. Whether you need repairs, fleet maintenance, or equipment sourcing, BCER delivers reliable support to maximize performance and minimize downtime. Contact us today to learn more!

Name: Grupo W-Service
Description:
Manutenção preditiva, preventiva e corretiva em subestações de baixa, média e alta tensão. Assistência técnica em campo, contratos de manutenção e terceirização de mão de obra.
A W Service tem seus relatórios como diferencial, gerando confiabilidade e transparência dos serviços executados.
Equipe técnica com profissionais treinados constantemente para vencer desafios e oferecer soluções.
Laudos de inspeção, adequação de sistemas de pára-raios (SPDA), medição de pontos de aterramento, instalações elétricas conforme NR10, assim como, elaboração de projetos de sistemas de potência.
Estudos específicos de fluxo de carga em circuitos elétricos, curto circuitos, coordenação e seletividade, análise de qualidade de energia, correção de fator de potência e arco elétrico (Arc Flash).
Termografia e diagnose de equipamentos elétricos de baixa, média e alta tensão.
Filtragem e tratamento termovácuo de fluido isolante em transformadores de potência e disjuntores tipo GVO. Análises físico-química, cromatográfica e teor de PCB. Substituição ou regeneração de óleo isolante material.
Comissionamento e start-up de subestações elétricas.
Em relés executamos aferição, calibração, parametrização e proteção de todas as marcas e modelos.
Retrofit de disjuntores, contatores e chaves seccionadoras.
Tecnologia e Desenvolvimento para melhorias de segurança e soluções técnicas para aperfeiçoamento do desempenho funcional dos equipamentos. Automatização de disjuntores e subestações possibilitando a operação de comando e controle a distância.
Ensaios com instrumentos periodicamente calibrados para realização dos testes elétricos e operacionais gerando confiabilidade funcional dos equipamentos.
Recondicionamento e rejuvenescimento de disjuntores, contatores e chaves seccionadoras, nacionalização e modernização.
Soluções para Gás SF6.
Desenvolvimento de peças e materiais para modernizar equipamentos antigos ou fora de linha.
Disjuntores e contatores para empréstimo.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Strike Brasil
Description:
Em 2011 nasceu a STRIKE BRASIL, na cidade de Ponta Porã-MS, baseada em uma humilde ideia de fornecer peças exclusivas que não estavam disponíveis no Brasil para personalização de camionetes. Rapidamente a ideia se tornou realidade, e a empresa passou a ser referência no mercado, uma vez que as personalizações eram realmente únicas no país (e no mundo!).

Em seguida, em 2013, a STRIKE BRASIL começou a abranger outros nichos que estavam diretamente conectados à concepção inicial: em menos de um ano viramos referência no país em performance; não só de camionetes mas de todos os veículos e maquinários, dos populares até superesportivos; dos caminhões aos tratores. Nosso software de injeção eletrônica tem uma qualidade indiscutível, contando com diversos engenheiros da Inglaterra e Alemanha desenvolvendo softwares de primeira linha para nossos clientes.

Também pioneiros com nossas unidades móveis, já atendemos clientes de norte a sul do Brasil. Já contamos com dezenas de pontos de revenda e aplicação de nossos serviços e produtos espalhados no país e com a primeira unidade internacional já em funcionamento!

Em 2015 desenvolvemos nossos kits de suspensão, sempre visando a melhor qualidade possível de produtos para nossos clientes. Com o melhor custo benefício, agora atendemos a vasta maioria de picapes médias e pequenas do mercado!

Com essa filosofia -de ser os primeiros no Brasil-, a empresa cresceu, e hoje conta com mais de uma dúzia de filiais e autorizados espalhados Brasil afora. E assim seguimos: com a meta de continuar sendo os pioneiros no Brasil -e agora América Latina- com qualidade indiscutível!

Name: fettle
Description:
Fettle is the UK's most progressive bike repair network, offering hassle free servicing and complete peace of mind for riders of all types. Committed to reinventing bike repair, Fettle uniquely brings together old school expertise with modern service expectations to offer best in class service. 

The bike.

What a thing.

An escape. A ticket. A punishment. A thrill.

Whatever the question, riding is usually the answer.

Freedom. Free travel. Fresh air. Fast segments.

We all have different reasons for getting in the saddle. But we’re all united by the same feelings when we get off again; rejuvenated, healthy, positive, proud.

Sure, some complain of busy roads, bad weather, a sore bum, but we soon forget. The real pain in the backside is when you can’t ride. You’re injured. Too busy. Too locked-down.

Having a bike that doesn’t work? A bike that doesn’t perform as it should? That’s a different type of frustration. A hassle that usually gets worse before it gets better.

That’s because getting your bike back on the road is fraught with pitfalls the size of London potholes.

Poor availability
Intimidating terminology.
Confusing options
Bill shock.

E-commerce is the biggest technical revolution since the wheel was invented. And yet the bike service business is still stubbornly stuck in the dark ages.

We’re here to sort this out. And we’ve got the bit between our teeth.

We’re going to blend old school expertise with modern service expectations. Oily rags with tech-led innovation.

Bricks & mortar with push notifications.

No one raves about average. Which is why we’ve built a business our around you.

To put the cyclist first.

To keep London’s riders, riding.

Description:
Certified Automotive Parts Association (CAPA) is an independent, nonprofit organization established in 1987 to protect consumers and the collision repair industry by setting trusted standards for automotive replacement parts.

CAPA exists solely in the public interest. We do not manufacture, sell, or distribute parts—and we have no financial stake in which parts pass or fail certification. Our role is to provide independent, unbiased verification of quality, safety, and performance.

Through rigorous, transparent testing, CAPA Certification helps consumers, auto body shops, parts distributors, insurers, and regulators identify replacement parts that fit properly, perform reliably, last over time, and meet safety expectations comparable to original equipment. Appearance, branding, or visual inspection alone cannot determine whether a part will truly perform as intended.

To date, more than 190 million replacement parts have earned CAPA Certification, making it one of the most widely respected quality assurance programs in the automotive aftermarket. CAPA Certification is also recognized by government and regulatory agencies as an assurance of quality.

Every CAPA Certified part carries the distinctive blue and yellow CAPA Quality Seal, which appears only on parts that meet or exceed CAPA Standards.
No seal. No certification.

________________________________________


Vision
To be the most trusted industry standard for quality automotive replacement parts and services that protect consumers.

Mission
To ensure consumers have access to high-quality automotive replacement parts and services by identifying safe, sustainable options at competitive prices.

Name: Donnezvotrevoiture.org
Description:
En France, 1 personne sur 4 fait face à une situation de précarité mobilité, un frein majeur à l’insertion professionnelle et sociale. 

Donnezvotrevoiture.org s’engage à répondre à cet enjeu en proposant une solution simple et accessible pour donner une seconde vie solidaire aux véhicules inutilisés.

Fruit du partenariat entre Roole et Solidarauto, ce dispositif permet aux véhicules donnés de devenir des leviers de mobilité et d’autonomie pour des personnes en recherche d’emploi. 

Chaque voiture est remise en état par un garage solidaire avant d'être vendue ou louée à tarif solidaire à des personnes en situation de vulnérabilité économique et sociale. 

Notre mission : encourager des actions concrètes au service de la mobilité et de l’inclusion sociale, aux côtés de garages solidaires en région pour offrir de nouvelles perspectives à ceux qui en ont besoin.

Description:
Introduction:
Rock Mechanical Services was formed to bring the true meaning of service back to the industry. At RMS, we understand that press breakdowns mean lost production and lost profits.  Our specialists are on call to offer everything from troubleshooting and minor repairs to complete rebuilds. We also perform turnkey installations and provide detailed inspections.
RMS keeps current with innovations and skills in the industry.  Our machine shop and other mechanical divisions provide a deep resourced background for any project.
 
Gearbox Repair:
RMS service all models, types and brands of machinery. We understand that when your equipment is down, you need it in service as soon as possible.
RMS will repair your equipment on location if at all possible.
All jobs are of equal importance to RMS, regardless of the size or nature of the job. Whether it is a simple adjustment, minor repair, complete rebuild, or anything between.
RMS will perform maintenance, repair, upkeep and partial rebuilds that are more common than the need for a total rebuild. This may include simple adjustments, replacement parts, repairing, reconditioning, rebuilding, manufacturing of new parts or even the re-engineering.

Field Service/Inspections:
RMS has highly skilled Field Service Technicians who are experts in inspection, maintenance, repair and installation of wide varieties of equipment. Years of field experience allow RMS to inspect, troubleshoot and supervise repairs for all styles of equipment. 
RMS will supply information regarding the condition of your press so that you can accurately predict wear and premature failure of various systems and components. Combined with a preventive maintenance program, inspection of your equipment will help eliminate downtime and track the progression of wear.
RMS can tailor an inspection program to fit your needs.
RMS offer fast efficient service to reduce costly downtime.

Today, our casks reach well over 100 years of age while adding significant value to the maturation process of spirits.

Description:
NESTcoat makes sure metal products everywhere have a strong and esthetic coating. We repair powdercoatings, anodised aluminium and zinc layers on site.  For this specialized purpose we travel through all over the world. Because wherever there's metal, there's NESTcoat. 

Our specialism has lead to powerful partnerships where we contributed to inspiring projects like the art depot Boijmans van Beuningen, the new sorting center for Amazon in Germany, as well as the new Tesla Gigafactory near Berlin and the Ferrari karting track on cruise ship the Norwegian Joy. 

On a daily base we have more than 60 people contributing to to the goals of our clients. Our ambition keeps us growing. With our goal being to help our clients better every day. 

We visit everywhere on site to help with:
- Repairing coating and zinc layers as a result of assembly damage, scratches, dents, corrosion, weathering of colour or use of a wrong RAL colour.
- periodical maintenance and the cleaning of coated products. 
 
A fitting metal preservation system together with attention for maintenance creates a longer lifespan for the metal product. If we are all conscious of this we can look at a future that doesn't just look pretty, but is also sustainable.  

You can reach us via info@nestcoat.nl or by phone with +31 (0)50 30 51 690. Or use our website: www.nestcoat.nl/en.

Our Commitment to Quality
At Stonewall Collision & Auto Paint, quality is at the heart of everything we do. With years of experience and a dedicated team of experts, we ensure every vehicle receives meticulous care. Name: Excite Auto Repair & Towing
Description: At Excite Auto Repair and Towing, we get it – auto maintenance and repair are about as thrilling as watching paint dry. But hey, we're here to change that. We're on a mission to make the process as easy and enjoyable as possible because we genuinely care about you, your car, and your experience. From engine repairs to collisions, we're your one-stop shop for all things automotive. Oh, and did we mention we offer discounted towing services? We're all about quality and value, so bring your car in today and experience our commitment firsthand. We may not be related, but you'll feel like we're family. Name: Concierge Claims Management
Description:
Concierge Claims Management is committed to providing an exceptional and tailored replacement vehicle hire service to clients and business partners alike, following a non-fault accident.

Our experienced team at Concierge specialise in providing clients with an equivalent hire vehicle to suit their needs where required following a non-fault accident whilst their vehicle is off the road. Concierge have access to a wide range of vehicles including Prestige, Sports, Electric and PCO licenced chauffeuring vehicles which can be delivered to you at your preferred time and location. If your vehicle is no longer fit for purpose following the collision, we can supply a replacement hire vehicle as a matter of urgency to ensure you can continue your day to day business with minimal impact.

The concierge style of service we provide enables you to continue with your day to day business, without the concern of dealing with numerous parties. Leave this to the experts and rest assured your dedicated Concierge Claims handler will take care of the whole process on your behalf freeing up your valuable time.

If you have an enquiry please do not hesitate to get in touch:

- Email: enquiries@ccm.uk.com 
- Phone: 0333 772 0399

Name: CARBOVAPT
Description:
A CarboVapt é especialista em manutenção preventiva inteligente por meio da descarbonização de motores a combustão. Desde 2019, oferecemos ao mercado uma tecnologia exclusiva de descarbonização de motores que atua diretamente na câmara de combustão, recuperando desempenho e evitando falhas precoces.

Nosso processo é rápido, seguro e comprovado: em até 1 hora, sem desmontar o motor, reduzimos resíduos que comprometem a combustão, gerando economia de combustível, retomada de potência e menor desgaste de componentes. O resultado é a redução de manutenções corretivas e maior disponibilidade da frota.

Além da eficiência operacional, a CarboVapt entrega impacto ambiental mensurável. Cada aplicação contribui para a diminuição das emissões de CO₂ e apoia empresas no cumprimento de suas metas de sustentabilidade e agenda ESG.

Com presença em  11 estados e em expansão nacional, a CarboVapt é hoje referência em soluções que unem produtividade, economia e redução efetiva de emissões, um novo padrão para a performance limpa no transporte e na indústria.

A Fepan Construções e Serviços é uma empresa do setor de construção e manutenção, oferecendo soluções abrangentes para seus clientes residenciais e comerciais. Com uma equipe altamente qualificada e experiência comprovada, nossa empresa é especializada em uma ampla gama de serviços para atender às necessidades individuais de cada cliente.

Nossos serviços incluem:

1. Construção Financiada: Proporcionamos a possibilidade de realizar o sonho da construção própria, oferecendo opções de financiamento acessíveis e personalizadas. Nossa equipe cuidará de todas as etapas do projeto, desde o planejamento até a conclusão, garantindo que tudo seja feito com qualidade e dentro do prazo estabelecido.

Trabalhamos em estreita colaboração com os clientes para compreender suas necessidades e visões, e então fornecemos soluções criativas e eficientes para renovar e melhorar qualquer ambiente.

3. Manutenção Preventiva e Corretiva: Reconhecemos a importância da manutenção regular para garantir o bom funcionamento e a durabilidade de imóveis residenciais e comerciais. Nossa equipe oferece serviços abrangentes de manutenção preventiva e corretiva, identificando e resolvendo problemas antes que se tornem mais graves, evitando custos adicionais e interrupções indesejadas.

4. Todos os Tipos de Manutenção: Seja para casas, empresas ou comércios, a Fepan Construções e Serviços está pronta para fornecer soluções de manutenção para qualquer tipo de propriedade. Desde reparos elétricos e hidráulicos até serviços de pintura e carpintaria, nossa equipe está equipada para lidar com todos os aspectos da manutenção, garantindo que sua propriedade esteja sempre em excelente estado.

Na Fepan, nos dedicamos a superar as expectativas de nossos clientes, entregando serviços de alta qualidade, confiabilidade e excelência.

Name: Service Box

Service Box – The UK’s Fastest-Growing After-sales Partner

Service Box is trusted by consumers and leading global brands to keep appliances running and customers happy. We’ve already protected and serviced over 300,000 appliances and boilers across the UK, working directly with major manufacturers, distributors, and retailers.

But we’re more than a repair company. Service Box provides end-to-end aftersales solutions:

 Fast, reliable repairs nationwide.

 Product registration platforms & QR stickers that increase engagement.
 Extended warranty and service plans with unlimited repairs, new-for-old replacement, and no hidden fees.

For consumers, we offer peace of mind, competitive pricing, and trusted support backed by thousands of positive reviews and an Excellent Trustpilot rating.
For our partners, we act as a complete after-sales provider – managing registrations, call centre services, repairs, logistics, and customer support on their behalf – helping brands strengthen loyalty, improve customer experience, and extend their reach in the UK market.

Whether you’re a consumer looking for quick, stress-free cover or a business seeking a trusted UK aftersales partner, Service Box delivers repairs, protection, and support, all under one roof.

Name: DAR AL BALAD CONTRACTING AND OPERATIONS
Description:
ADDAR GROUP was established as an industrial services Saudi company in 1999 by H.E. Dr. Ibrahim A. Ibn Salamah after his retirement from SABIC as vice-chairman. In a very short time frame the group became one of the leading IT service companies of the Kingdom and an active industrial spare parts supplier. In 2003 the group established Addar shareholder Management Department using ADDAR Shareholder Management System with a team of experienced business consultants to support shares services for shareholders companies in the Saudi market.
The group also expanded its activities and services in other business sectors including Steel, Cement, Petrochemicals & Chemicals, Oil & Gas and Power Generation. Its industrial services specialize in supply of chemical additives and raw materials, general electro-mechanical items, spare parts of rotating equipments, reverse engineering of parts and the technology for gas turbine intake/exhaust system and spare part for heavy equipment machines and traction Batteries. For meeting such requirement the group is associated with several international companies of North America, Europe and Asia. Realizing the strong industry requirement for the service center of rotating equipments.
The group is planning to build a world class service center in the Kingdom which will be equipped with the most advanced and state of art equipments for turbine repair/overhaul and maintenance, and run by specialist of international repute. Today ADDAR GROUP comprises of 6 establishments and companies and has over 500 professionals who are contributing in IT , Industrial, and commercial sectors.

Huoltamaton kiinteistö on pahimmillaan terveysriski. Lisäksi arvon säilyttämisen kannalta huoltaminen on välttämätöntä.

Yrittäjä Juha Hyväri on ollut  kiinteistöjen ulkoisien kosteudenhallinnan ratkaisujen kärkitoimijalla liiketoimintajohdossa viimeiset 15 vuotta. Lisäksi hän on ollut kahdessa huoltoalan yhtiössä vaikuttajana taustalla. Huomattuaan että myös katto-,ränni- ja salaojapuolella pienemmille huoltotöille on tarvetta hän perusti yhdessä kumppaniensa kanssa Serlin Oy:n.

En un momento de tanta incertidumbre como el actual, en el que tantas cosas están cambiando, es importante pararse para analizar hacia dónde vamos... Eso es lo que pretende EFIAUTO: ser una iniciativa que promueva las buenas prácticas que aporten las claves para conseguir encaminar a los negocios del sector hacia un futuro más sostenible y eficiente. 

Si eres un taller de carrocería, este es tu evento.

Name: Barrela Pneus
Description:

Além da sede em Rio Preto, o grupo também é composto por mais um auto-center em Mirassol, uma indústria de recauchutagem de pneus e um centro de distribuição, ambas na cidade de Bady Bassitt. Ao todo, são mais de 100 colaboradores treinados, diretos e indiretos, garantindo a excelência dos produtos e serviços que a Barrela oferece.
 
Em 2010, as lojas tornaram-se revendas autorizadas Michelin, e desde então comercializam com exclusividade todos os pneus do grupo Michelin, composto pelas marcas BFGoodrich, Levorin e Camso.

Além de oferecer serviços como alinhamento, balanceamento, troca de óleo, desempeno de rodas e substituição de peças de suspensão, freio e amortecedores, o Grupo Barrela se destaca como um dos principais comerciantes de pneus da região.

Em 2022, a filial de Rio Preto tornou-se um Car Service Michelin, uma loja modelo que oferece o mais alto nível de serviços, atendimento e uma experiência exclusiva.
 
Com uma equipe especializada e equipamentos novos com tecnologia de ponta, um dos serviços de destaque é o Alinhamento Total. Na realização do serviço, o veículo passa por uma análise completa em 3D, e um dos grandes diferenciais é a garantia de que o cliente nunca terá surpresas na conta, pois tudo que tiver que ser feito (caster, cambagem e alinhamento traseiro) será realizado gratuitamente.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Nuestra experiencia se extiende a la asistencia en pista, donde proporcionamos un soporte técnico eficiente y dedicado para garantizar el óptimo rendimiento de los vehículos durante las competiciones. Además, nos enorgullece ofrecer servicios de formación en mecánica de competición, tanto en modalidad online como presencial, contribuyendo al desarrollo de profesionales altamente capacitados en el mundo del motorsport.

Además de nuestra dedicación a la excelencia técnica, brindamos servicios de asesoría técnica en motorsport, donde nuestros expertos proporcionan conocimientos especializados para optimizar el rendimiento de los vehículos y mejorar la eficiencia operativa de los equipos. La gestión integral de equipos es otra de nuestras fortalezas, asegurando una coordinación eficaz y una ejecución sin contratiempos durante las competiciones.

Como parte de nuestra visión de contribuir al crecimiento y la promoción del motorsport, nos especializamos en el diseño, distribución y venta de nuestros propios productos específicos para el cuidado y lubricación para automoción

Guru motors srl è costituita da multipli dipartimenti che collaborano tra loro allo scopo di fornire servizi di manutenzione dei Autoveicoli. Come reparto meccanico,
officina di carrozzeria, reparto pneumatici, reparto riparazione elettronica e meccanica ECU. Siamo orgogliosi di offrire una vasta gamma di meccanici esperti servizi per mantenere il tuo veicolo in perfetta efficienza. I nostri tecnici qualificati si impegnano a fornire un'assistenza di prim'ordine la tua auto, garantendo prestazioni e affidabilità ottimali. Il nostro ambito di lavoro meccanico include il periodico completo servizio alle piccole riparazioni particolari:
1. Diagnostica e riparazione del motore:
Analisi approfondita delle prestazioni del motore.
Identificazione e risoluzione delle problematiche che influiscono sull'efficienza. In particolare la possibilità di aprire il passaggio benzina/diesel motori, sostituire le parti danneggiate e richiudere autonomamente.
2. Manutenzione del sistema frenante:
Ispezione e sostituzione delle pastiglie e dei rotori dei freni. Controlli e modifiche del liquido dei freni.
3. Servizi di sospensione e sterzo:
Valutazione dell'usura dei componenti delle sospensioni.
Servizi di allineamento per migliorare la manovrabilità e la longevità degli pneumatici.
4. Servizi di trasmissione:
Controlli e sostituzioni dell'olio della trasmissione.
5. Riparazioni del sistema di scarico:
Rilevazione e riparazione di perdite di scarico.
Sostituzione marmitte, catalizzatori e tubi di scarico.
6. Controlli e modifiche dei fluidi:
Ispezione e rifornimento regolari dei fluidi essenziali (olio, liquido di raffreddamento, liquido del servosterzo, ecc.).
7. Riparazioni di impianti di climatizzazione e riscaldamento:
Diagnosi e riparazione di problemi relativi all'impianto di climatizzazione e riscaldamento compresa la ricarica del refrigerante.
8. Diagnosi e riparazione dell'impianto elettrico:
Risoluzione dei problemi e riparazione di problemi elettrici.
9. Servizi per pneumatic

Name: Bouwman Groep
Description:
De Bouwman Groep is een internationaal opererend bedrijf dat gespecialiseerd is in alle aspecten van koel- en vriesmeubelen, opgericht in 1980. Wij hebben alle middelen, faciliteiten en gespecialiseerde kennis in huis om te voldoen aan uiteenlopende behoeften op het gebied van koel- en vriesmeubelen. De Bouwman Groep bestaat uit een groep van acht bedrijfsonderdelen, elk gericht op een ander deel van de koeltechnische waardeketen, waardoor wij een totaalleverancier en specialist zijn op dit gebied.

De locatie in Harderwijk beschikt over 30.000 m² opslagruimte, werkplaatsen, productie/assemblage en een logistiek centrum. Wij werken met ca. 100 vakkundige professionals. 

Wij bieden:
• Refurbishen van koel- en vriesmeubelen + toevoegen van energiebesparende maatregelen om een bijdrage te leveren aan een circulaire economie (de producten van nu, zijn de toekomst voor later) en herinzet van gebruikte onderdelen. 
• Demonteren/plaatsen/Prefab/refurbishen en turn-key projecten uitvoeren en begeleiden op het gebied van koel- en vriesmeubelen techniek. 
• Warehousing van koel- en vriesmeubelen die doormiddel van een geautomatiseerd beheersysteem.  
• Realiseren van 95% hergebruiken of recyclen van grondstoffen volgens de nieuwste wetgeving en certificering (circulaire economie)
• Full-service verhuurbedrijf in professionele en bedrijfskoelingen.
• Verhuur en verkoop van stekkerklare koel- en vriesmeubelen ten behoeve van nationale en internationale beurzen, inclusief 24-uurs service. 
• Clear Vision energiebesparende 100% circulaire kunststof deuroplossingen
• Deursystemen voor wandkoelingen (uit eigen productiefaciliteit), nieuwste LED-technologie en custom made LED-oplossingen voor versproducten dankzij eigen ontwerp- en ontwikkelingsafdeling. 
• Custom made LED-oplossingen voor versproducten.
• Levering door heel Europa, ook voor derden, verzorgd door onze eigen transportafdeling. 
• STEK/BRL100 en ISO45001 gecertificeerd.

Ogni tipo di riparazione è facilmente prenotabile sul nostro sito, tramite la compilazione di un semplice form, in meno di 5 minuti.
Vendiamo tutti i modelli di iPhone nuovi e usati o ricondizionati, tutti i modelli di Samsung nuovi e usati e moltissimi modelli di altre marche come Xiaomi, Oneplus, Sony e Oppo!
Forniamo protezione a tutti i dispositivi attraverso la vendita di cover e pellicole protettive, per ridurre al minimo il rischio di rottura!

Description:
Established in 2008, eTrac is a leading specialist in the testing and repair of railway traction and control electronics.

Dedicated to delivering high-quality solutions, we build strong partnerships and have become a preferred supplier for train operators, maintenance depots and manufacturers.

We have efficient test and repair processes for all types of module, from small I/O devices to large traction converters. We are able to offer a fast turnaround of high quality repairs planned according to the customer's need for train availability. We design our bespoke tests and repairs to ensure overall train reliability.

Our purpose-built industrial workshop, test lab and offices give us the scope to test and overhaul electrical/electronic components of the complete traction system.

Description:
At Estimate Solutions Ltd, we’re more than just independent vehicle damage assessors — we’re trusted partners to repairers and insurers, delivering clarity, compliance, and confidence with every estimate.

Founded by Andrew Hill VDA MIMI, with over 38 years of industry experience, we have supported independent repairers for more than 20 years. With a team that combines over 60 years of expertise, we’ve created more than 30,000 estimates and helped 1,000+ repairers strengthen their businesses.

Our mission is simple: to support independent repairers and insurers, reduce hassle, restore trust, and create a fair, profitable industry for all. We act as mediators, sense-checkers, and problem-solvers, bridging the gap between insurers and repairers.

Our services include:

Audatex Estimates for repairers without direct access.

Holiday, sickness, and staff cover for Audatex users.

Estimate reports for other VDA companies without subscriptions.

Non-Fault Accident Claims support, linking repairers to third-party insurers for faster authority.

At Estimate Solutions, we understand the challenges repairers face — because we’ve lived them. That’s why we’re committed to protecting profits, ensuring fairness, and creating partnerships that last.

Partnering with Repairers. Protecting Profits.
