Name: Flux- Maintenance & Operations
Description:
At Flux - Maintenance & Operation Est., we pride ourselves on being the trusted partner for industrial motor maintenance, repair, and rewinding services across the GCC region, specifically focusing on medium and high voltage static and rotating equipment. Whether it's transformers, motors, or generators, we deliver precision-engineered solutions that maximize uptime and efficiency.

What Sets Us Apart?

Innovation Meets Tradition: At Flux, we combine time-tested techniques with the latest advancements in motor technology to deliver state-of-the-art solutions. Our team is highly skilled in using modern tools and methodologies to ensure the highest quality of service.

Precision at Every Step: From motor diagnostics to rewinding and repairs, we offer a range of services tailored to meet the unique needs of your equipment. We understand that every motor is different, and we adapt our approach to ensure your motor is optimized for peak performance.

Quality and Expertise: Equipped with advanced machinery and a team of experienced technicians, we ensure that all our services meet the highest industry standards. With every service, we aim to reduce downtime, improve efficiency, and extend the lifespan of your valuable assets.

Why Choose Flux?

Customized Solutions: Whether it’s transformers, motors, or generators, we offer specialized solutions designed to improve the performance and reliability of your equipment.

24/7 Availability: We understand that downtime is costly. That’s why we’re available round-the-clock to provide fast, reliable services to minimize your production interruptions.

Safety and Compliance: We adhere to the most rigorous safety standards to ensure your equipment is not only in top working condition but also fully compliant with the latest industry regulations.

At Flux, we’re your dedicated partner in maintaining the heart of your operations – your motors and electrical equipment. Contact us today for a consultation.

Name: EMSCO, Inc.
Description:
Since 1977, EMSCO has been the melting industry’s first responder — ready to dispatch mechanics, engineers, and account managers 24/7 to keep your foundry up and you in business. Founded on the philosophy that customers choose suppliers who understand their needs and quality induction furnace service and repair. EMSCO responds quickly to any crisis from our facilities in Massillon, Ohio; Anniston, Alabama; Pico Rivera, California and Rancocas, New Jersey. We get the job done right and without delay.

EMSCO services and installs induction melting equipment produced by any OEM. From repairing/rebuilding induction furnaces and coils to complete melt deck design and construction, EMSCO has generations of experience servicing foundry equipment in almost every scenario imaginable, including open-atmosphere and vacuum applications.

EMSCO has a core expertise in the engineering, manufacturing, sales and installation of process cooling equipment for induction-based facilities and other industrial applications. Along with conventional cooling appliances, EMSCO is the exclusive manufacturer and provider of HyprCool Hybrid Process Cooling Systems.

With an outstanding reputation built from decades of customer satisfaction, we offer a myriad of services and systems critical to optimizing the best foundries of today and tomorrow.

2004 yılından bu yana CNF Mühendislik, endüstriyel pompa sistemleri bakım, onarım, servis ve taahhüt hizmetlerinde uzmanlaşmış bir mühendislik firmasıdır. Bursa merkezli olan şirketimiz, Kocaeli ve çevresinde de güçlü operasyon ağıyla faaliyet göstermektedir.

Santrifüj, dalgıç, hidrofor pompalar ve elektrik motorları için bakım & onarım

Tersine mühendislik ile üretimi durdurulmuş parçaların yeniden tasarımı

Kamu ve sanayi kuruluşlarına uzun vadeli bakım taahhütleri

Yetkili servis hizmeti: Standart Pompa ve Flygt Pompa

Güçlü Yanlarımız

20 yılı aşkın teknik deneyim ve uzman kadro

7/24 acil müdahale ve hızlı servis desteği

Orijinal / onaylı yedek parça temini ve geniş marka portföyü (Xylem, Grundfos, Wilo, KSB, Alarko vb.)

Şeffaf süreç yönetimi, raporlama ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşım

Misyonumuz, işletmelerin pompa sistemlerini verimli, güvenli ve sürdürülebilir şekilde çalışır halde tutmak; vizyonumuz ise Türkiye’nin en donanımlı endüstriyel pompa bakım-onarım merkezi olmak ve sektörde yenilikçi standartlar belirleyen lider marka haline gelmektir.

CNF Mühendislik, “doğru teşhis, kaliteli işçilik ve güvenilir hizmet” anlayışıyla işletmelere değer katmaya devam ediyor.

Name: Driver Center - Red de talleres
Description:
DRIVER CENTER es la red de centros especializados en neumáticos y servicios de mecánica rápida dirigidos a todo tipo de vehículos. Nuestros objetivos son velar, de forma profesional y competente, por la seguridad de los clientes y de sus familias, y ofrecer productos y servicios de máxima calidad, siempre con una atención personalizada. 

En España el grupo Driver Center se creó en 1994 con el propósito de formar una red de centros de reparación especializados en neumáticos. Después de un lustro de experiencia en el sector, el grupo reforzó su posicionamiento con la incorporación de Pirelli como socio mayoritario. 

Desde ese momento, y con el apoyo de esta marca, de reconocimiento mundial, Driver Center se ha convertido en un grupo de referencia en el sector, con más de 130 socios y más de 160 puntos de venta en España y alrededor de 900 talleres distribuidos en diversos países de la Unión Europea. 

Un grupo que ha sabido mantener los ideales que dieron origen a su creación: independencia, calidad de servicio y trato personalizado, y que se ha adaptado a las exigencias de los mercados internacionales con eficiencia, rentabilidad y calidad. 

Nuestro modelo de negocio proporciona a nuestros socios una respuesta competitiva y de éxito seguro, y garantiza a nuestros clientes los más altos estándares de calidad, manteniendo un constante espíritu de desarrollo, innovación y visión de futuro.
 
Los Socios de DRIVER, excelentes profesionales seleccionados por su liderazgo en su zona de influencia, constituyen el principal activo del grupo. Son profesionales independientes y altamente cualificados, con la vocación de proporcionar el mejor servicio al usuario, estando en primera fila en la gestión de sus negocios para responder con la mayor calidad de servicio a los Clientes de Driver.

Name: Tech Drive Solutions
Description:
Siamo un’azienda Bolognese affermata sull’assistenza e formazione, fulcro da cui si espande una conoscenza fondamentale degli strumenti e del funzionamento dei carrelli elevatori.

La filosofia dell’azienda è quella di affiancare l’officina e il tecnico riparatore nell’approccio e nella comprensione oltre che nella risoluzione, di tutte le problematiche relative al malfunzionamento della scheda o dell’impianto elettronico. 

Questo ha fatto sì che la migliore gestione del problema risieda nello studio della macchina stessa e di un suo costante approfondimento, affiancato, ad un’analisi dei nuovi sistemi di diagnostica di ultima generazione.

Sulla base di questo abbiamo cercato di invitare i tecnici ad approfondire la conoscenza delle macchine e dei loro strumenti di diagnostica nonché della strumentazione elettronica in generale. La grande richiesta di apprendimento ha fatto nascere il nostro servizio di formazione unico in Italia, che oggi propone corsi presso la nostra sede e che dà la possibilità, inoltre, di personalizzare questi ultimi in base all’esigenza del richiedente.

Name: Pneu Egger
Description:
Pneu Egger ist mit seinen Filialen an über 40 Standorten in der ganzen Schweiz vertreten und hat heute seinen Sitz in Aarau. Mit rund 400 qualifizierten Mitarbeitern, davon über 40 Auszubildende), einem Umsatz gegen 100 Millionen Franken und jährlich über 300'000 verkauften Reifen ist Pneu Egger das führende Unternehmen mit Schweizer Reifenhandel.

Nebst den umfassenden Dienstleistungen rund ums Rad bietet Pneu Egger heute einen hochwertigen Autoservice für alle Marken an und etabliert sich damit als kompetenter Ansprechpartner für sämtliche Fragen rund um das Fahrzeug. Wir garantieren höchste Servicequalität und halten uns genau an die Vorgaben der Fahrzeughersteller. Damit profitieren Sie vom kompletten Erhalt der Fahrzeug-Herstellergarantie – ohne Einschränkungen. 

Bei Firmenkunden gilt Pneu Egger seit vielen Jahren als erste Adresse. Mit über 30% Marktanteil nehmen wir auch bei den Nutzfahrzeugen eine schweizweit dominierende Stellung ein. Das eigene Neugummierungswerk in Aarau wurde bereits 1962 als erstes seiner Art von Pneu Egger eröffnet. Heute, mit einem jährlichen Volumen von rund 35'000 runderneuerten Reifen für LKW, Bus oder Baumaschinen, ist Pneu Egger nach wie vor der führende Schweizer Anbieter bei der Runderneuerung.

In allen Geschäftsbereichen hat die Qualität seit je her eine zentrale Bedeutung. Mit dem Resultat, dass wir als erstes Unternehmen aus der Reifenbranche, nach ISO 9001 sowie ISO 14001 für Umweltmanagementsysteme und 45001 für Arbeitssicherheit und Gesundheitsschutz zertifiziert sind.

Name: Dryer Vent Wizard of SE Saratoga and NE Schenectady
Description:
Over time, lint and debris accumulate in dryer vents and cause clogs that can lead to a number of dryer vent problems including decreased efficiency. When airflow in a dryer vent is restricted due to clogs, there is an increased risk of fire, carbon monoxide poisoning, wasted energy and time, and excessive wear to clothing, among other negative effects. There are over 15,500 dryer fires each year, and many could have been easily prevented by professional dryer vent cleaning. Dryer Vent Wizard of SE Saratoga & NE Schenectady’s skilled and experienced technicians provide thorough dryer vent cleaning to combat lint accumulation and hazardous clogs.

In addition to our comprehensive cleaning, we offer a selection of other dryer vent services to increase safety and efficiency in your laundry area. Ensuring that the proper materials and vent configuration are implemented during your dryer vent installation can save you time, money, and energy in the long run. After installation, through regular dryer vent inspections, maintenance, and cleaning, our dryer vent technicians assure that your system is always up to code, operating safely, and running as efficiently as possible. From installing your dryer vent system to performing inspections and repairs, Dryer Vent Wizard of SE Saratoga & NE Schenectady has you covered!

Name: Williams Norwalk Tire & Alignment
Description:
Some of you may remember the days of working on your own vehicle.  Now you may open the hood and say "where do I begin?"  It is packed in tight with many components that the cars of the 60s and 70s never had.  

But that is why you can depend on our team.  We are do this every day.  There is a good chance that the issue you are having with your vehicle is something we have diagnosed before.   

Here is a little history:  
Jim did not have the money to repair his 67 GTO – so he learned to work on it.  He worked in several gas stations, Foster Chevrolet, Bill Beatty Chevrolet & Dorr Chevrolet before opening our business.   

Williams Auto Repair & Classic Restoration started in our home garage in May, 1988.  Jim enjoyed when the door between the garage & house would open with a quick “hi daddy”!  

When we outgrew our home garage, we put up a building East of Norwalk on Route 20.  Vicki continued to work at GTE while helping behind the scenes.  

In 1994, we moved to our present location at Cleveland Rd in Norwalk.  Vicki was laid off from GTE.  Our son Keifer joined the team in 2007.  

Yes – we are family owned AND operated.  

We run our shop with honor and integrity.  Our current team works well together.  Each employee has a minimum of 15 years of automotive experience.  

Today’s vehicles require the experience & knowledge of professional technicians.

When experience counts, call 419-668-3071!

Name: IP Canoas
Description:
A partir de Fevereiro de 2024 a IP Canoas Concessionária de Iluminação Pública S.A., sociedade de propósito específico, se tornou a responsável pela manutenção e modernização da iluminação pública de Canoas até o ano de 2048. Qualidade na prestação de serviço, transparência, eficiência, ética, inovação e sustentabilidade são premissas que embasam a operação da empresa.
 

Nossa credibilidade e solidez é resultado da união de sete empresas com décadas de experiência e centenas de obras e projetos executados em todo o Brasil. A Concessionária IP Canoas tem o compromisso de tornar Canoas uma cidade energeticamente inteligente, mais iluminada, moderna e segura.

Description:
You can book a weekend stay in a cabin across the country with two clicks. You can order a new TV at 6 pm and receive it the next day. You can catch a ride wherever you need to go with just one click. 

Now think about getting an oil change, new tires, a car detail, even pumping your gas. It feels like a lot of wasted time, doesn’t it? In a world full of convenience, why do you still have to spend so much time and money maintaining your car?

We started Vohnt by asking ourselves - why can’t car care be better? Our mission is to create a world where you have immediate, convenient, and affordable access to car care so that you can just enjoy the ride.

When you use Vohnt, the only thing you have to worry about is where you’re going and who you’re with.
At Vohnt we have 3 core pillars that we abide by: 

1. Quality at the right price

The consumer should not have to pay for the industries’ inefficiencies. 

2. Redefined convenience 

You should not have to sacrifice hours out of your day without a car for it to be cleaned.  With our model, a touch of a button allows you to get your car cleaned on its time, not yours.

3. Environmentally responsible 

Convenience doesn’t have to come at a high cost to you or the environment. We care about you, your car, and the places you’re driving. We refuse to sacrifice any one of those things for more profit margin.

Vohnt is embarking on a journey to redefine the Carcare industry, and we want you to join us for the ride.

Daarnaast zijn alle vestigingen van Eurorepar Car Service in handen van lokale ondernemers die betrokken zijn bij uw samenleving; een vertrouwde garage dus voor iedereen, waar u een eerlijk advies op basis van úw budget mag verwachten, ongeacht hoe oud, of van welk merk uw auto is.

Voordelig

Eurorepar Car Service garages bieden de beste prijs/kwaliteits-verhouding voor alle reguliere services zoals APK, reparatie en onderhoud, waarbij uiteraard de richtlijnen van de fabrikant worden gevolgd.Voor Eurorepar onderdelen geldt er twee jaar garantie op de onderdelen en montage; deze onderdelen voldoen aan de normen en kwaliteitseisen van de fabrikant.Tevens kunt u tegen een kleine vergoeding gebruik maken van de (inter)nationale mobiliteitsservice van Eurorepar Car Service.

Onze diensten

Is uw auto toe aan een APK? Bij Eurorepar Car Service gebeurt dat door een APK-keurmeester. Wanneer uw auto wordt afgekeurd, kunnen wij direct alle nodige werkzaamheden uitvoeren, en zullen wij uw auto gratis herkeuren.

Heeft u reparatie nodig? Voor Eurorepar-onderdelen geldt er twee jaar garantie op de onderdelen en montage.

Heeft u onderhoud nodig? Eurorepar Car Service dekt alle domeinen: olie verversen, banden, remmen, ophanging,

Name: MJ'S MOBILE FLEET
Description:

With over 30 years of hands-on industry experience, built on multi-generational family knowledge in fuel, transportation, and mechanical trades, we support FBOs, airports, fuel providers, environmental service companies, and transportation fleets by delivering compliance-focused services that keep critical equipment safe, operational, and inspection-ready.

All work is performed post-OEM and post-title on completed vehicles and equipment in accordance with applicable DOT, BIT, CARB, FAA, EPA, and state regulations. MJ’s Mobile Fleet LLC operates as a commercial vehicle outfitter and equipment service provider, performing alterations, repairs, refurbishments, and system integrations, and does not manufacture vehicles or assign VINs.

In addition to mechanical and systems expertise, we provide fuel operations and compliance support, including experience completing terminal, carrier, and vendor documentation required for tanker loading at fuel terminals across multiple states—helping customers avoid delays and maintain regulatory readiness.

Whether on the ramp, at the fuel farm, at the terminal, or in the field, MJ’s Mobile Fleet LLC brings operational knowledge—not just mechanical service—to support mission-critical fuel and fleet operations.

Name: London Auto Haus
Description:
London Auto Haus is part of the Celtic Tuning dealer program which has been operating for over 20 years.  The current economic climate and associated exponential rise in the cost of fossil fuels, has impacted hard on the fleet sector and as a direct consequence has put ever-increasing importance on tackling fuel wastage and fuel management.   
Celtic Tuning is one of the leaders in Electronic Engine Enhancements with a global dealer network and major franchises as far afield as Malaysia, South Korea, and South Africa. Celtic Tuning’s knowledge and expertise have allowed it to reverse engineer engine management software for performance enhancements and has since extended its portfolio of products and developments to specifically target individual market sectors.   
Over the last 13 years, Celtic Tuning has put extensive resources and development into the economy tuning market to levels rivaled by no other.  The goal was purely to improve KM/L as much as possible whilst also taking into consideration the life cycle and maintenance schedules of the vehicle.   Our resulting software has led to the emergence of the London Auto Haus brand and our range of software which we refer to as ‘Eco Re-calibration’.   
London Auto Haus focuses on intelligent engine management software to improve business performance by reducing operational costs and reducing the impact on the environment.    
With our working Specialised workshop, we can offer you a professional all-round service which is bespoke

We offer the following:
•	Fuel Economy Re-calibration
•	Speed Limiter Installation 
•	Rev limiter Installation
•	Engine Diagnostics
•	Basic Vehicle services
•	Engine Rebuilds
•	Performance Remapping
•	Induction System Fabrication
•	Downpipe and Exhaust Fabrication
•	Cat Delete
•	Passenger Vehicle Suspension Upgrades
•	Passenger Vehicle Brake Upgrades (Disks or Pads)
•	Safety Upgrades (Racing Seats, Racing Harnesses, PPE Equipment)

Name: Incharge Company
Description:
INCHARGE Company: Your Trusted Partner in Industrial Maintenance
INCHARGE Company, derived from Saad Ali Alessa for Contracting Co. and a proud subsidiary of Emkan Holding Co. Saudi Arabia, has quickly risen to prominence in the industrial maintenance sector. With our headquarters strategically located at Port Gate in Al-Dammam, we are ideally positioned to serve the diverse needs of manufacturing plants, pipelines, refineries, and other industrial facilities across the region.
At INCHARGE, we specialize in offering a comprehensive suite of maintenance services designed to ensure the smooth and efficient operation of industrial infrastructures. Our expertise spans various critical services, including:
•	Valves Maintenance Services: Ensuring the optimal functionality and longevity of industrial valves.
•	Emergency Repairs and Troubleshooting: Providing rapid response solutions to minimize downtime and operational disruptions.
•	Non-metallic Pipe Wrapping: Enhancing the durability and protection of pipelines.
•	Pipe and Vessel Thermal Insulation & Noise Reduction: Improving energy efficiency and reducing operational noise in industrial settings.
•	Leak Sealing Services: Preventing costly leaks and ensuring the integrity of pipelines and vessels.
•	Pipe Cold Cutting: Precision cutting services for safe and efficient pipeline maintenance.
•	Flange Facing: Restoring flange surfaces to prevent leaks and ensure a tight seal.
•	Bolt Torquing: Ensuring proper bolt tensioning for safe and secure connections.
•	Trading Services: Supplying high-quality industrial components to meet the diverse needs of our clients.
•	At INCHARGE, we are committed to contributing to the growth of the national economy while striving to expand our reach globally in the field of valves and industrial maintenance.

 Nossa empresa é pautada pela ética,transparência e comprometimento, com a satisfação de nossos clientes como foco, buscamos estabelecer realacionamentos de confiança duradouros, oferecendoum serviço confiável, pontual e eficiente.

Name: Arver Lastbilar AB
Description:
Vill du kunna säga ja till nya uppdrag? 

Arver Lastbilar är en av Scanias största privata återförsäljare. Vår affärsidé är att erbjuda den bästa servicen till alla med kommersiella fordon. Det innebär att vi erbjuder helhetslösningar för ett bekvämt och ekonomiskt lastbilsägande med allt från försäljning av lastbilar till service, avtal och reservdelar.

Vår vision är att vara den självklara servicepartnern för alla med kommersiella fordon. Vi vill att man vänder sig till oss i alla avseenden.

Vårt motto är att vi och våra kunder ska alltid kunna säga ja till nya uppdrag.

Våra kärnvärden är:
•	förståelse – genom att förstå kundernas verksamhet och behov kan vi ta fram anpassade lösningar
•	kvalitet – vi strävar alltid efter att leverera rätt kvalitet
•	engagemang – genom vårt personliga engagemang skapar vi förutsättningar för långsiktiga relationer både med våra kunder och med våra egna medarbetare

Vi är ett familjeföretag i fjärde generationen med verksamhet på åtta orter; Karlskoga, Örebro, Västerås, Sala, Eskilstuna, Katrineholm, Nyköping och Norrköping. 2021 hade vi ca 170 anställda och en omsättning på drygt 700 mkr.

Name: Motorrad Theory
Description:
Motorrad Theory is a dynamic and versatile service provider specializing in tailored solutions for Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs), motorcycle communities, and direct-to-consumer (B2C) product sales. Since our inception, we have become a key player in the motorcycle industry, engaging with over 5,000 riders and racers, and converting more than 3,000 customers in just two years. With an 85% customer retention rate, we take pride in delivering exceptional value to both individual riders and corporate partners.

Our core services include premium motorcycle parts and accessories, end-to-end servicing solutions, custom race bike building, and advanced training through our racing academy. We also collaborate with professional racing teams, offering technical expertise and operational support to enhance their performance.

Notable achievements include partnerships with industry leaders such as KTM, Bosch, Ultraviolette, and Monster Energy, as well as impactful collaborations with rider communities and premium motorcycle clubs. From hosting MotoGP screening events to empowering women riders through training programs, we are dedicated to fostering a vibrant motorcycle culture.

Our technical expertise shines in initiatives like our partnership with Madrabbit Racing Academy and Racing Team, where we manage trackside operations and provide technical support. Additionally, our 100% success rate in rebuilding over 50 motorcycle engines reflects our commitment to quality and precision.

Motorrad Theory’s vision is to be the go-to partner for OEMs, racing teams, and motorcycle enthusiasts. By continuously innovating and expanding our services, we aim to elevate the motorcycling experience and drive the growth of motorcycle culture.

Tegeta Motors 2017-ci ilin fevralında Bakıda Tegeta Motors Baku-nu təsis edib. Biz minik və yük avtomobilləri, avtobuslar, tikinti və xüsusi texnika üçün kompleks diaqnostika və təmir xidmətləri təqdim edirik. Servis mərkəzimiz ən müasir avadanlıq və mexanizmlərlə təchiz olunub.

Tegeta Motors Baku müştərilərinə geniş çeşiddə məhsul təklif edir: təkərlər, ehtiyat hissələri, sürtkü yağları, akkumulyatorlar, servis avadanlığı, alətlər və daha çox. Qısa müddət ərzində müştərilərin etimadını qazanaraq Azərbaycanın aparıcı şirkətlərindən biri kimi tanınmışıq. Pərakəndə satışla yanaşı, tikinti, yükdaşıma və neft sənayesində əsas şirkətlərlə əməkdaşlıq edərək korporativ satışlarda da fəal iştirak edirik.

Tegeta Motors Baku Azərbaycanda JCB texnikaların, eləcə də Champion və Motul yağlarının rəsmi distribütorudur.

 Une vision claire dès le départ
Nous avons fondé notre entreprise avec un objectif précis : offrir bien plus qu’un simple service.
Notre engagement repose sur trois piliers essentiels :
	•	 Un professionnalisme inégalé
	•	 Une réactivité exceptionnelle

Chaque intervention est pour nous l’opportunité de transformer un besoin technique en une expérience positive.

 Un leadership féminin audacieux
Derrière Switch Glass, il y a une femme entrepreneure qui a décidé d’affronter avec courage et détermination les défis d’un secteur majoritairement masculin.
Switch Glass est le reflet de notre volonté de changer les choses, de repousser les limites et de prouver que l’excellence n’a pas de genre.

 Nous sommes fiers de donner une place de choix à la femme dans un domaine où elle est encore trop rare.

Laad-en lossystemen

Reparatie, service en onderhoud

Deuren Service Nederland BV 
Waar anderen stoppen gaan wij DEUR!

Description:
Founded in 1977 and based in Piraeus, Greece, Technocat is a Maintenance and Repair Company providing comprehensive ship repair services to the maritime sector. Combining decades of experience with a commitment to quality, we offer efficient and reliable solutions for all vessel maintenance and repair requirements. Our skilled technicians and state-of-the-art facilities allow us to handle a wide range of mechanical repairs, contributing to the smooth operation of your fleet.
Services:
 * Diesel Engine Repairs: Overhauling and servicing of 2-stroke and 4-stroke marine engines with full diagnostics, overhauling, precise machining and testing.
 * Auxiliary Machinery Repairs: Comprehensive repair and maintenance of pumps, fans, blowers, steam turbines and compressors.
 * Deck Equipment Servicing: Inspection and repair of windlasses, winches, PV valves, cranes and hydraulic cylinders.
 * In-Situ Machining: Precision onboard machining for engine blocks, liners and shafts.
 * Propulsion & Steering Systems: Expert overhauls and repairs on tailshafts, steering gears and bow thrusters
* Reconditioning and manufacturing of parts
 * Non-Destructive Testing (NDT): Advanced testing methods to ensure structural integrity and compliance.
Mission:
Our mission is to provide efficient and reliable solutions for all vessel maintenance and repair requirements. We aim to be a trusted partner for your vessel's needs worldwide, offering a proven track record, immediate response, and dedication to excellence.

Air Alsie’s exceptional attentiveness to corrosion issues prevents high-cost problems from building up. Our CIC measures include specialized services such as treatment against corrosive bacteria in fuel.
We serve a wide range of operators, aircraft owners and aircraft management customers.

Name: Spark Group
Description:
In 1996 a group of highly motivated, professional and entrepreneurial –minded youths started a small PAN registered Vehicle rental company at Sorakhutte, Kathmandu with a few vehicles to meet the needs of the general market under the name of Kathmandu Vehicle Services.

In due course of time, the increasing of business relations with NGOs, INGOs, diplomatic missions, Hydropower companies and various ministries of Nepal government, the enterprising team incorporated another VAT registered vehicle rental company in 2010 with the name of Spark Link Enterprises. 

Considering the same nature of service but highly growing demands from both Private and Public sectors, Kathmandu Vehicle Services and Spark Link Enterprises were eventually merged into a single company under the name of Spark Group in the year 2011. It has duly registered with Company Registrar Office, Internal Revenue Office and local bodies (Cottage & Small Industry Department) as per the prevailing company's law of Nepal Government. It has a vast pool of manpower under one roof and it provides the most reliable and innovative services as per the needs of the various clients. 

In due course of time Spark Group has become the first ISO 9001-2015 Certified company in Nepal due to its Quality Management System for Vehicle Rental service. Our management team and employees have played a crucial role to achieve ISO certification. In today's cut-throat competition market in the field of vehicle rental service, we have established our brand identity among its valued clients -NGOs, INGOs, Diplomatic Missions, Hydropower Companies, Banks, Financial Institutions and various ministries of Nepal government in a short span of time.

Description:
At Next Level Automotive, we are your one-stop-shop for all things automotive. We specialize in providing exceptional services that are designed to enhance and protect the appearance and performance of your vehicle.

Our services include, but are not limited to:

Ceramic Coating: Our premium ceramic coating provides unparalleled protection against environmental contaminants and UV rays, while also enhancing the appearance of your vehicle's paint.
Paint Protection Film: Our high-quality paint protection film protects your vehicle's paint from scratches, dings, and other damage caused by road debris, while maintaining a flawless finish.
Window Tint: We offer a variety of window tint options that not only add a sleek look to your vehicle, but also provide heat reduction and UV protection.
Paint Corrections: Our skilled technicians use cutting-edge techniques to remove imperfections and restore the clarity and shine of your vehicle's paint.
Vinyl Wrap: We offer a range of vinyl wrap options that allow you to customize the look of your vehicle while also protecting the original paint.

At Next Level, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional customer service and using only the highest quality products and materials. Let us help you take your vehicle to the next level. Contact us today to schedule an appointment!

Name: Logic Fleet Commercials
Description:
Logic Fleet is a Car, Van & Commercial Vehicle Service & Repair Centre based in Tallaght, Dublin. We specialise in Fleet Maintenance and supply Vehicles, Equipment, Parts, and Services to Owner Operators, Fleet Operators, Waste Operators & Heavy Goods Vehicle Operators.

To deliver excellent reliable service, Logic Fleet consists of 4 divisions:

Logic Fleet Service Centre:

Logic Fleet Service Centre provides expert fleet maintenance, servicing, and repair, to all makes and models of cars and vans. 
We are located 500m from NCT test centre Greenhills & 1km from Spanners CVRT test centre. We take the hassle out of having your vehicle tested so that you may concentrate on running your business. You drop your vehicle off and pick up your replacement vehicle, have your vehicle serviced, inspected tested & returned to fleet washed and cleaned. 

Logic Fleet Commercials:

Logic Fleet Commercials provide cost effective service & repair solutions for HGV, LCV &Trailers. We specialise in providing gold-standard service and top-class pre- C V R T work. We’ll even bring it to the test centre for you and return it to your fleet washed and as good as new.

We specialise in service & repair for Fleets from 10-100 vehicles. Our commitment to you is to provide a quality service, with strong turn around times at affordable pricing. 

Logic Fleet Waste Division:

Our Waste Division specialises in the Sale, Service & Maintenance of Waste Vehicles, Moba On Board Weighing Systems, Skip & Hook Loaders.
Our Highly Skilled Team of Service Engineers carry out Routine & Breakdown Repairs on Refuse Collection Vehicles throughout Ireland.

Logic Fleet Parts Division:

We specialise in the supply of spare parts for refuse collection vehicles, hydraulic pumps & Pto’s, along with ancillary parts such as Roll on Roll Off Sheeting Systems.

We are member of SIMI and Agencies that we represent:

Hillend Engineering – Refuse Vehicles
Boughton – Skip Loaders & Hook Loaders
Moba – Bin Weighing

Name: CLD Accident Repairs
Description:
At CLD Accident Repairs, we are dedicated to delivering precision collision repair services, restoring vehicles to their original condition with unparalleled attention to detail. Located in Luton, our workshop is equipped with state-of-the-art tools and operated by a highly skilled team of technicians committed to excellence.

Our expertise spans a wide range of repair services, from minor cosmetic touch-ups to complex structural repairs. As a BSI-certified repair center, we adhere to the highest standards of quality, safety, and reliability. This certification underscores our commitment to maintaining your vehicle’s safety and integrity, ensuring peace of mind for every customer who walks through our doors.

Why Choose CLD Accident Repairs?
	•	BSI Certification: Our BSI accreditation reflects our dedication to meeting stringent industry standards, guaranteeing repairs that are both safe and durable.
	•	Expert Technicians: Our team combines years of experience with continuous training to stay ahead in the ever-evolving automotive repair industry.
	•	Fast Turnaround Times: We understand the importance of having your vehicle back on the road quickly, which is why we prioritize efficiency without compromising quality.
	•	Customer-Focused Approach: From the moment you contact us to the final handover of your keys, we ensure clear communication and a hassle-free experience.

At CLD Accident Repairs, we take pride in our reputation for excellence, built on trust, reliability, and results that speak for themselves. We partner with individual clients, insurance companies, and fleet managers to deliver services tailored to their unique needs. Our team goes the extra mile to exceed expectations, restoring not just vehicles but also confidence.

Whether you’ve experienced a minor accident or require extensive repairs, we are here to help. Discover why our customers trust us to provide exceptional service, backed by BSI-certified standards of quality and safety.

Name: RPS SERVICE LTD
Description:
About RPS Service Ltd:

RPS Service specialise in the sales and service of biological irradiators for the blood service and research markets.

With more than 40 years experience of gamma irradiator systems, we service all manufactured models, and we can dose-map all models. 
With the change to alternative technologies we are proud to represent the Precision X-Ray range of x-ray irradiators as well as their SmART IGRT system.

As well as working with irradiators we also market and service the Faxitron non medical imaging systems used in a range of NDT, research and Quality control applications.

We are the UK and Ireland representatives for CompAI, a leading manufacturer of innovative solutions for digital specimen radiography.
We market the TrueView Pro for dedicated specimen radiography and the TrueView Core Pro for core biopsies.

To compliment our imaging systems we market the KliniTray from Klinika, a surgical specimen grid that is used to determine tumor sites with millimeter precision. KliniTray was designed to enable surgeons and pathologists to easily locate and pinpoint the exact location of micro-calcifications.

Our head office is in Surrey, UK and we have a sister company in Germany where we have service facilities to look after our mainland European customers.

A NOVATEC SOLUÇÕES - MANUTENCAO E CONSERVACAO LTDA, com sede administrativa no município de Cajati, Estado de São Paulo, nasceu com o objetivo de apresentar os mais capacitados profissionais na prevenção e correção de falhas operacionais para de nossos possíveis clientes.

A Novatec busca apresentar soluções com ótimo custo benefício, através da prestação de serviços baseada em qualidade, ética, inovação, tecnologia, sustentabilidade social e principalmente respeitando toadas as normas de segurança do trabalho.

Nossos gestores dirigentes acumulam larga experiência na área industrial com mais de 30 anos de experiência, em indústrias de grande e médio porte, empresas nacionais e internacionais, o que nos capacita e qualifica em excelência administrativa e operacional.

Name: MANTTOS SAC
Description: MANTTOS SAC es una empresa peruana creada para brindar soluciones integrales a las necesidades de nuestros clientes, enfocada en el mantenimiento e instalaciones en el sector Salud, Laboratorio e industrial.

Name: Premio Reifen + Autoservice
Description:
Premio Reifen + Autoservice: Ihr Partner für Mobilität und Innovation

Premio Reifen + Autoservice ist seit über 25 Jahren DAS erfolgreiche Fullservice-Konzept der Goodyear Retail Systems (GRS) für Reifen- und Autoservice-Spezialisten in Europa. Wir unterstützen Reifenfachhandelsbetriebe in Deutschland, Österreich, der Schweiz, Belgien, Luxemburg und in den Niederlanden nicht nur bei der Digitalisierung und den immer neuen technischen Herausforderungen, sondern fördern auch ihre wirtschaftliche Effizienz und sichern ihre Profitabilität.

Premio steht für einen europäisch einheitlichen Markenauftritt und zeichnet sich durch ein breites Leistungsangebot für selbständige Unternehmer inklusive persönlicher Beratung aus. 

Service neu definieren

Bei Premio geht es darum, Dinge anders zu machen. Wir helfen unseren Partner-Betrieben, die Kunden dort zu erreichen, wo sie sind – online wie offline. Premio-Kunden setzen auf individuelle Beratung, eine moderne Werkstatt, ein Höchstmaß an Service und ein breites Angebot an erstklassigen Markenprodukten in einer Preisklasse, die jedem Bedarf gerecht wird.

Wachsen Sie mit uns

Interessieren Sie sich für eine Partnerschaft oder die Übernahme eines Premio-Betriebs? Wir bieten umfassende betriebswirtschaftliche Unterstützung, fortschrittliche Schulungs- und Weiterbildungsprogramme und mit TireSoft3/GRIPS ein leistungsstarkes Warenwirtschaftssystem. 
Neben dem Direkt-Einkauf der Goodyear-Marken profitieren Premio-Partner auf dem FRI-Einkaufsportal von Rahmenabkommen mit namhaften Lieferanten für Reifen und Felgen, Autoservice-Teile und Werkstattausrüstung. Bei der Vermarktung helfen moderne E-Commerce- und Marketing-Lösungen unserer Experten sowie der professionelle Zugang zu Fuhrparks und Leasing-Kunden über die 4Fleet Group.

Möchten Sie mehr erfahren oder Teil unseres Netzwerks werden? 

Kontaktieren Sie uns unter:
kontakt[at]g-rs.com

Name: TBK
Description:
TBK is een erkend installateur met meer dan 50 jaar ervaring. TBK heeft alle installatietechnische oplossingen onder één dak. Ondernemers en overheidsinstellingen werken met ons samen vanwege onze heldere afspraken, hoge kwaliteit, snelle inzetbaarheid en geavanceerde oplossingen op maat.

PART OF UNITED LEGENDZ 
United Legendz is een innovatieve groep van onderhouds- en renovatiebedrijven - waaronder Biltz, Fixzed, IJbouw, Mouton en TBK vallen -  die hun krachten bundelen onder één naam. De groep is opgericht in 2023 met het doel gezamenlijk meer slagkracht en impact te realiseren in de vastgoedsector. Bij United Legendz staan mensen centraal: we stimuleren medewerkers om zichzelf te ontwikkelen en nét dat stapje verder te gaan. Zo creëren we samen een nalatenschap waarin kwaliteit, duurzaamheid en groei samenkomen: Building a Legacy.

Voor beter wonen, werken, studeren en verzorgen.

Meer informatie over United Legendz vind je op onze website: www.unitedlegendz.nl

Name: HW Martin (Fleet Maintenance) LTD
Description:
Welcome to H W Martin (Fleet Maintenance) Ltd. 
With extensive workshop facilities staffed by trained technicians, together with efficient mobile technicians, H W Martin (Fleet Maintenance) Ltd are able to offer comprehensive maintenance solutions for all makes of HGVs, light commercials and plant & equipment. We are able to tailor our service to the requirements of both fleet and individual clients and able to provide reliable and cost-effective maintenance solutions.

We operate a 24-hour workshop facility from 6:00am on Monday to 8:00pm Friday and 6:00 am to 12:00pm Saturday, supported by mobile technicians 7 days a week, 365 days a year. We understand the importance of keeping your vehicle on the road safely, compliant and cost-effectively.

We operate to the highest standards of quality and expertise. We are members of several industry associations and hold many certificates and accreditations, including IRTE Workshop Accredited and certification to ISO9001 (quality), ISO14001 (environmental) and ISO45001 (health and safety) by UKAS-accredited body Intertek.

H W Martin (Fleet Maintenance) Ltd is an authorised DAF Parts and Service Dealer.

Name: pandwachters
Description: Met onze voeten in de klei zijn wij de wegenwacht van het pandbeheer. We houden van aanpakken, korte lijnen en no-nonsense. Ons doel? Jouw vraagstuk al oplossen voordat gemeld is. Geen lange wachtrijen of ingewikkelde processen, maar snelle oplossingen en alles in goed overleg. Onze kluswacht komt langs voor klein onderhoud en ons servicepunt maakt de meest efficiënte planning op jou op korte termijn te helpen. Daarnaast heeft ons pandbeheer alles in huis om jouw pand ook de lange termijn in topconditie te houden. Dit alles combineren we met ons vakmanschap en gedrevenheid. Zo geven we jou de ultieme klantbeleving.

Name: CarsDen
Description:
we’re transforming the way gated community residents maintain their vehicles. With our convenient subscription-based model, you enjoy reliable, eco-friendly cleaning that fits seamlessly into your routine, leaving you with more time to focus on what matters.

Our commitment to quality, consistency, and customer satisfaction means your car gets the care it deserves, every single day. Whether you're at home or away, rest easy knowing that our team of professionals is keeping your car in prime condition, ensuring it looks its best every time you step behind the wheel.

Why Choose Us?

Daily cleaning service.
Convenience at your doorstep.
Environmentally friendly.
Professional and trustworthy team.

Description:
Située dans l'est du Canada, Soluwin inc offre des services d'opérations et de maintenance dans l'industrie de l'énergie renouvelable en Amérique. Notre équipe possède de l'expérience dans les projets spéciaux, l'échange de composants majeurs, l'installation de systèmes anti-givrage et la gestion de projets. Notre objectif est d'aider nos clients à optimiser leur exploitation et à réduire les temps d'arrêt des machines. Pour plus d'informations, veuillez contacter info@soluwin.ca

Located in Eastern Canada, Soluwin inc is offering operations and maintenances services in Renewable energy industry in America. Our team has experience in special project, major component exchange, anti-icing system installation and project management.  Our goal is to help our customers get the most out of their farm and reduce machine downtimes.  If you need more information, please contact info@soluwin.ca

We will repair any smartphone at your doorstep within 60 minutes. That’s our promise, extremely ambitious, borderline crazy. That’s the kind of people we need: fast, ambitious and crazy. If that’s who you are; join us!

Name: SARL Fanchon
Description:
La société Fanchon c’est plus de 15 ans d’expérience en agriculture de précision (GPS), en climatisation, en nettoyage de filtre à particules et en optimisation moteur.
Nous intervenons sur plusieurs régions telles que les Hauts-de France, le Grand-Est, la Normandie ainsi que l'Île-de-France. 
Nous savons nous adapter aux spécificités de votre métier. 
Nous travaillons avec des concessionnaires, agriculteurs, transporteurs, autocaristes, entreprise de travaux publics...
Nous sommes partenaires de Sport System, spécialiste des cartographies moteur optimisées et nous sommes adhérent au réseau TECHNIFAP, ce qui assure un nettoyage de vos FAP performant, écologique et rapide.
Nous vous assurons une rapidité d'intervention ainsi qu'une réelle expertise pour tous types de véhicules.

Description:
Hanzel Strata Maintenance is a reputable strata cleaning and bins management company based on Northern Beaches of Sydney. With over six years of experience in the industry, we have earned a solid reputation for providing high-quality services and exceptional communication with our clients.

At Hanzel Strata Maintenance, we understand the unique needs of strata properties and are committed to delivering high quality cleaning solutions to ensure all common areas are kept in pristine condition.

Experience the difference that our commitment can make.

info@hanzelmaintenance.com

Name: VoC (Voice of Customers)
Description:
At VOC, we don’t just fix bikes—we fix the way you think about bike servicing!  With transparency at our core, we’re here to ensure you never have to deal with hidden charges, unnecessary repairs, or those unauthorised service centre shop surprises ever again.

From home pick-up and WhatsApp bookings to offering certified second-hand bikes with warranty, we’ve got your back (and your bike). Accident claims? No sweat—we’ll handle it while you relax. Plus, we’re not just about customers; we’re empowering technicians too, helping them grow with franchise opportunities and expert training.

Why settle for “chalta hai” when you can have “chalti hai perfectly”? Trust VOC to keep your two-wheeler running smooth, stress-free, and always in top gear. 

Let’s ride transparency together!

Name: MATPITS
Description: Empresa especializada en servicios del sector automotriz, con más de 6 años de trayectoria en el mercado, brindando experiencias y servicios de calidad a nuestros clientes. En MAT PITS contamos con tecnología de alto nivel, infraestructura y técnicos especializados en Mecánica Automotriz para brindar servicios únicos e innovadores.

Name: eBike Motor Centre Ltd
Description:
We are the eBike motor specialists — repairing, upgrading, and supplying motor parts for Bafang, Bosch, Brose, Impulse, Mahle, Panasonic, Shimano, and Yamaha.

Official Bafang warranty and after-warranty service centre for the UK

Official Brose warranty service centre for the UK & Southern Ireland

Trusted partner of Specialized for after-warranty repairs & upgrades

Founded in 2018 by Peter Collard, eBike Motor Centre was the world’s first business dedicated to eBike motor repair. Peter, a qualified mechanic with an engineering background, launched the company after experiencing his own motor failure outside warranty. Discovering that replacement parts were unavailable and that motors were often discarded unnecessarily, he set out to change the industry.

Through innovation and persistence, Peter developed methods to repair and improve eBike motors, even enhancing original designs in some cases. Today, eBike Motor Centre creates its own repair and upgrade kits, seals, and strengthened components, supporting riders and retailers across the UK and around the globe.

We are proud to be the “go-to” specialists for eBike motor repairs and parts — helping riders get back on the road, reducing waste, and contributing to a more sustainable future.

Name: Colmec
Description:
Colmec is a fast-growing independent tire services provider in Sweden, Norway, Finland and Poland. 
We provide a full-service offering from wholesale of tires, to swapping & servicing tires to extending their useful life through retreading.

Name: AF Industries
Description:
AF Industries is become a trading name for Neschvill ’97 Ltd. from January 2025. Neschvill '97 Ltd is the exclusive representative of the Unique Polymer Systems group of companies in Hungary, Central -Eastern-Southern Europe and Middle-East. We specialize in providing innovative, high-performance solutions for the industrial, institutional and commercial sectors, with a focus on extending the lifespan and enhancing the reliability of critical infrastructure and all parts of industrial, institutional and commercial facilities. 
Our Exclusive Representations
As the exclusive representative in Hungary, Neschvill ’97 Ltd. proudly works with industry-leading brands, including:
• MCU: Specializing in high-tech materials and systems for critical infrastructure and industrial applications, MCU ensures maximum protection and efficiency.
• ENECON: Known for its cutting-edge repair and maintenance products, ENECON offers high-performance coatings and repair materials designed to extend the life of industrial equipment and infrastructure.
• Superior Products Europe (SPE): A global leader in manufacturing advanced coatings and repair solutions for heavy-duty industrial environments.
•       V4+ Pipelines and Technology Consortium
Neschvill ’97 Ltd. is also a proud member of the international V4+ Pipelines and Technology Consortium, a collaborative network of industry experts and innovators. Through this partnership, we offer a wide range of state-of-the-art technologies and services that can significantly extend the lifespan of pipeline systems and prevent critical damage in industrial environments.
At AF Industries, our mission is to provide our clients with the most reliable, efficient, and cutting-edge solutions to maintain and enhance their assets. By leveraging the expertise of our global partners and the advanced and futureproof technologies we represent, we help you optimize your operations and protect your investments.
For more information: sales@afindustries.com

Description:
Zephyr is the first technology-forward, home-services platform designed to champion and empower trade technicians to better serve homeowners.  We are dedicated to perfecting the home services experience from the inside out, by bringing together local HVAC, plumbing and electrical businesses and supporting them with superior operational processes, technology, and talent development.

Name: ECUTECH AUSTRALIA PTY LTD
Description:
We are an ECU Remapping and DPF/EGR/ADDBLUE specialist based just outside Sydney and Brisbane. Our services include a wide variety from economy to performance tuning.

We believe reliability and drive-ability is as important as power and torque and therefore our maps have built a reputation for being some of the best in the tuning world. Using some of the most advanced and sophisticated tuning equipment available, combined with years of experience we are able to tune the vast majority of cars and commercial vehicles on the market today.

Unleashing the true potential of a vehicle, depending on customer requirements this could be simply to extract as much performance as possible or to generate the most amount of fuel efficiency. All our maps are fully custom and most are developed on a Dynocom 5000 series rolling road. We cover all sectors, Automotive, Heavy vehicle, Agricultural, Marine.

We pride ourselves on offering the best tuning solutions coupled with the highest of customer care, so whether you are looking for just better fuel economy from your commercial vehicle or more power with the better economy we will have a tuning solution for you.

Our maps are proven time and time again as reliable and effective. Even though we can offer incredible gains in power and torque, we also believe in safe and sensible tuning - that’s why our customers return time and time again. We offer a lifetime warranty against any software malfunctions, furthermore, all original maps are backed up on a dedicated server allowing the vehicle to be reverted back to the original format at any point in the future.
MVRL56846

Name: Expert Complete Property Maintenance Ltd
Description:
Established in 1999, ECPM have now become a major force in the property maintenance sector, delivering constant high standards to a broad spectrum of customers.

Rightfully, with an increased emphasis on health and safety in the workplace, decision makers rely on safety compliant businesses like ourselves who employ skilled tradesmen to work within all health and safety parameters. We are committed to giving our employees the right tools, equipment and training to keep them, our customers and the general public safe, whilst carrying out their day to day duties.

From our offices in the West Midlands, we carry out a full range of property maintenance and trades on various buildings, including homes, offices, retail, commercial and industrial; meeting and often exceeding customer’s expectations!

We have our own working at height equipment, including powered access machines, enabling us to always have a solution and gain access to high level work.

Name: AutoSauce Vehicle Repairing
Description:
Welcome to AutoSauce – Where Vehicles Get Saucy Service! 

With over a decade of experience serving the automotive appetite of Dubai, AutoSauce Vehicle Repairing is not just a garage; it's your one-stop sauce shop for all things car-related! 

 Why AutoSauce?
At AutoSauce, we spice up the traditional vehicle repair scene with a dash of professionalism, a pinch of reliability, and a whole lot of saucy customer service! We understand that your car is more than just a set of wheels – it's your trusty sidekick in the adventure of life.

 Services That Sizzle:
 AC Repairs: Is your car feeling hot under the hood? Our AC repairs include diagnostics, leak tests, gas refills, compressor repairs, and full AC system flushing service. Because a cool car is a happy car!

Name: PropeyeHome Ltd.
Description:
Propeye-Home Ltd. is a cutting-edge IoT and data-driven business dedicated to revolutionising the heating and hot water sector. The flagship product, Propeye is a game-changing early warning data product that gathers and analyses real-time information from any heating and hot water system, regardless of the energy source. By constantly monitoring and analysing system performance, Propeye can quickly detect faults or potential emergencies and immediately alert an appointed engineer for swift resolution. 

Unlike traditional fault detection methods, Propeye provides detailed diagnostic information and suggests possible tests and remedies, along with the necessary parts needed, to eliminate common issues experienced by heating engineers and their customers. The analysed data is easily accessible through the managerial desktop version or the engineer's user interface, enabling a prompt and effective response. Additionally, the data can be easily shared with the customer or end-user through a smartphone or tablet. Propeye-Home Ltd. is dedicated to bringing positive and lasting change to the heating and hot water industry.

EVXpertz | Enabler of India’s EV Service Backbone

EVXpertz is the enabler of India’s EV service ecosystem, dedicated to building the nation’s organized, certified, and technology-driven network for electric two- and three-wheelers.

We address one of the EV industry’s biggest gaps — the lack of reliable, affordable, and accessible after-sales service.

Our mission is to make EV ownership simpler, smarter, and sustainable by providing trained, trusted, and tech-enabled service support across every region of India.

Through our franchise-based model, we empower local entrepreneurs and technicians to establish certified EV service centers equipped with:
 Comprehensive training and skill certification
 Genuine parts and advanced diagnostic tools
 Digital lead generation and marketing support
 Unified operational and quality standards

Each EVXpertz center contributes to a connected, clean mobility ecosystem that drives green employment, entrepreneurship, and energy sustainability.

As an enabler of India’s clean mobility transformation, we’re not just servicing electric vehicles — we’re building the foundation for long-term EV reliability and trust.

EVXpertz integrates sustainability, employment, and technology to strengthen every layer of the EV ecosystem — ensuring the future of mobility is not just electric, but efficient and equitable.

Our vision is to become India’s most trusted EV service backbone — creating a certified, scalable, and sustainable ecosystem that supports millions of EVs on the road while driving economic and environmental progress.

 Sustainable | Certified | Connected | Scalable

Description:
Tent Pole Repair: Reviving Adventures, One Pole at a Time

At TentPoleRepair.com, we’re in the business of solutions—not just tent poles. We know the frustration of seeing a promising camping trip side-lined by a snapped pole. That’s why we specialise in tent pole repair, helping campers across the UK extend the life of their tents and, ultimately, their adventures.

Our journey started with a storm, a broken tent, and the realisation that no one should have to send a perfectly good tent to the landfill just because of one faulty pole. We’ve since turned that moment of frustration into a nationwide service dedicated to saving you money, reducing waste, and ensuring your next trip into the wild goes off without a hitch.

Based in Southampton, our tent-repair expertise spans a wide range of brands and models. And while our focus is on tent pole repair, what we’re really passionate about is creating sustainable, hassle-free outdoor experiences. Your tent poles are the backbone of your adventure—and we're here to make sure they stay strong.

Looking to partner or learn more? Let’s connect. We’re always open to collaboration and innovation in the outdoor gear space.

#tentpolerepair #outdoorexperiences #sustainability #campinglife #UKbusiness

Name: Suez Shipyard Co.
Description:
Suez Shipyard Company, Affiliated to Suez Canal Authority
One of the leading companies in the field of ship repair which was established more than 150 years ago.
The company is distinguished by its unique geographical location on the Red Sea, the Gulf of Suez, and the southern entrance to the Suez Canal.
The company receives all types of national and foreign ships for maritime transport companies, petroleum service companies, and oil rigs affiliated with major oil companies. The Suez Maritime Shipyard Company has multiple capabilities, most notably the floating dock, which is one of the largest floating docks in the world with a lifting capacity of up to 55 thousand tons.
Suez Shipyard Company is keen on the continuous development of its services. For that, it seeks to continuously train its employees on the latest methods to raise their technical efficiency in addition to developing and modernizing equipment and selecting the best suppliers to fulfill its obligations.
 It is also keen to provide a safe work environment to achieve continuous development of the quality of performance and product in order to meet future needs and expectations.
Our vision is to be a leading model in encouraging entrepreneurship to support economic growth for the Arab Republic of Egypt.

Name: Eco Climb'In
Description:
Eco Climb'In est une société issue d’un rapprochement entre 2 acteurs majeurs de l'escalade indoor : Artline et Volx. 
Soucieux de l’impact environnemental lié au fort développement de l’escalade indoor, nous mutualisons nos compétences et ressources pour développer un écosystème durable et innovant en lien avec les salles privées, les collectivités, les clubs et les utilisateurs.
Nous lançons une activité de retexturation, unique en France pour donner une seconde vie aux produits usagés.
Le but est de créer une économie circulaire et anti gaspillage en phase avec la loi AGEC, à travers la collecte, puis, suivant l’état des produits, la retexturation ou le recyclage ou la seconde main.

MARINPROS olarak ‘’ Seperatör yedek parça imalatı, Mekanik servis, talaşlı imalat ve teknik danışmanlık hizmetleri.’’ kapsamı doğrultusunda. Ülke ekonomisine önemli katkılarda bulunan, topluma ve çevreye karşı sorumluluklarının bilincinde, sürdürülebilir gelişmeyi yaşam şekli yapan, deneyim, güven ve kalite açısından sektöründe tercih edilen bir kuruluş olarak hedefimiz müşterilerimize beklentilerinin üzerinde fayda sağlayacak hizmetleri en iyi çözüm ortağı olarak sunmak ve sürekli müşteri memnuniyetini sağlamaktır. 
Tüm çalışanlarımız müşteri odaklı çalışma felsefemizi benimser ve bu sürece katkıda bulunarak Süreç Yaklaşımı ile yasal şartlara uyarak, Sürekli İyileştirmeyi esas alarak Sıfır Hata 'yı hedeflemektedir.
Müşterilerimizi memnun etme yolunun, çalışanlarımızın mutluluğu ve memnuniyetinden geçtiğinin bilincinde olarak, çalışanlarımıza en iyi çalışma ortamını sağlamakta, sürekli gelişmeyi ve öğrenmeyi desteklemekteyiz. 
Maliyetlerimizi düşürmek, verimliliğimizi ve uzun vadeli kârlılığımızı arttırmak, geleceğimizi güven altına almak, tedarikçilerimizle karşılıklı iş birliği ve güven içerisinde çalışarak sağlanabilir. 
Bu bağlamda amacımız bütün faaliyet sahalarında ve hizmet birimlerinde kalite bilincini sistematik ve düzenli bir şekilde sağlamak üzere Toplam Kalite Yönetimi 'ni yaşam şekli olarak benimsemek ve gereklerini yerine getirmektir. 
Toplam Kalite Yönetimi ile iş mükemmelliğini gerçekleştirmek MARINPROS çalışanları olarak hepimizin görevidir.

Name: CRM SRL Mantenimiento Industrial
Description:
Founded in 1980 by visionary engineer Orlando Rodriguez, C.R.M. S.R.L. is more than a workshop—it's a testament to Bolivian capability and innovation. Originating in engine reconditioning, the company swiftly evolved, pioneering innovations that redefined industry standards.

A pivotal moment came when C.R.M. S.R.L. became the vanguard in producing parts for Worthington Pumps, surpassing OEM quality and ushering in an era of substantial savings for YPFB. Setting new benchmarks, the company expanded its expertise to repair colossal machine parts, surpassing the capacities of existing lathe machines in Bolivia.

Innovation is woven into the company's DNA, with the creation of portable machines for on-site services and contributions to Project Kanata with a 700mm diameter forced water pipe. Beyond technical prowess, C.R.M. S.R.L. stands as a beacon of excellence, instilling confidence in Bolivians' talent and capability.

From Cochabamba to the world, C.R.M. S.R.L. has etched its name in history as more than a company—it's a testament to Bolivian innovation, resilience, and the power of self-reliance.

Description:
Da oltre due decenni, ci dedichiamo al benessere delle persone, sia a casa che sul luogo di lavoro, con un forte impegno per la sostenibilità ambientale. 

Il nostro motto, "Con te in ogni momento, creiamo l’atmosfera perfetta," incarna la nostra dedizione a migliorare la qualità della vita attraverso soluzioni all'avanguardia.

I Nostri Servizi
Collaboriamo con i migliori marchi del settore per offrire servizi di manutenzione e assistenza specializzata per caldaie, condizionatori e impianti termici. La nostra squadra altamente qualificata è costantemente aggiornata attraverso una formazione continua, mentre la tecnologia e l'innovazione sono parte integrante della nostra filosofia.

Qualità Certificata
Siamo certificati dai più rigorosi enti di certificazione e utilizziamo strumentazioni tecniche avanzate, sottoposte a taratura periodica, per garantire elevate performance energetiche (COP). Ci impegniamo costantemente a migliorare le nostre procedure per soddisfare in modo efficiente ed ecologicamente responsabile le esigenze dei nostri clienti.

Sostenibilità Ambientale
La sostenibilità ambientale è al centro del nostro impegno. Crediamo che migliorare il benessere delle persone debba andare di pari passo con la tutela del nostro pianeta. Adottiamo pratiche aziendali sostenibili per contribuire a un futuro più verde e sostenibile.

Comunità e Solidarietà
Non siamo solo un'azienda, ma anche una parte attiva della comunità. Sosteniamo numerose iniziative e realtà locali, contribuendo allo sport, alla cultura e alla solidarietà. Il nostro obiettivo è restituire alla comunità che ci ha sostenuto nel corso degli anni.

Unisciti a noi in questo viaggio verso un mondo più confortevole, sostenibile e solidale. Segui la nostra pagina per rimanere aggiornato sulle nostre iniziative, i progetti e le ultime novità nel settore del clima. "Con te in ogni momento, creiamo l’atmosfera perfetta."

Name: Garage LH Services Flottes professionnelles
Description:
Basée à Neulliac, LH Services est une référence pour les professionnels bretons en quête de solutions sur mesure pour leurs véhicules utilitaires. Nos services englobent la maintenance, la réparation, l’aménagement Work System, ainsi que la gestion de flottes, la location et la vente de véhicules dédiés aux métiers itinérants et à forte mobilité.

Spécialistes des aménagements Work System, nous créons des environnements de travail efficaces et fonctionnels directement intégrés aux véhicules utilitaires de nos clients. Que vous ayez besoin de rangements optimisés, de stations de travail ou d’équipements de sécurité pour faciliter vos opérations, nous concevons et installons des solutions robustes et sur mesure qui répondent aux standards les plus élevés de qualité et de fiabilité.

Nos services principaux :

Maintenance et Réparation : Un entretien adapté pour que vos véhicules restent opérationnels, limitant ainsi les interruptions d’activité.
Aménagement de Véhicules : Nos solutions Work System transforment vos véhicules en ateliers mobiles ou espaces de travail modulaires, adaptés à tous les métiers.
Location et Vente de Véhicules : Une gamme de véhicules utilitaires disponibles à la location ou à l’achat pour répondre aux besoins temporaires ou permanents de votre activité.
Gestion de Flotte : Une offre clé en main pour optimiser l’utilisation, l’entretien et la rentabilité de votre parc de véhicules, incluant des suivis techniques réguliers et une gestion proactive des performances.
En choisissant LH Services, vous accédez à une expertise complète et polyvalente, dédiée à maximiser la productivité de vos équipes et la durabilité de vos équipements. Nous nous engageons à offrir un accompagnement personnalisé, assurant à votre entreprise une mobilité continue et performante.

Envie d’en savoir plus ? Contactez-nous pour découvrir comment LH Services peut faire de vos véhicules un atout stratégique pour votre succès.

Full-Fledged Service Center

Often you will find that there is never a need to call anyone else or send your hardware anywhere else.

Component-Level Board Repair
We are one of the few service centers in the United States that diagnose and repairs business and computer hardware to the component level of the circuit boards. Not only are we proud of the fact that we have been doing this for many years, we are also the only center in the United States authorized to perform this level of diagnostics and repair for Panasonic’s Toughbook/Toughpad computers. We've built our reputation on offering this service and continuously hone our expertise through continuing education, training, and engineering-level interaction with hardware manufacturers.

Description:
Positive Contractors Ltd is a family business offering property maintenance services across London and the Home Counties.

 
Our determination to consistently surpass expectations ensures our business services add value to yours.



Clients:

 

Current clients include Savills, Life Residential, CBRE as well as more bespoke agencies such as JR Capital Ltd.

• Fire Alarms Systems
• Intercom 
• Handymen

Specialist Systems:

We also have specialist engineers for Lutron /Creston system, HIU's, MRV's and HMRV's. 

Job Management:

We use a job management software called Geeop http://geoop.com/ which keeps us extremely organised.

The engineer logs into an app from their phone and it displays all their jobs. They update each job when complete, with photos and notes so we can invoice or send quote straight away without having to call and slow them down. 

This information will stay in the cloud, so if you call us 3 months down the line because a landlord is questioning why we changed a light, we can show them the photo of the old and new one.

How to Book A Job:

The property manager will simply just emails us a new works order
We make contact straight away with the tenant to arrange access 
PM will get a job notification email sent to them to show the job has been booked and the engineer attending.
Most jobs are completed within the 1-hour call out - The vehicles are kept stocked with basic materials to avoid any revisits or additional time going to wholesalers where possible.
We will call from the site if more time is required and we can fix there and then to keep costs down however where parts need to be ordered a quote will be sent.
All invoices are sent within 24 hours of us attending site and include a detailed reports

Name: ATTILA Narbonne
Description:
L'agence de Narbonne fait partie du réseau Attila qui est le 1er réseau national spécialisé dans la réparation, l’entretien et la maintenance de tous les types de toits, qu’ils soient industriels, traditionnels, en terrasse ou amiantés.

Votre toiture est une pièce maîtresse de votre bâtiment, quel qu’en soit l’usage ou la destination, professionnelle ou domestique : elle le chapeaute, le surmonte, le protège, le « finit », lui donne son style. De son état dépendent la qualité, la valeur  et l’apparence de votre bâtiment. 

Votre Capital-toit représente la capacité de votre toiture à vous protéger, à protéger ceux qui vous entourent, à protéger votre activité, vos biens, votre sérénité, votre confort, la vie à l’intérieur. C’est aussi une composante essentielle de la qualité perçue de votre bâtiment, de son attractivité, de sa visibilité.  C’est une véritable richesse, comme l’est votre capital-santé !

Comme tout patrimoine immobilier, votre Capital-toit se préserve, s’entretient, se pérennise. Il peut aussi se valoriser, quand  vous décidez de transformer votre toiture pour l’embellir ou en faire un nouvel espace de vie ou d’activité. 

Chaque jour, nous repensons, inventons, perfectionnons un métier ancestral, celui de couvreur, en l’enrichissant de retours d’expérience réussis et partagés au sein du réseau.

De plus, nous attachons une attention toute particulière à la sécurité, tant pour nos clients que pour nos opérateurs en action. Cette valeur ajoutée d’ ATTILA repose sur la parfaite maîtrise du métier, le savoir-faire, les expertises et la capacité d’innovation de nos collaborateurs. Ces derniers mènent toutes leurs interventions dans le parfait respect des règles de l’art et la stricte observation des principes de sécurité.

Name: Rally Motors Group
Description:
Rally Motors Group: Innovators in the World of Automotive and Maintenance

Rally Motors Group is a leading company in the automotive and maintenance sector in Egypt. Founded by a group of experts and professionals in the automotive industry, the company has established a prestigious position in the market through a wide range of services and products it offers since 2011.

Rally Motors Group specializes in automotive maintenance and sales, encompassing various renowned brands. They have specialized branches for Korean and Japanese car maintenance, including a wide array of brands known for their quality and reliability. Additionally, they have a dedicated branch for the maintenance and sales of German cars, focusing on brands like Mercedes and the Volkswagen family.

One of Rally Motors Group's significant achievements is being the first company authorized by the Ministry of Industry and Trade to maintain electric cars in Egypt. Thanks to this recognition, the company can now provide exceptional services for the maintenance and repair of electric cars, offering the latest technologies and equipment to customers who own this type of vehicle.

In addition to its activities in maintenance and sales, Rally Motors Group also owns an accredited educational academy recognized by universities and engineering institutes. This academy trains students and young engineers practically in the field of automotive maintenance and repair, ensuring they acquire the necessary skills and experiences to excel in this advanced field.

In summary, Rally Motors Group is a symbol of excellence and professionalism in the world of automotive and maintenance in Egypt. The company offers a diverse range of services, making it a trusted destination for car owners seeking quality and efficiency in maintenance and sales.

Name: Ace Autobody Ltd

Ace Autobody Ltd is Ireland’s largest and most advanced collision repair network, proudly serving motorists nationwide since 1980.

En plus des services d'entretien et d'installation d'équipements réfrigérés, nous offrons des services de réparation professionnels, y compris des interventions d'urgence, assurant un diagnostic transparent et une remise en service rapide et efficace.

Notre équipe couvre Montréal, la Montérégie et les Cantons de l’Est, offrant une assistance rapide pour minimiser les temps d'arrêt. 

Nous nous concentrons principalement sur les secteurs agroalimentaire, pharmaceutique et industriel, où les exigences en matière de réfrigération sont les plus rigoureuses et critiques. 

Pour discuter de vos besoins en réfrigération et découvrir comment nous pouvons vous aider, contactez-nous au 1 833 733-5653.

Description:
Wir bieten Ihnen Dienstleistungen im Bereich des technischen Property Managements und diverse Services rund um Ihre Immobilie. 
Überzeugen Sie sich von unserer Qualität, sei es bei der Instandhaltung oder bei der Bestandsaufnahme Ihrer Anlagen.
Mit unseren Fachkräften und der langjährigen Erfahrung bieten wir einen außergewöhnlichen Service.
Bei der Instandhaltung und Instandsetzung an Brandschutztüren, Feststellanlagen, Sicherheitsleuchten und Fluchtwegleuchten, ortsfesten elektronischen Betriebsmitteln, Rauchwarnmeldern, Absturzsicherungen und vielen weiteren Anlagen. 

Mit unserem Immo-Tech-Check führen wir Begehungen durch, die mit einem Bericht und Fotos dokumentiert werden. Des Weiteren geben wir Handlungsempfehlungen ab und erstellen speziell auf das Objekt abgestimmt eine Anlagenübersicht mit einem Wartungskalender und Prüfungskalender. 
In die Prüfung beziehen wir auch die Genehmigten unterlagen ein und Überprüfen die Immobilie auf Übereinstimmung. 
Diese vereinfachte Form der Technical Due Diligence (TDD) ist sehr richtungsweisend für Eigentümer, als Qualitätsprüfung oder bei einem Immobilienankauf. 
Verwaltern dienen Sie der Budgeterstellung und der Erfüllung der Betreiberverantwortung. Auch gewerblichen Mietern einer Immobilie können wir mit unserem Immo-Tech-Check unterstützten.

Oder im Bereich des vorbeugenden Brandschutz helfen wir Ihnen.
Wir führen als Brandschutzbeauftragter Begehungen und Prüfungen durch.
Ihre Fluchtpläne, Rettungswegpläne- und Feuerwehrpläne werden von uns auf Vollständigkeit geprüft und bei Notwendigkeit für Ihre Immobilie erstellt bzw. geändert.

Alles Leistungen bieten wir Ihnen Bundesweit wie München, Berlin, Hamburg, Bremen, Düsseldorf, Essen, Solingen, Wuppertal, Wesel usw. an

Mit der Sileo Services GmbH haben Sie einen starken Partner an Ihrer Seite.

Name: MBS Turbo Holland
Description:
With more than 50 years of  maritime experience, MBS Turbo Holland is your specialist for your need in turbocharger service and spare parts. 

In response to continued emphasis for preventative maintenance, the company is continuously expanding its business within the marine turbocharger industry. With our new complete stock of top-quality spare parts consisting of overhaul kits, nozzle- and cover rings, rotors (complete and naked), turbine blades, casings, oil pumps, seals and gaskets, etc we can ensure short delivery times. Our wide range of turbocharger types includes parts suitable for ABB, KBB, IHI, MAN, NAPIER and more, all  manufactured accordingly to makers specification and guaranteed for its performance. Furthermore, with our well experienced engineers we are able to service, maintain or even enhance your turbocharger in our own workshop, extending the lifetime and reliability of your turbocharger.

Besides the expansion of our activities, we are still an official supplier of NTN-SNR bearings. This manufacturer has been designing and developing solutions for turbocharger bearings for more than 20 years and can be defined as a major player in all markets where bearings have an essential role. They are committed to quality and found MBS Turbo Holland, with our state-of-the-art climate controlled bearing room, as an equal and reliable partner. 

With our in-house technical knowledge we are able to give you technical advice or support that you may require. Our professional sales team is ready to serve its customers quickly and with reliable answers. Strategically located in Zwijndrecht, The Netherlands, close to Port of Rotterdam, Antwerp Harbour and Amsterdam Schiphol International Airport, parts can rapidly be shipped to any destination.

MBS Turbo Holland focuses on proficiency, top quality and above all customer satisfaction.

Vi driver 5 værksteder på landsplan og håndterer over 60.000 enheder om året i hele landet

Alle reparationer kvalitetssikres

StayOnline foretager altid en kvalitetstest af dit produkt, inden det forlader vores værksted. Det betyder, at du kan være sikker på kvaliteten, og du vil aldrig opleve, at f.eks. skærmen på din iPhone ikke virker efter et skærmskift.

Det er kun værksteder, der er godkendte som Apple´s Authorised Service Provider, der har mulighed for at anvende originale og kvalitetsgodkendte reservedele. Vi får dem leveret direkte fra Apple. Som forbruger er dette punkt afgørende i forhold til dine rettigheder efter en reparation samt bevarer dit Apple-produkt originalt.

Alle vores værksteder er 100% ESD sikrede (antistatiske). Al elektronik er sikret mod statisk elektricitet under hele reparationsforløbet. Mange uautoriserede værksteder har ikke et ’sterilt’ arbejdsværksted, hvilket kan medføre fejl på din telefon efterfølgende.

Name: ARIES
Description:
‘Powering the industry sustainability footprint’

Welcome to the ARIES Standard.  ARIES (Automotive Repair Industry Environmental Standard), is a sector specific environmental standard designed to drive carbon reduction, sustainability and efficiency across the vehicle accident repair industry.

Developed in response to increasing regulatory pressures, commercial expectations and consumer demand for carbon reduction, the standard has been designed to move the industry to align with the SBTi framework and other International Standards. 

Collaboration is key to the success of ARIES, with collective input and support of key industry experts and stakeholders from across the vehicle repair sector working together to ensure that the standard is practical and reflective of real-world challenges.

Set up by the industry, for the industry, ARIES is being developed collaboratively offers support to Repairers to help them meet sustainability targets and reduce carbon emissions in a simple, standardised and transparent way.
