That Repair be an actionable and pervasive value in our culture.

The Culture of Repair Project focuses primarily on supporting teaching about repair in K - 12 educational settings, and integrating the mindset, technologies, thinking skills, systems understandings, and value of caring, into instruction across subject areas.

Emphases: Environmental Literacy and Maker Spaces

The Culture of Repair Project supports initiatives working toward a world that reflexively, competently and confidently turns to repairing before discarding stuff and buying anew. Support takes the form of collaborating with other organizations, providing logistical support, sharing information, networking, and helping secure funding.

We are fiscally sponsored by Philanthropic Ventures Foundation, Oakland, California, USA

Name: FleetPro Truck Center INC
Motor Works Auto
Description:
Our journey began in 2004 in St. Augusta with Augusta Motor Works, where we offered full-service repairs for all makes and models of automobiles. As we grew, our customers began asking if we could work on European vehicles. In response, we expanded our team and invested in specialized tools to handle these cars. Today, we continue to service all makes and models, with dedicated technicians who specialize in European brands such as BMW, Mercedes-Benz, VW, Audi, Porsche, Land Rover, Jaguar, and Volvo.

In 2015, we seized the opportunity to open a second location in Sartell, where Motor Works of Sartell quickly became a success. This success led us to acquire our Sauk Rapids facility in 2020, followed by three additional locations in Blaine, Big Lake, and Bemidji in 2021. We expanded further in 2022 with the acquisition of Motor Works Park Rapids and most recently added a new facility in Elysian in 2024.

With 8 locations now, we can offer convenient services to more customers. As we continue to grow, we’re always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our team and are excited to help as many people as possible.

Name: Express Oil Change & Tire Engineers - Kingsport, TN
Description:
Express Oil Change in the Kingsport / Tri-Cities area of Tennessee is a family-owned and operated, full-service oil change and automotive repair shop specializing in a wide range of services to address the preventative maintenance and automotive repair needs of its customers.  

From manufacturer scheduled maintenance to brake service, competitive pricing on brand name tires to A/C and transmission service, engine light diagnostics, and much more - our ASE-certified technicians provide expert service that our customers tell us is better than that provided by dealers.  

Our signature 10-Minute Oil Change is a fast and friendly experience that includes a 20-point safety inspection and the opportunity for you to stay in your vehicle while we work.  We take time to talk with our customers about their vehicles.  We don't pressure you to buy any service or part and we don't recommend any service that is not immediately needed.

While you're welcome to schedule a service appointment, we don't require one.  Visit either of our two convenient locations at 4213 W Stone Drive or 3855 Fort Henry Drive in Kingsport. We're open Monday - Friday, 8am - 6pm and Saturdays from 8am - 5 pm. 

We also offer fleet services to businesses with company cars, trucks or vans to ensure those vehicles stay safely on the road.

Name: Sjællands Automægler
Description:
Lad Sjællands Automægler være virksomhedens uvildige bilrådgiver i forhold til køb eller salg af jeres firmabiler. Vi har ingen mærkepræferencer eller bindinger men rådgiver på tværs af mærker i forhold til den konkrete opgave, ønsker og behov.

Hos Sjællands Automægler er kunden altid i centrum. Dine ønsker og behov er vores afsæt - uanset om du skal købe eller sælge bil, eller du har brug for hjælp til reparation af din bil.

Alle ansatte hos Sjællands Automægler er kompetente og dygtige medarbejdere - uden et svært forståeligt fagsprog. Vi arbejder målrettet med vores slogan: 'Vi samler på glade og tilfredse kunder'

Vi har et ambitiøst mål om at være et af Danmarks hyggeligste og prisvenlige bilhuse – målt på betjening og de resultater, vi leverer i forhold til vores kunders opgaver. Sjællands Automægler har siden 2005 solgt over 3.000 biler for private og virksomheder. 

Hos Sjællands Automægler er vi glade for de mange samarbejdsaftaler, vi har indgået med virksomheder. Når bilerne sælges bliver de naturligvis gennemgået og serviceret af vores eget værksted og leveret med 3 måneders 100 % garanti.

Vores mål er at følge vores kunder lige så længe det er praktisk muligt. Vi glæder os over de mange af vores kunder, som allerede har handlet biler hos os flere gange, og som viser os den tillid at henvise andre kunder til vores forretning.

Sælger du din bil igennem Sjællands Automægler kan du køre i bilen dagligt, mens den er til salg hos os. Du overdrager i forbindelse med salg de eventuelt efterfølgende garanti-omkostninger til Sjællands Automægler, som derfor også udvælger bilerne  med omtanke.

Name: XTIRE
Description:
A XTIRE é uma empresa brasileira, presente em mais de 20 países, que há mais de 20 anos, produz, distribui e comercializa selantes de pneus que protegem contra furos e perda natural de pressão de ar.

O selante de pneu Xtire aumenta a vida útil dos pneus; reduz o consumo de combustível e emissão de CO2; evita o sucateamento precoce da carcaça; e elimina muitos transtornos, riscos e prejuízos.

A vedação do furo ocorre de dentro para fora, instantaneamente, sem a necessidade de reparo posterior.

O produto já foi testado e homologado por grandes empresas nacionais e multinacionais de diversos segmentos e está alinhada com os conceitos ESG como proteção de recursos naturais, redução da emissão de gases de efeito estufa, gestão eficiente de matéria-prima e gestão sustentável de resíduos.

O produto, à base de água, é biodegradável, atóxico, não inflamável e possui antioxidantes que protegem as partes metálicas dos pneus e rodas. É o único selante do mercado LIVRE de MonoEtilenoGlicol em sua fórmula, que é altamente corrosivo à borracha e às partes metálicas dos pneus e rodas, e compromete o processo de recapagem.

Pode ser aplicado em todos os tipos de pneus, com e sem câmara de ar, de veículos e equipamentos usados na agricultura, transporte, construção civil, mineração, terraplanagem, indústria, forças de segurança e por consumidores nos seus automóveis, motocicletas e bicicletas.

A Xtire possui produtos para todos os tipos de veículos e diferentes níveis de proteção:

Xtire Linha Pesada:
• Frota Max - caminhões, ônibus, tratores, implementos agrícolas e veículos industriais
• Agroforte - exclusivo para pneus que utilizam lastro d'água, muito usado no setor agrícola
• Heavy Duty & Mining - tratores com alta incidência de furos e de grandes dimensões, principalmente dos setores de mineração, terraplanagem e construção civil

Xtire Linha Leve:
• Auto Passeio, SUV & Pick-up, Moto, Bike e Speed & Gravel

Xtire Linha Militar:
• Defense: veículos leves, pesados e táticos

Name: Keys Customs
Description:
Welkom bij Keys Customs, dé autogarage waar je kunt vertrouwen op uitstekend onderhoud, reparatie en unieke sfeerverlichtingsoplossingen voor jouw voertuig. Bij Keys Customs begrijpen we dat jouw auto meer is dan alleen een vervoermiddel. Het is een verlengstuk van jouw persoonlijkheid en levensstijl. Daarom streven we ernaar om je voertuig in topconditie te houden en tegelijkertijd een unieke en comfortabele rijervaring te bieden.

Onze hooggekwalificeerde en ervaren technici zijn gespecialiseerd in de complexe systemen en technologieën van diverse voertuigen. Of het nu gaat om een routinematige onderhoudsbeurt, een diagnose van een storing, een reparatie van mechanische of elektrische problemen, of het upgraden van je voertuig met op maat gemaakte sfeerverlichting, bij Keys Customs ben je aan het juiste adres.

Bij Keys Customs hechten we veel waarde aan klanttevredenheid. We geloven in open communicatie en transparantie. Voordat we aan een reparatie- of onderhoudsproject beginnen, zullen we grondig met je bespreken wat er moet gebeuren, welke opties er zijn en wat de kosten zijn. We streven ernaar om al je vragen te beantwoorden en ervoor te zorgen dat je volledig op de hoogte bent van het proces.

Com oficinas credenciadas em São Paulo, Guarujá e em todo o interior do estado, estamos prontos para atender suas necessidades onde quer que você esteja. Cada transmissão que reparamos e cada profissional que treinamos são testemunhos do nosso compromisso com a excelência e com o avanço do setor automotivo.

Junte-se a nós enquanto continuamos a elevar o padrão da indústria de transmissões automáticas. Siga nossa página para ficar atualizado sobre nossos serviços, dicas técnicas e atualizações do setor.

Name: Garage Kocher
Description:
Seit 1945 sind wir Ihr VW und Audi Partner rund um die Mobilität im Berner Seeland – wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Den Grundstein für das Garagengewerbe in Erlach haben Monique und Werner Marolf im Jahre 1945 gelegt. Damals hat das Ehepaar die erste Garage im Städtchen gegründet. Wir sind stolz, heute noch ein Teil davon zu sein und die Dienstleistungen rund um die vier Räder weiterzuführen.
Seither ist viel geschehen – es wurden Standorte geändert, Verträge mit Automobilimporteuren abgeschlossen und neue Räumlichkeiten gebaut. 
Erfahren Sie mehr über Uns auf unserer Website!
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Depuis 1945, nous sommes votre VW et Audi partenaire pour tout ce qui concerne la mobilité dans le Seeland bernois - nous nous réjouissons de vous accueillir !

Monique et Werner Marolf ont posé la première pierre de l'industrie du garage à Erlach en 1945. À l'époque, le couple a fondé le premier garage de la petite ville. Nous sommes fiers d'en faire encore partie aujourd'hui et de poursuivre les prestations de services autour des quatre roues.
Depuis, il s'est passé beaucoup de choses : des changements d'emplacement, des contrats avec des importateurs automobiles et la construction de nouveaux locaux. 

Apprenez-en plus sur nous en visitant notre site web !

Our services cover all premium brands and models, including inspections, scheduled maintenance, complex mechanical and electrical repairs, diagnostics, and pre-purchase inspections. Through a strong partner network, we also provide towing, bodywork, interior services, and more. To make the process seamless, customers can benefit from convenient pick-up and delivery options.

At Extreme Performance Garage, our vision is to set new benchmarks in automotive maintenance by exceeding customer expectations through quality, transparency, and reliability. Our mission is to be a trusted partner for all vehicle service and repair needs, offering professional, customer-focused solutions at fair prices.

With certified master mechanics, trained specialists, and a commitment to personal service, we ensure every customer receives the highest standard of care. We pride ourselves on building long-term relationships by combining technical expertise with integrity and efficient communication.

Customer satisfaction is always our top priority. Visit our air-conditioned workshop, meet our German-speaking team, and experience why Extreme Performance Garage LLC is one of Dubai’s most trusted names in premium automotive care.

Name: Incharge Company "ICM"
Description:
INCHARGE Maintenance Company: Your Trusted Partner in Industrial Maintenance
INCHARGE Maintenance Company, derived from Saad Ali Alessa for Contracting Co. and a proud subsidiary of Emkan Holding Co. Saudi Arabia, has quickly risen to prominence in the industrial maintenance sector. With our headquarters strategically located at Port Gate in Al-Dammam, we are ideally positioned to serve the diverse needs of manufacturing plants, pipelines, refineries, and other industrial facilities across the region.
At INCHARGE, we specialize in offering a comprehensive suite of maintenance services designed to ensure the smooth and efficient operation of industrial infrastructures. Our expertise spans various critical services, including:
•	Valves Maintenance Services: Ensuring the optimal functionality and longevity of industrial valves.
•	Emergency Repairs and Troubleshooting: Providing rapid response solutions to minimize downtime and operational disruptions.
•	Non-metallic Pipe Wrapping: Enhancing the durability and protection of pipelines.
•	Pipe and Vessel Thermal Insulation & Noise Reduction: Improving energy efficiency and reducing operational noise in industrial settings.
•	Leak Sealing Services: Preventing costly leaks and ensuring the integrity of pipelines and vessels.
•	Pipe Cold Cutting: Precision cutting services for safe and efficient pipeline maintenance.
•	Flange Facing: Restoring flange surfaces to prevent leaks and ensure a tight seal.
•	Bolt Torquing: Ensuring proper bolt tensioning for safe and secure connections.
•	Trading Services: Supplying high-quality industrial components to meet the diverse needs of our clients.
•	At INCHARGE, we are committed to contributing to the growth of the national economy while striving to expand our reach globally in the field of valves and industrial maintenance.

Name: Revitalize Mixers
Description:
Revitalize Mixers has been dedicated to equipment rebuilding in the Midwest since 2018. In the face of escalating equipment costs and limited availability, we have undertaken the mission of giving equipment a second, and sometimes even a third, life at a fraction of the cost of purchasing new machinery. Through our cutting-edge paint shop and meticulous rebuilding process, we have mastered the art of rejuvenating end-of-life equipment by replacing or refurbishing its key components, providing our customers with a renewed asset experience at significantly reduced prices.

Specializing in equipment rebuilding tailored for the construction industry, with a primary focus on the Ready-Mix sector, Revitalize Mixers has amassed over 45 years of expertise in this field. Our seasoned team possesses invaluable insights into the vulnerabilities of various equipment components, ensuring that they receive extra attention during the rebuilding process. We begin by conducting a comprehensive evaluation of the assets requiring rebuilding, providing you with an accurate budget estimation for our rebuilding services. We approach our clients’ equipment with utmost care and respect, recognizing its pivotal role as the lifeblood of their companies.

At Revitalize Mixers, we manufacture high-quality, lightweight aluminum extension chutes for the Ready-Mix industry. Designed for durability and driver safety, our chutes reduce strain and injury without compromising strength. Featuring a replaceable liner, they offer a cost-effective solution—allowing you to replace only the liner instead of the entire chute. Proudly made in the USA, our chutes are built with a relentless commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

We are dedicated to continuous improvement, and stand firmly behind our mission statement, which encapsulates our commitment: “To delivering the best rebuilds, building the best equipment, and fostering enduring relationships for the future.”

At Rugged Thread, we envision a future where repair is valued as a respected career path and essential trade skill. Join us in pioneering a sustainable future for the outdoor industry—one stitch at a time.

Name: Su Pompa ve Arıtma Teknolojileri
Description:
Xylem’in Adana’dan Van’a kadar uzanan geniş bir coğrafyadaki tek yetkili servis bayisi olan Su Pompa, pompa sistemleri alanında güvenilir ve hızlı satış sonrası hizmetler sunmaktadır.

Uzun yıllara dayanan sektörel deneyimimiz, uzman ekibimiz ve teknik bilgi birikimimizle, pompa sistemlerinin güvenli ve verimli çalışmasını sağlamak için en doğru ve etkili çözümleri sunuyoruz.

Bölgedeki tüm müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sağlayabilmek adına atölyemizi stratejik olarak Gaziantep’te konumlandırdık. Hızlı ve kesintisiz servis desteğimizle, müşterilerimizin operasyonlarını aksatmadan sürdürmelerini ve ekipmanlarının maksimum verimlilikle çalışmasını sağlamak en büyük önceliğimizdir.

Flygt başta olmak üzere, tüm marka pompa çözümleri için geniş bir yedek parça stoğuna sahibiz ve tüm bakım/onarım işlemlerinde yalnızca orijinal yedek parçalar kullanıyoruz.

Ayrıca, 70’ten fazla kiralık pompamız ile beklenmedik durumlara karşı hızlı ve etkin çözümler sunarak işletmelerin çalışmalarına kesintisiz devam etmesini sağlıyoruz.

 Yetkili Olduğumuz İller:
Gaziantep, Adana, Hatay, Mersin, Osmaniye, Malatya, Kahramanmaraş, Adıyaman, Şanlıurfa, Diyarbakır, Batman, Mardin, Bitlis, Van, Siirt, Şırnak, Hakkari.

Hizmetlerimiz:
 Flygt marka pompa sistemleri için yetkili servis hizmeti

 Orijinal yedek parça temini

Description:

 ¿Qué hacemos?
Facilitamos el acceso a repuestos reciclados de calidad, generando hasta un 60% de ahorro, promoviendo la economía circular y reduciendo el impacto ambiental de la industria automotriz. 

 ¿Por qué existimos?
Porque cada año en LATAM se destruyen el 95% de las autopartes, generando perdidas por un valor superior a 10.000 millones de dólares, nosotros vinimos a cambiar eso.

 Nuestra visión:
Ser la aplicación líder en reciclado de autopartes en la región, creando un ecosistema transparente, eficiente y sustentable.

 Sumate al cambio
Trabajamos con desarmaderos certificados, aseguradoras líderes y cientos de talleres que apuestan por una movilidad más responsable. 

Reciklo es la próxima gran disrupción en movilidad sostenible.

Name: Carbana Car Wash
Description:
Carbana started, based on the belief that car washes in the UK could be much better.

Business partners Simon Moxon and Wayne Munnelly understand that the majority of UK hand car washes were in a deplorable state. A lot of petrol forecourt car wash offerings were substandard and had inconsistent quality, ineffective hardware which was quite often out of service. Sites were unattractive with no emphasis on environmental issues and in some cases staff were controlled by modern slavery, with unfair wages and a lack of protective clothing. There was also an apparent inefficiency in water usage, acid chemical and waste runoff into main sewers, and poor compliance with environmental laws.

Both Moxon and Munnelly knew there is a much better way, so Carbana started to be developed.

Carbana’s mission is to professionalise car cleaning in the UK with a high quality, technology driven, eco-friendly self-serve car washing brand.

Carbana wants its customers to have both a Clean Car and Clean Conscience today!

Name: Metal Molas.
Description:
A Metal Molas: Uma história de tradição e inovação

Fundada em 1984 como oficina de reforma de implementos rodoviários e caminhões, a Metal Molas expandiu seus horizontes ao longo dos anos, construindo uma sólida reputação de qualidade e inovação.

Nossa história:

Início (1984): Oficina especializada em manutenção de implementos rodoviários e caminhões, incluindo suspensão, molas, caixas de carga, peças e acessórios, solda, alongamento e encurtamento de chassis.
Crescimento e diversificação: Evolução para a fabricação de implementos rodoviários, como carrocerias prancha, tanques de carga e tanques para produtos perigosos.
Inovação (2019): Criação da Metal Plasma, linha dedicada ao corte e dobra de aço carbono e aço inox, atendendo clientes internos e externos. Fabricação de perfis dobrados, estruturais, chapas calandradas, flanges metálicas, corte a plasma de alta resolução e conjuntos soldados sob medida.

A Metal Molas hoje:
Empresa consolidada: Referência em implementos rodoviários e corte e dobra, com foco em qualidade, tradição e inovação.
Soluções completas: Ampla gama de produtos e serviços para atender às necessidades específicas de cada cliente.
Compromisso com a excelência: Equipe altamente qualificada, processos otimizados e tecnologia de ponta garantem produtos e serviços de alto nível.

Metal Molas: Sua parceira ideal para o sucesso.

Name: OtoDoktor
Description:
1991 yılından bugüne Nissan Yetkili Bayii ve Servisi olarak faaliyetlerine devam etmekte olan Okar Otomotiv Paz. ve Dış Tic. AŞ’nin bir markası olarak 2008 yılında Adana’da hizmet vermeye başlayan OtoDoktor, hali hazırda 6.500 m2’’si kapalı alan olmak üzere toplam 9.000 m2 alanda, bölgenin en büyük hasar onarım merkezlerinden biri olmanın yanı sıra Türkiye’nin en büyük Bosch Car Servisi olma unvanını da taşımaktadır.
Yetkili Servis tecrübesi üzerine inşa edilen OtoDoktor markasının 2018 yılında İstanbul/Kartal’da faaliyetlerine başlayan OtoDoktor Kartal Şubesi ise, 2.700 m2‘si kapalı alan olmak üzere toplamda 4.500 m2 üzerine kurulu olarak Türkiye’nin en büyük Bosch Car Servislerinden birisi konumundadır.
Adana’da 13, İstanbul Kartal’da 3 yılı aşkın süredir hizmet veremeye devam eden OtoDoktor , başta anlaşmalı olduğu DRD Filo Kiralama, Garenta, Hedef Filo Kiralama, Leaseplan, ALD Automotive, Oto Plan, Garanti Filo, Borlease, Teb Arval, Burgan Oto Leasing gibi Türkiye’nin önde gelen filo kiralama şirketleri ve AKSigorta, Allianz, Anadolu, HDI, Sompo Japan, Groupama, Magdeburger, Doğa, Gulf, Ray, Unico, Mapfre, Zurich, Eureko, Ankara, Ethica, Neova, Bereket, Koru, Quicq, Orient, Türkiye, Generali gibi Türkiye’nin önde gelen sigorta şirketlerine, bakım, onarım servisi ve hasar merkezi olarak hizmet vermektedir.
OtoDoktor Adana ve Kartal Şubeleri, Bosch Car Service güvencesi ile özel servis olarak marka ve model ayrımı olmadan TS-12047 Belgesi kapsamında tüm garantili araçlara, garantisi bozulmadan yetkili servis standartlarında periyodik bakım ve onarım hizmetleri de sunmaktadır.
Filo ve özel araçlar için özel bir yaklaşımla “müşteri memnuniyeti önceliğini” ilke olarak benimseyen OtoDoktor, uzman personeli ve yönetim ekibi ile iş ortaklarının da çıkarlarını gözeterek sektörün önemli oyuncuları arasına girmiş ve tercih edilen bir marka haline gelmiştir.

Service  (omiSae)

Availability  (omisAe)

Name: PROTAC BRASIL
Description:
A Protac Brasil é uma empresa que oferece soluções completas de engenharia e infraestrutura, com uma sólida atuação em todo o Brasil e uma especialização em tratamento anticorrosão no Caribe, incluindo Guadalupe, Martinica, Guiana Francesa, Saint Martin e Saint Barthélemy.

PROTAC BRASIL - Atuação no Brasil

No Brasil, estamos à frente de projetos de engenharia e infraestrutura, incluindo construção civil, saneamento básico, rodovias e obras industriais. Nossos serviços são voltados para garantir a modernização e expansão da infraestrutura nacional, sempre com foco em qualidade, inovação tecnológica e sustentabilidade. Nossa equipe de profissionais experientes está comprometida com a entrega de projetos que impactam positivamente o desenvolvimento do país.

PROTAC - Atuação no Caribe 

No Caribe, somos especialistas em tratamento anticorrosão, atuando em regiões com condições climáticas extremas que exigem proteção robusta para as infraestruturas locais. Oferecemos soluções avançadas que garantem a durabilidade e segurança de estruturas industriais, marítimas e de construção civil, prevenindo danos causados pela corrosão e assegurando a longevidade das operações.

Combinando tecnologia de ponta, sustentabilidade e excelência operacional, a Protac Brasil é um parceiro confiável tanto para projetos de grande escala no Brasil quanto para soluções especializadas de proteção anticorrosiva. 

Protac Brasil – Construindo e protegendo o futuro com inovação e confiança.

Name: Volvo Truck Center Saint Etienne – Andrézieux
MMPower Garage
Description: Yillardir araçlara ilgili bir birey olma fikrinden çikip kendi araçlarimi hazirlamaya karar verdigimde yil 1998 idi. Bu takvim yilinin baslamasiyla birey olarak araç modifikasyonu adina projeler yapmaya basladik. 1998 – 2004 Yillari arasinda çok fazla marka ve model araç ile ilgilendik ve projelerini gerçeklestirdik. Modifiye adina yapilan, gördügüm çok fazla yanlis araç projelerinden dolayi kendi markami olusturma karari aldik. Tarihler 2004’ ü gösterdiginde ise markalasmanin profesyonellik ve kurumsallik adina şirketimize ve ülkemize verim katabilecegi düsüncesi ile MMPower markasini kurduk. Markanin tescil ve patentini almamızla birlikte 2004 yilindan itibaren yapmis oldugum projelerimi MMPower markasi ile tamamladik. MMPower markasina ilk olarak Kayseri Hürriyet Mahallesinde açmis oldugumuz 70m2 kapali alani olan yerimizde basladik ve 2008 yilina kadar ayni adresimizde devam ettik. 2008 yilinda Kayseri Yeni Sanayide 125m2 yeni yerimize geçtik ve yeni projelerimizi bu adreste hazirlamaya basladik. 2015 yilina kadar iki farkli adreste dünyaca da kabullenen ve çok genis formlarda yer alan projelere imza attik. Bu linkteki projeler bölümü ile yapmis oldugumuz tüm projenin baslangiçtan itibaren bitmis oldugumuz ana kadar tüm fotograflarini yayinladik. Bu sayede dünya çapinda takip edilebilir bir Garage haline gelditirdik. 2015 yilinda ise Kayseri Tunca Caddesinde 300m2 kapali 600m2 açik alani olan yeni showroom'umuza geçtik. Burada Garage-Showroom olusumu saglamak adina görselligi ile dünya standartlarinda bir alan olusturduk. Bu Garage’ imda bitirmis oldugumuz projelerimizi sergiliyor ve yeni projelerimizi yapiyoruz.

Name: Rope access services co
Description:
Our primary objective is to successfully complete the job with the highest level of safety measures to protect not only our valued staff, but your property and the environment. For this reason, we follow the established Industrial Rope Access Trade Association (IRATA) practices and use the highest quality equipment.

IRATA International’s rope access system is a safe and efficient means of gaining access to workplaces that are difficult to reach through the use of ropes and specifically designed equipment. The system allows for work to be done with minimal impact on non-related operations or the surroundings. In addition, it gets the work done with less risk and at a lower cost than other alternative access methods.

As part our integral commitment to quality and safety, all of our equipment is from Petzl, which means it is of the highest standard and IRATA approved.
We provide a professional, safe, cost-effective, and efficient means of accessing difficult to reach areas for inspection, maintenance, and construction. Our professionally IRATA trained and experienced staff follow the highest standards of industry safety and operational standards.

as well as all intertainment games installation,inspection and maintenance such as zip lining, alpine slides, bungee jumping.

Our team is committed to providing the highest standards of quality and safety while providing flexible and timely rope access service.

Name: D3 Services Group
Description:
At D3, we’re setting new standards in vehicle repairs and alloy wheel refurbishment, blending technical expertise with sustainability to help our customers and businesses meet their goals.

Based in Bedford, we offer comprehensive services tailored to individual vehicle owners, fleets, and businesses across the UK.

Our Services
 Insurance-Approved Accident Repair Centre
Trusted by insurers, our Bedford repair centre specialises in everything from cosmetic damage to major collision repairs. Our skilled technicians use manufacturer-approved techniques to restore vehicles to the highest standard, ensuring safety and quality.

 EV & Hybrid Specialist Repairs
As electric and hybrid vehicles grow in popularity, we’re ahead of the curve. Our team is fully trained to repair and maintain EVs and hybrids, equipped with the knowledge and tools to handle advanced systems safely and efficiently.

 Alloy Wheel Refurbishment & Powder Coating
Our Bedford-based facility provides expert alloy wheel refurbishment, including premium powder coating for a flawless, durable finish. Whether it’s minor scuffs or a complete colour change, we ensure wheels are restored to their best.

UK-Wide Mobile Paintless Dent Removal (PDR)
Our mobile PDR service offers a convenient and eco-friendly solution for repairing dents, including hail damage, across the UK.

Why PDR?

Environmentally Friendly: No paint, fillers, or waste, reducing your carbon footprint.
Cost-Effective: A more affordable alternative to traditional repairs.
Fast & Efficient: Minimal downtime for individuals and fleets.
Supports Sustainability Goals: Helps fleets align with Net Zero CO2 targets by lowering emissions linked to repair processes.

Fleet operators benefit from our PDR service, which ensures repairs are fast, sustainable, and cost-effective—helping businesses meet government mandates on carbon neutrality while keeping vehicles on the road.

Name: BUBU
Description:
BUBU se destaca como pionera en España al especializarse en la economía circular aplicada a los accesorios de bebé. Nuestra misión es impulsar un enfoque ecológico y sostenible al ayudar a las familias a recuperar y prolongar el uso de sus sillas de paseo, coches infantiles y otros accesorios esenciales. 

En BUBU ayudamos a las familias a recuperar y extender la vida útil de los accesorios de sus niñ@s, contribuyendo a un enfoque más ecológico y consciente del consumo. Estamos comprometidos con la creación de un impacto positivo en el medio ambiente, ofreciendo soluciones innovadoras que transforman la manera en utilizamos los productos para bebés.

En el corazón de nuestra propuesta ecológica, destacamos dos pilares fundamentales: nuestro Centro de Impresión 3D y nuestro Espacio de Desguace, que reflejan nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad y la reutilización.

Centro de Impresión 3D:
Nuestra avanzada tecnología de impresión 3D nos permite crear componentes personalizados y optimizados para la reparación y mejora de accesorios para bebés. Este centro no solo representa eficiencia y precisión, sino también la capacidad de ofrecer soluciones específicas que prolongan la vida útil de los productos de manera sostenible.

Espacio de Desguace:
Aquí es donde la innovación y la ecoeficiencia convergen. En nuestro Espacio de Desguace, desmontamos y reciclamos cuidadosamente materiales de accesorios desgastados o no utilizados, permitiendo la reutilización de componentes valiosos. Este proceso circular es clave para nuestra misión de reducir residuos y fomentar la economía circular.

Estos puntos de innovación definen nuestra propuesta eco, impulsando un cambio significativo en la forma en que percibimos y gestionamos los productos para bebés. En BUBU, estamos modelando un camino hacia un futuro más sostenible y consciente, donde la tecnología y la responsabilidad ambiental se encuentran para crear soluciones inteligentes y respetuosas con el planeta.

Name: Sash Man - Sash Window Repair Specialist
Description:
Sash windows are a beautiful and timeless addition to any home. However, the can deteriorate over time, but this doesn’t have to be a cause for concern. If you are looking for a way to restore your sash windows to their former glory, then look no further.

I’m able to repair your windows and old timberwork in a minimally invasive way using a combination specialist resins and traditional joinery. This means that less of the original timber needs to be removed, which helps to preserve the character of the window. Additionally, using resin creates a very strong and durable repair that will last for many years.

Name: Pyramid Door Specialists
Description:
Through our employed team of qualified engineers we offer a24 hour, 365 day service, to meet our customer's demands. Including our exclusive 2 hour emergency response, whether you require a Locksmith, Carpenter, Automatic Doors or a Shutter Engineer.

With much research we realise that it can be the greatest single benefit to offer easy access to any member of the public with the benefits of automatic doors. From disabled people, elderly to small children can experience problems using traditional manual doors due to the physical effort that is required. The situation is often made worse that needed by poor door and access designs and the use of heavy door closer. Here we will find a full range of solutions to fit any needs of entry with engineers with many years of experience.

*Automatic doors, are serviced twice annually to the legal required specification BS7036. Providing replacement parts and new installations.

*Industrial doors, Roller shutters, grills, folding shutters, sectional doors, rapid rolling doors require regular service as they are subjected to punishing wear and tear, industrial doors serviced to provisions and use of work equipment regulations and workplace health and safety and welfare regulations act 1992, consequently maintaining doors, ensure they are legal and safe.

*Manual doors, a detailed inspection to panic emergency hardware, hinges, door closers, transom closers and bottom pivots. All necessary adjustments are carried out at six monthly intervals, ensuring closing speeds are correct and that doors are latching properly.

*Access control. Key pads, magnetic locks, swipe cards, security systems supplied and fitted, by Pyramid Door Specialists.

*Lock care. Keys, lock cases, profile cylinders, combination locks and electronic locks can be supplied and fitted by Pyramid Door Specialists, serviced and maintained as part of your door care maintenance to ensure access is optimised all year round

Name: Däckverket
Description:
Däckverket is a Swedish ownership group of independently run tyre service workshops.

We bring together well-managed, profitable workshops with strong local leadership and long-standing customer relationships. Each business continues to operate under its own management, close to customers, employees and everyday decisions.

Däckverket is not a chain and not a franchise. We do not rebrand workshops or centralise day-to-day operations. Our role is to support the people who already know their business best.

The group focuses primarily on private customers and recurring demand, particularly through tyre hotel services. In parallel, several of our workshops serve heavy vehicles, construction and agricultural customers, where reliability and operational competence are critical.

Our central organisation is deliberately small. It exists to support the workshops in areas where shared structure adds value over time, such as operational improvement initiatives, process development, digital tools and structured knowledge-sharing between owners and managers.

An important part of our model is long-term alignment. Sellers are offered the opportunity to reinvest, and employees can participate through a co-investment programme. We believe that shared ownership creates continuity, responsibility and better decisions over time.

Däckverket’s primary focus is the Swedish market, where we see significant remaining potential. At the same time, the way the group is being built naturally attracts interest beyond Sweden.

We believe that durable value in service businesses is created from the inside out, through professionalism, curiosity and respect for the people who run the operations every day..

Name: CENTRO RIPARAZIONI PIACENTINO
Description:
CHI SIAMO
Nel nome la sua storia: nasce nel 1977 il Centro Riparazioni Piacentino dalle radici della “F.lli Repetti” fondata nel 1958 su iniziativa dei fratelli Francesco, Luigi e Giuseppe come officina generica dedicata ai veicoli industriali. Dal 1983 e per 40 anni Dealer Iveco, CRP presidia uno dei più importanti crocevia commerciali italiani ed oggi rappresenta un punto di riferimento per il commercio e la riparazione di veicoli industriali e commerciali nuovi ed usati delle migliori marche. Guidata dal CEO Stefano Repetti il service riveste un ruolo fondamentale per il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di crescita, al passo con l’innovazione tecnologico-ambientale e con le nuove e sempre più mutevoli esigenze del mercato. CRP oggi è service autorizzato MAN Truck & Bus e fornisce servizi di assistenza e riparazione per tutti i veicoli commerciali ed industriali multi-brand ed assistenza su strada 24H per il brand tedesco, trasporto persone compreso; nel corso del 2022 acquisisce i mandati di officina autorizzata ASTRA e RAVO, leader mondiale nella produzione e vendita di spazzatrici stradali urbane. A disposizione dei clienti anche un servizio di revisioni per veicoli inferiori e superiori ai 35 q.li e di calibrazione e taratura dei tachigrafi analogici e digitali. L’officina, che si estende su di una superficie di quasi 5.000 mq. gestisce separatamente le gamme con operai altamente qualificati. Disponiamo di una zona adibita alla riparazione della gamma medio/pesante con 14 postazioni, 3 buche di ispezione, 6 ponti ed un’area dedicata alla gamma light con 8 postazioni e 7 ponti di cui uno riservato – nel caso – ai camper ed ai veicoli blindati. Tra le due zone un corridoio centrale in grado di contenere fino a 10 postazioni dinamiche e ben 5 carri ponti tra i 5 ed i 10 ton.. Nel 2023 diveniamo anche Dealer del Gruppo Koelliker per tutta la gamma LCV elettrica per il marchio MAXUS, installatori dei sistemi MOBILEYE e dei sistemi oleodinamici Bezares.

Name: Ouros
Description: Ouros is specialized in the maintenance of windmill blades. We provide a complete service of inspection, repair and maintenance of blades. We do not only supply the necessary equipment to reach the blades but also the required technicians for the maintenance. We achieve a minimal downtime of the wind turbine thanks to our flexible and efficient working methods. In under 1 hour we can safely examine all blades of a wind turbine by means of a drone. We have an own extensive fleet of aerial platforms up to 103m working height. Our specialized operators are experienced and well-trained in both blade repair and working safely at heights. We dispose of two service platforms in our assortment and therefore we have maximum flexibility in our planning and complete independence. With a service platform we can always work regardless of the weather conditions thanks to the heated cabin that can be closed off, rain and humidity protection and lighted work spot. If you want to do your own maintenance and repair you can also turn to us for the rental of the necessary equipment. We are a member of the group Groep Maes which has over 45 years of experience in working on heights. In 2006 we met the need for a full service for blades with Ouros.

In addition to our Dhollandia tail lift offering, we stock and supply Pommier products. Pommier is a leading specialist in the supply of equipment and accessories for industrial vehicle bodies.

The Pommier range includes 7 Product Universes: couplings, protections, fixings, openings and lighting designed and manufactured at their own plants, along with sub-frame accessories and additional bodywork accessories selected from amongst the most prestigious suppliers.

We service and perform maintenance and repairs on other competitor brands, as well as provide hassle-free warranty assistance on Dhollandia tail lifts. Our national breakdown service is available for 24 hours.

Name: DSP SERVICE Le Mans
Description:
Centre d'esthétique et de protection automobile en Sarthe
Spécialiste de la réparation (intérieure / extérieure) et de la protection carrosserie automobile depuis près de 2013. DSP SERVICE est un centre accrédité Gtechniq, Colourlock et Skyfol.

Seul centre accrédité GTechniq pour le secteur de la Sarthe, nos traitements céramiques sont garantis jusqu’à 9 ans. Nous utilisons des produits de grande qualité lors de la préparation de votre véhicule afin de vous offrir un résultat parfait après traitement.

Nous avons choisi de travailler avec la gamme de film de protection PPF Skyfol pour leur grande qualité de film. Garantie de 10 à 12 ans, il offre une finition incomparable et une protection de carrosserie digne de ce nom. Votre véhicule ainsi protégé pourra performer sur circuit ou sur route, sans risques d'endommager la carrosserie.

Nos réparations intérieures, quant à elles, sont réalisées en partie avec la gamme de teinte Colourlock. Formés depuis 2018, nous sommes devenus un centre incontournable pour les repigmentations des cuirs automobiles. Nous travaillons également en étroite collaboration avec des selliers des environs pour proposer toujours plus de services à nos clients.

Forte d’une expérience de près de 12 ans dans l’esthétique automobile, DSP SERVICE s’adresse à tous les professionnels de l’automobile et à tous les particuliers méticuleux désirant confier la remise en état de leurs véhicules à un professionnel reconnu partout dans le secteur. Les professionnels de l'automobile de luxe connaissent et reconnaissent la qualité de notre travail et n'hésitent pas à faire appel à nous.

Que ce soit le traitement céramique, la repigmentation des cuirs ou la pose de film PPF, nos services permettent de mettre en valeur et de protéger durablement votre véhicule.

Welcome to Egaragi, the ultimate destination for all your automotive needs. Whether you're looking to buy or sell a car, rent a vehicle, or need reliable roadside assistance, Egaragi provides it all.
Our mission is to provide a seamless, transparent, and user-friendly experience by integrating everything you need for your automotive journey in one place. From car service and maintenance to insurance, spare parts, and auctions, we bring all aspects of vehicle ownership under one roof. With Egaragi, you can confidently navigate every step of the automotive process—whether you're a buyer, seller, or simply need ongoing support.

Key Features of Egaragi

•	Car Buy/Sell: A trusted marketplace to buy new, used, or certified pre-owned cars. Sellers can easily list their vehicles, while buyers can access a wide selection of options with transparent pricing and verified listings.
•	Car Service & Maintenance: Keep your vehicle in top condition with our comprehensive car service and maintenance offerings. Book regular check-ups, oil changes, tire rotations, and repairs at trusted service centers near you.
•	Roadside Assistance: We offer 24/7 roadside assistance, providing you with emergency support when you need it the most—whether you're locked out, need a tow, or require a jump start.
•	Vehicle Insurance: Protect your vehicle with flexible and affordable insurance plans. Our platform connects you with top insurers, allowing you to compare options and choose the coverage that best fits your needs.
•	Car Rentals: Need a car for a short-term trip or a specific purpose? Rent vehicles from a wide selection, with easy booking and flexible rental terms that suit your schedule and budget.

Drive into the future of automotive services with Egaragi

Name: Thybotech Industriservice ApS
Description:
En virksomhed på et fundament af solidt og ærligt håndværk
Thybotech ApS udfører reparationer, renovering og service af pumper og produktionsmaskiner. Vi er en kundeorienteret virksomhed, der er funderet på gode relationer og langvarige kunde forhold.
Thybotech blev grundlagt i 2007 af indehaver Thorben Nørskov. Thorben er uddannet som maskinarbejder hos Grønkjær Maskinværksted, hvor han var 5 år inden turen via Colaplast gik til Hanstholm Skibssmedie. Næste stop blev Århus Olie. Efter seks år hos Århus Olie med bl.a indkøb og bearbejdelse af reservedele til maskiner og pumper havde Thorben mod og lyst til at starte for sig selv. Den erfaring Thorben havde tilegnet sig med reparation af maskindele og pumper fra de to steder, overbevidste ham. Der var et marked for en lille nichevirksomhed inden for reparation af pumper og maskinanlæg. 
Siden da er det gået stærkt. Flere virksomheder har nemlig set fordelene ved at outsource reparation og serviceopgaver til Thybotech. Det giver virksomhederne flexibilitet og tilmed en billigere løsning udført af specialister med up date udstyr og kompetencer. Finanskrisen har ændret smid væk og køb nyt mentaliteten. Desuden har mange erfaret at reparationer giver væsentlige energibesparelser, hvilket blot har forstærket out sourcing tendensen.

Thybotech 2014
Thybotech beskæftiger i dag 5 fuldtidsmedarbejdere plus nogle få ind lejede i spidslast perioder. En ambitiøs kundeorienteret vækst strategi er dog et klart signal om virksomhedens ambitioner. Børsen Gazelle virksomhed i 2012 og en kredit rating AA i 2012 og 2013 vidner om en solid virksomhed og er samtidig det synlige bevis på den eksplosive udvikling firmaet har været gennem.
Thybotech har ingen stor administration. De udgifter vi sparer til det, vil vi hellere lade komme kunden til gode, hvilket konkret udmønter sig i skarpe konkurrencedygtige priser – med høj kvalitet vel at mærke.

Sealcoating: We use high-quality sealants to protect your asphalt surfaces from water penetration, oil, salt, and sun damage, extending the lifespan of your parking lot and maintaining its fresh, attractive appearance.

Crack Repair: We expertly address cracks in your asphalt, preventing further damage and deterioration. Our efficient repair processes restore your parking lots to their optimal condition.

Pothole Patching: Our team swiftly patches potholes, mitigating safety hazards and improving the overall look and functionality of your commercial spaces.

Line Striping: We provide precise line striping services for clear navigation and efficient traffic flow, meeting ADA and local regulations.

Liability Reduction: We help you address potential liability concerns such as potholes, ADA violations, and other safety hazards. Our services are designed to ensure a safe and pleasant experience for your customers and protect your business.

At Ox Asphalt, we're more than just a service provider - we're your trusted partner in maintaining the quality and safety of your commercial property. We're committed to delivering on our promises and exceeding your expectations with our professionalism and attention to detail. Trust us to bring the expertise and dedication your project deserves.

Name: The CAR Coalition
Description:
The CAR Coalition is an organization of independent auto parts makers, insurers, retailers and groups working to make sure consumers have the right to choose how and where they get their vehicles fixed.

Automakers want to steer vehicle owners to their own, higher-priced repair shops and prevent consumers from accessing their vehicle data, which are often needed for repairs.

We say this is wrong.

The CAR Coalition is supporting two bills in Congress – the REPAIR Act (H.R. 1566/S. 1379) and the SMART Act – that would create national laws that would give consumers the right to have access to their vehicle data and the ability to use independent repair shops and aftermarket parts.

Ao longo dos anos, acompanhamos de perto a evolução do mundo automotivo, incorporando constantemente as mais recentes tecnologias e tendências. Name: Clarke Service
Description:
Clarke Service er en del af Clarke-koncernen, som også består af Clarke Entreprise og Clarke Solutions. Vi leverer ikke bare håndværkerservice – vi leverer værdiskabende løsninger, der gør en reel forskel for vores kunder. 

Vores fornemmeste opgave er at gøre hverdagen nemmere for ejendomsselskaber, boligforeninger og virksomheder ved at kombinere høj kvalitet, pålidelighed og effektiv udførelse – hver gang.

Uanset om opgaven omfatter istandsættelse af flyttelejligheder, reparationer eller andre serviceydelser, så er vi det sikre valg. 

Kvalitet og ansvar i højsædet
Hos Clarke Service er vi bevidste om vores ansvar. Vi forstår vigtigheden af at repræsentere vores kunders værdier og standarder i enhver sammenhæng.

Derfor vægter vi kvalitet, ansvar og ordentlighed i alt, vi gør. Vi repræsenterer vores kunders standarder med respekt og omhu – og vi går aldrig på kompromis med resultatet.

Kerneværdier
Vores arbejde er bygget på fire kerneværdier, der sikrer kvalitet og tryghed for vores kunder:

Ordentlighed: Vi leverer løsninger, hvor intet bliver overset, og alt er i orden.
Tillid: Vi skaber stærke relationer til vores kunder gennem åben og ærlig kommunikation.
Tryghed: Vi sikrer, at du som kunde altid kan føle dig tryg ved både proces og det resultat.
Troværdighed: Vi står på mål for det, vi lover, og leverer altid med høj faglighed og præcision.

Clarke Service er en del af Clarke Entreprise, hvilket giver os et stærkt fundament og solid erfaring fra byggebranchen. Det sikrer en unik mulighed for tværfaglige løsninger, at vi kan trække på ekspertise indenfor både renovering, istandsættelse og vedligeholdelse – med den høje standard og professionalisme, som Clarke Entreprise er kendt for.

Vi arbejder primært i København og Nordsjælland samt på Frederiksberg, hvor vi servicerer både større og mindre virksomheder samt boligforeninger mv. 

Uanset om der er tale om akut assistance, en fast serviceaftale eller en større istandsættelse, står vi klar til at hjælpe.

Nossa cultura empresarial é fundamentada em valores essenciais. Ao longo de mais de 10 anos, impactamos positivamente milhões de pessoas, valorizando seu patrimônio e transformando ambientes. Nossa experiência e compromisso com a excelência nos consolidaram como referência no mercado de pintura predial. 

Utilizamos materiais de alta qualidade e técnicas avançadas para garantir resultados excepcionais em cada projeto. Nossos serviços incluem pintura externa e interna, revitalização de fachadas, tratamento de superfícies, entre outros.

Compreendemos as necessidades específicas desse segmento e oferecemos soluções personalizadas, destacando-nos como parceiros confiáveis no cuidado e valorização dos imóveis.

 Sob a liderança do CEO Junior Reginato, profissional com MBA em Marketing Estratégico e Gestão de Clientes, e formação em Engenharia Civil, contamos com uma equipe altamente qualificada de pintores e especialistas. Comprometidos em entregar resultados de excelência em cada projeto, superando as expectativas dos nossos clientes.

Em 2022, tivemos o orgulho de impactar positivamente mais de 207.000 famílias com nossos serviços de pintura predial. Essa conquista é um reflexo do nosso compromisso com a qualidade, a satisfação do cliente e a excelência em cada projeto que realizamos.

140 kişilik uzman ekibimizle, araç sahiplerinin ve şoförlerin daha iyi standartlarda, daha mutlu hizmet vermeleri için tutkuyla çalışıyoruz.

Ege Bölgesi’nde, 2 tesiste Ford Trucks, Otokar, Anadolu Sigorta, HDI Sigorta, Allianz Sigorta gibi global ve ulusal markaların distribütörlüğünü ve bayiliğini yapıyor; müşterilerimiz için değer yaratma misyonumuzla tüm hizmet standartlarını sağlıyoruz. Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını doğru anlamak ve en uygun çözümleri geliştirmek bizim uzmanlığımızın, sorumluluklarımızın ve taahhütlerimizin çerçevesini belirliyor.

360 Derece Ağır Ticari Araç Hizmetimizle araçların kesintisiz olarak hizmet vermesine, işletme sürelerinin artmasına, karlılığın yükselmesine ve böylece şirketlerin iş hedeflerine ulaşmasına destek oluyoruz. Tüm faaliyetlerimizin temelinde yatan ‘Müşterilerimiz için değerli olanı koruma’ felsefemiz, Büyükkarcı marka kimliğini oluşturuyor.

Bizler, verdiğimiz hizmetin sonucunda, tüm paydaşlarımız için daha iyi bir yaşam yaratabileceğimize inanıyoruz. Yolculukları, güvenli ve keyifli bir hale dönüştürmek için çalışıyoruz.

Biz, şoförlerin taşıdığı sorumluluğun farkındayız.

Taşıdıkları şeyin sadece yük olmadığını; yolculuklarına umutlarını, hayallerini ve hasretlerini de çıkardıklarını biliyoruz.

Bu yüzden bizler, en zor koşullarda dahi müşterilerimizi yarı yolda bırakmayız.

Çünkü, 38 yıllık yol arkadaşları olarak biliyoruz ki…

Hayat, Yolda Olmaktır!

At Wayne's retirement, he wanted to ensure that the tradition continued and as of May 2022 the company was sold to Bob & Shelley Harder. Name: ST Metrologia
Description:
O alicerce que guia a nossa precisão.
Nossos valores são a bússola que orienta cada calibração, cada decisão e cada relacionamento. Eles nasceram da nossa história e são o compromisso com o nosso futuro.
1. Transparência e Honestidade Radical
Acreditamos que a confiança é construída com ações e palavras claras. Agimos com integridade inegociável, mantendo canais abertos com clientes, colaboradores e parceiros. Aqui, o certo é feito mesmo quando ninguém está olhando.
2. Respeito que inspira
Valorizamos cada indivíduo, sua história e seu potencial. Cultivamos um ambiente onde todos são tratados com dignidade, justiça e equidade. Rejeitamos qualquer forma de injustiça e promovemos um espaço seguro para que todos possam crescer.
3. Juntos Crescemos
Acreditamos que o sucesso de um é o sucesso de todos. Fomentamos uma cultura de colaboração e apoio, onde compartilhamos conhecimento e celebramos as conquistas alheias. Nosso desejo é que cada pessoa que cruza nosso caminho alcance seus objetivos.
4. Excelência com Propósito
Buscamos a precisão técnica não como um fim, mas como um meio para gerar confiança e segurança. Fazemos nosso trabalho com maestria porque sabemos que ele impacta vidas e negócios. Essa é a nossa contribuição para um mercado mais justo e eficiente.
5. Inspiração pelo Exemplo
Lideramos pela nossa trajetória. Acreditamos que a perseverança, a fé e a coragem de empreender são fontes de inspiração. Queremos motivar outros a transformarem seus sonhos em realidade, mostrando que é possível construir algo significativo com ética e trabalho duro.
PROPÓSITO
Existimos para transformar a relação entre prestador e cliente, provando que é possível prosperar com ética, transparência e generosidade. Acreditamos que, ao servir com excelência e ajudar nossos clientes e colaboradores a alcançarem seus sonhos, estamos construindo um legado que honra a Deus e fortalece nosso país.

Name: Artire Automotive
Description:
Artire Automotive is a premium tire and alignment shop located in Fremont, CA. 

Our high-quality shop is dedicated to getting you back on the road faster than other shops. We offer a comprehensive range of tire and wheel services, including wheel alignment, mount and balance, tire rotation, tire repair, coil-over installation, brakes, and more. 

Our expert technicians use state-of-the-art Hunter Engineering & Corchi touchless tire machines to ensure efficient and damage-free tire mounting and balancing. With our focus on safety, we ensure full stopping power by installing OEM or aftermarket brake kits, stainless steel brake lines, and cooling ducts. 

As a family-owned and operated business, we take pride in providing exceptional service to all our customers, from enthusiasts cars to family minivans. Our tire selection features trusted brands like Falken Tires, Continental, BFGoodrich, Pirelli, Bridgestone, Hankook, Federal, Toyo, and many others.

Don't just take our word for it; our esteemed clients highlight our prompt appointment confirmations, quick turnaround times, exceptional results, and accommodating service. 

As Matt Field, driver - FORMULADRIFT puts it, "AR has been involved in drifting, providing a much-needed service to all of us drifters, since the beginning. Congrats on many good years in business guys, and cheers for many more to come!"

Visit our shop in Fremont, CA, and let us take care of your vehicle with professionalism and expertise. For more information, please visit www.artireautomotive.com.

Vous vous dîtes que l’entretien de votre toit n’est pas si important que ça ? 

Que ça fait 5 ans que vous n’avez pas de problèmes et que ça va continuer ainsi ? 

Pourtant + de 80% des fuites sont dues à un mauvais entretien des toits. 

C’est lorsqu’il est trop tard que vous faites appel à nous pour réparer votre toit.

Réparer votre toit peut devenir très coûteux.

Alors qu’entretenir sa toiture pendant 20 ans revient, en moyenne, 5 fois moins cher que de refaire votre toiture. 

De plus, grâce à l’entretien, vous prolongez la durée de vie de votre toit.

Chez Attila, nous nous chargeons de tout afin que vous ayez l’esprit libre pour vous concentrer sur votre coeur de métier.

Notre contrat d’entretien comprend : 

 Un diagnostic rédigé et photographique de l’état actuel de votre toit
 Un plan détaillé à court, moyen et long terme
 Les interventions nécessaires pour veiller au bon maintient de votre toit (retrait des déchets, contrôle des évacuations, des ventilations, etc…)
 Un bilan des actions réalisées par nos équipes pour connaitre l’état général de votre toiture.

Notre équipe intervient sur Montpellier et ses secteurs limitrophes (Vendargues, Le Crès, Jacou, Clapiers, Castries...).

Description:

Personal altamente capacitado, moderna tecnología de equipos y procesos productivos claramente normados, nos han permitido crecer de manera ininterrumpida en los últimos años.

Cuidadosos del medio ambiente, utilizamos desde hace años, productos libres de hidrocarburos y de bajo impacto ambiental para la limpieza de los motores, partes y piezas que reparamos en nuestros talleres.

Y ahora vamos un paso más allá
Decidimos remanufacturar partes, piezas y motores, evitando desechar los mismos. Esto es ARSA, nuestra marca en el servicio de recuperación y remanufactura de motores con la cual venimos trabajando desde hace 4 años.

En directa vinculación con lo anterior nos incorporamos al negocio del desguace de vehículos y obtuvimos la habilitación de todas las categorías del RUDAC.

Orgullosos de ello, queremos presentarnos como el aliado estratégico que su compañía necesita. Somos ARSA y estamos a su servicio.

Name: DSG Kitronic
Description:
With 12 years of experience in hydraulic and automotive spare parts manufacturing, we subject every part we produce to life test and dynamic and static tests with our young and expert team. All our products are guaranteed.

The Dq200 Dsg7 eliminates the aluminum plate cracking, breaking and loosening problems, which are chronic malfunctions in advanced transmissions, and the new generation developed hydraulic accumulator failures with the KITRONIC brand.

Since the aluminum plate is an aluminum alloy material, the expansion coefficients are higher.

Since the hydraulic accumulator is a steel alloy material, its expansion coefficient is less than aluminum. For this reason, loosening problem may occur as aluminum expands more.

Since mechatronics works between 42-60 bar, capillary and large cracks occur due to stretching. Therefore, as the hydraulic pump motor works more, it draws more current, which may cause card failures.

Due to pressure losses, the life of the pressure lining is shortened. Since the 24 bar N2-gas sealing elements in the original hydraulic accumulator wear out over time, the pressure inside decreases over time, and the vehicle does not give a fault code and does not fully fulfill its duty.

With the new generation developed hydraulic accumulator, all chronic malfunctions are eliminated. Late filling in the morning eliminates the problems of late reaction, provides a more comfortable driving experience while driving.

• Collision Repair & Paint: Restoring vehicles to showroom condition with precision craftsmanship
• Graphics: Turning your fleet into mobile billboards with custom wraps and decals
• Commercial Vehicle Upfitting: Equipping trucks and vans with the right tools, storage, and accessories
• Mechanical Service: Expert diagnostics, preventive maintenance, and heavy‑duty repairs
• Trailer Repair: Structural, lighting, braking, and flooring repairs to keep your trailers road‑worthy
• Graphics & Branding: Turning your fleet into mobile billboards with custom wraps and decals

With decades of hands‑on experience and a commitment to exceptional service at competitive prices, PSC keeps your operation moving—no matter the challenge.

Name: HHO Carbon Clean Systems, LLC
Description: HHO delivers increased power and performance in all internal combustion engines through our proprietary hydrogen carbon cleaning process.  Customers can expect increased fuel mileage, reduced wear on engine components, and less downtime out of their vehicles.  Many of the common issues with fleet vehicles are also addressed with hydrogen carbon cleaning.  Sticking turbos, persistent DPF regeneration, loss of engine power, cylinder scarring, and poor fuel economy  can all be mitigated or eliminated when using hydrogen carbon cleaning as a preventative maintenance item.  HHO Carbon Clean Systems provides convenient mobile service, allowing our customers to continue with business as usual during service calls.  In contrast with other engine cleaning methods, HHO uses the natural properties of hydrogen to remove carbon buildup and evacuate carbon gas through the exhaust system, the byproduct of which is water.  No harsh chemical detergents will pass through our customer's engines and no chemical offal will need to be captured upon completion.  HHO Carbon Clean Systems provides a green solution to the persistent automotive troubles of our clients, while also saving money, time, and headache.

Name: Everest Ascensori
Description:
Everest, storica azienda di installazione e manutenzione ascensori con oltre 70 anni di esperienza alle spalle, offre servizi completi, dalla manutenzione all'ammodernamento. La nostra squadra di ascensoristi si occupa regolarmente di ispezione e manutenzione per garantire efficienza e sicurezza per impianti multimarca. Ci dedichiamo anche all’ammodernamento degli impianti esistenti, che possono essere aggiornati per adottare le ultime tecnologie e normative di sicurezza.

La vasta gamma di sistemi di elevazione di Everest copre ascensori privati, condominiali, per imprese/industrie, medio e alto traffico, piattaforme elevatrici, montascale, montacarichi industriali, montavivande, scale e tappeti mobili. Everest è riconosciuta per la sua dedizione alla qualità, sicurezza e innovazione, tra le aziende leader nel settore ascensoristico italiano. 

Everest è un’azienda di famiglia, la famiglia Pozzoni generazione dopo generazione, si è dedicata a elevare i propri standard di qualità. La qualità è al centro del nostro approccio. Everest è certificata ISO 9001 dal 1996 e conforme alla Direttiva Ascensori. Abbiamo anche ottenuto l’ISO 14001 e ISO 45001, dimostrando l'impegno per la gestione ambientale e la sicurezza dei lavoratori.

Everest e la famiglia Pozzoni si impegnano da sempre nel sociale. La nostra visione va oltre gli ascensori e abbraccia l'assistenza delle persone e delle comunità in difficoltà. Lo facciamo con finanziamenti dedicati e programmi di sviluppo. 

La formazione è un punto di forza: in collaborazione con l’accademia ASLAM organizziamo corsi di formazione professionalizzanti, che consentono ai diplomati di diventare specializzati in manutenzione, riparazione e installazione di ascensori. 

Everest è sinonimo di impegno, affidabilità e sicurezza. Scegliere Everest vuol dire scegliere una storia lunga oltre un secolo, un impegno concreto per la qualità e un partner che vi accompagnerà verso l'alto, in modo affidabile e concreto.

Name: ESECO GmbH
Description:
ESECO ist der zuverlässige Partner für Reparaturen von Haushaltsgeräten und Elektronikgeräten. Erfahrene Servicetechniker sind in ganz Österreich unterwegs und stehen immer dann zur Verfügung, wenn es um rasche und effiziente Reparaturen in Haushalten geht.

Durch die Vor-Ort-Betreuung werden unnötige Transporte vermieden und das Risiko von Transportschäden an den Geräten minimiert. ESECO bietet die schnellste und bequemste Lösung für Reparaturanliegen – mit digitalisierten Prozessen und einem klaren Fokus auf Effizienz, ganz nach dem Motto: „Reparieren ist das neue Kaufen.“

Welche Geräte werden repariert?

ESECO repariert ein breites Spektrum an Haushalts- und Elektronikgeräten. Dazu gehören:

• Haushaltsgroßgeräte wie Waschmaschinen, Trockner, Geschirrspüler, Kühlschränke und E-Herde
• Unterhaltungselektronik wie Fernseher und Audiogeräte
• NEU ab 2025: Spezialgeräte in der E-Ladeinfrastruktur, darunter AC- und DC-Ladestationen für Elektrofahrzeuge

Spezialisierte Techniker diagnostizieren und beheben die meisten Fehler direkt vor Ort und sorgen so für eine schnelle Wiederherstellung der Funktionsfähigkeit.

Bundesweiter Reparaturbonus

Als offizieller Reparaturbonus-Partner setzt ESECO auf Nachhaltigkeit. Privatkunden haben die Möglichkeit, 50 % der Reparaturkosten ihrer Elektrogeräte durch den Reparaturbonus zurückerstattet zu bekommen. Ist ein Gerät defekt, finden Kunden über die Plattform reparatur.at und das Netzwerk von ESECO schnell einen qualifizierten Servicepartner in ihrer Nähe, der Reparaturanfragen zügig und professionell umsetzt.

Warum reparieren?

Reparieren bedeutet gelebte Nachhaltigkeit und Ressourcenschonung. Anstatt defekte Geräte zu ersetzen und Elektroschrott zu produzieren, trägt eine fachmännisch durchgeführte Reparatur dazu bei, die Lebensdauer der Geräte zu verlängern, einen Neukauf zu vermeiden und die Umwelt zu schonen. ESECO setzt sich aktiv für eine umweltfreundlichere Zukunft ein.

Our Products and Services:
1.	In-Situ Machining: We specialize in on-site machining services, eliminating the need for costly equipment disassembly and transportation. Our team of experienced technicians performs precision machining on-site, saving time and minimizing downtime.
2.	Flange Facing and Surface Machining: We offer expert flange facing and surface machining services, ensuring proper alignment, sealing, and smooth surfaces for critical joints. Our precise machining techniques guarantee accurate fitment and superior performance.
3.	Line Boring and Shaft Machining: Our line boring and shaft machining services cater to industries where precision alignment and repair of bores and shafts are essential. We utilize advanced equipment and techniques to restore components to their original specifications.
4.	Portable Milling and Drilling: We provide portable milling and drilling solutions for the accurate modification, repair, or fabrication of large components on-site. Our state-of-the-art milling machines and skilled operators deliver exceptional results.
5.	On-Site Welding and Metal Repair: We offer on-site welding and metal repair services, ensuring quick and efficient repairs of damaged or worn components. Our certified welders utilize advanced techniques and high-quality materials to restore integrity and extend the lifespan of equipment.
6.	Custom Machining Solutions: We understand that each client has unique requirements. Our team works closely with clients to develop tailored machining solutions that address specific challenges and deliver optimal results.

Name: ROG Habitat
Description:
Repair, maintenance and other activities in marine and petrochemical work environments often have large-scale consequences for production. Particularly when working with toxic, flammable or explosive substances. ROG Habitat offers the solution to work safely on specific parts of large installations: Hot Work Habitats.
ROG Habitat's flexible Hot Work Habitat is placed around the part of the installation to be worked. The Habitats have various transit options for pipes. By using positive pressure within the habitat, the transit seals airtight around the continuous pipes and equipment. As a result, gases and other hazardous substances cannot enter the habitat.
Save time and money with ROG Habitat!

Name: RAYMOND AUTO BODY INC.
Description:
At Raymond Auto Body our goal is to restore your peace of mind - then we fix your car. After an accident, the last thing you need is to run around getting estimates, arranging rental cars, dealing with insurance companies and all of that stuff that just consumes your time.

Our process is much simpler. You merely call your insurance company and give them the details of your claim and tell them you’re taking your car to Raymond Auto Body. Next, drop your car off at Raymond, or if need be we’ll pick it up. We take care of the rest - we’ll get you into a rental car and back on the road -- usually within 20 minutes or less. Next, we inspect your car, detail the damages, provide an estimate to your insurance provider, meet with their adjusters and get their approval to begin repairing your car.

Then the magic begins. We’ll get your car back to good as new condition, and along the way your personal service provider keeps you up to date on your vehicles status. You’ll notice throughout the process you’ve had to do nothing but notify your insurance company. We’ve taken care of everything else. The only thing left is the “wow” moment. That’s when you pick up your car and say, “Wow! It’s never looked this good!”

OUR ENTIRE STAFF IS PLEDGED AND DEDICATED TO OUR MISSION:
With God's help and our steadfast commitment to integrity, we will continue to develop a team of exceptional people commited to providing an exceptional customer experience.

ATTITUDE IS EVERYTHING

El año 2007 fué especialmente significativo para nuestra sociedad, ampliando el alcance de nuestro sistema de calidad a la actividad de TACÓGRAFOS DIGITALES, y siendo reconocidos por DAF TRUCKS N.V. como DAF SERVICE DEALER, y pasando a ser SOCIEDAD LIMITADA.

Todos los socios, además de gestionar la empresa, trabajamos en ella, lo cual nos permite comprender y compartir los problemas y necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Nuestro objetivo para el futuro es seguir incrementando nuestra profesionalidad y buen hacer, haciendo el máximo esfuerzo posible en formación, y en dotarnos de las infraestructuras y recursos necesarios que nos permitan seguir aumentando la calidad de nuestro servicio y la satisfacción de nuestros clientes, sin dejar de lado la proximidad a ellos que siempre nos ha caracterizado.

We build more than cars — we build legends.


Our Core Services:

* Custom Car Audio & Sound Systems – Full audio builds, stealth speaker enclosures, subwoofer boxes, and sound tuning for crystal-clear and competition-level performance.

* Starlight Headliner Installation – Elevate your cabin with hand-wired fiber optic stars, built to rival Rolls-Royce.

* Vertical Door (Lambo Door) Kits – Bold and exotic vertical door conversions for nearly any make or model.

* Custom ECU Tuning – Dyno-proven tuning for more horsepower, better throttle response, and peak engine efficiency.

* Custom Paint & Body Work – Custom color design, metallic finishes, widebody kits, and full collision repair — done right.

* Frame-Off Restorations – Classic car and truck restorations from the ground up, blending nostalgia with modern tech.

-Located in Glendale, AZ
Serving the entire Phoenix metro area and beyond, Barajas Customs delivers award-winning automotive customization with unmatched attention to detail. Whether you're building a show car, daily driver, or full-on street machine, we bring the skill and vision to make it happen.

Why We're the Best:
* Decades of combined experience in the custom auto industry
* Precision craftsmanship and top-tier materials
* One-stop shop for fabrication, performance, audio, and aesthetics

Visit www.barajascustoms.com or stop by our shop.

Mange river og bygger nytt bad fordi de har skade på membran, fliser, sluk, sisterne eller rør. Vi har spesialisert oss på å utbedre membran lokalt. Thermoservice Srl, con sede operativa  a Verderio (LC), è un’azienda specializzata nella progettazione, preventivazione, realizzazione, gestione e manutenzione di impianti termotecnici, idrosanitari ed elettrici. Offriamo soluzioni personalizzate per soddisfare le esigenze di ogni cliente, con un'attenzione particolare alla qualità e all'innovazione tecnologica.

I nostri principali servizi includono:

* **Impianti termotecnici**: progettazione e installazione di impianti di riscaldamento e condizionamento per ambienti industriali e civili.
* **Recupero del calore**: soluzioni avanzate per migliorare l’efficienza energetica e ridurre i consumi.
* **Impianti di ventilazione e condizionamento**: progettazione e gestione di sistemi di ventilazione per garantire ambienti salubri e confortevoli.
* **Impianti idrosanitari**: installazione e manutenzione di impianti idrici e sanitari in ambito civile e industriale.
* **Impianti antincendio**: soluzioni integrate per la sicurezza antincendio, con sistemi avanzati di rilevamento e spegnimento.
* **Impianti elettrici**: progettazione e realizzazione di impianti elettrici ad alta efficienza per il settore civile e industriale.
* **Regolazione automatica**: sistemi di controllo automatizzato per ottimizzare il funzionamento degli impianti e migliorarne l’efficienza.

Siamo un team di esperti che lavora per offrire un servizio completo, dalla progettazione all’assistenza post-vendita, con un forte impegno nella sostenibilità e nell’innovazione. La nostra missione è migliorare la qualità degli impianti attraverso tecnologie avanzate e un servizio attento e personalizzato.

Unisciti alla nostra rete su LinkedIn e scopri come possiamo aiutarti a realizzare impianti sicuri, efficienti e all’avanguardia.

Letztlich ist die  StanekWorxX Automotive GmbH seit Ihrem Gründungsjahr am Nürburgring stets im Motorsport aktiv gewesen und sammelt noch heute die Erfahrungen im Motorsport rund um den Nürburgring. In view of the great popularity of this issue and the increasing need for maintenance activities improvement, attention was paid to the maintenance strategies concepts.   Our organization presents a technical review of maintenance strategy formulation and provides an overview of different types of concepts of maintenance strategies. The theoretical analysis was considered to identify existing approaches to each situation of maintenance problems. Literature examples point out various maintenance types like predictive, preventive, corrective, and emergency maintenance. Name: Vulkal d.o.o.
Description:
Vulkal d.o.o. je dugi niz godina vodeća tvrtka u Republici Hrvatskoj za distribuciju pneumatika i naplataka za osobna, kombi i laka teretna vozila, terenska i SUV vozila, autobuse i teretna vozila, građevinsku i poljoprivrednu mehanizaciju, specijalna i vojna vozila, razne vrste dizalica, kao i pneumatika za bicikle, motore, skutere. Ovlašteni smo uvoznici i distributeri poznatih svjetskih proizvođača guma: Goodyear, Dunlop, Fulda, Sava, Michelin, Kleber, BF Goodrich, Taurus, Bridgestone, Firestone, Pirelli, Nokian, TOYO, Hankook i dr. te aluminijskih naplataka MAK, kao i čeličnih naplataka MW za putnička i teretna vozila.
Bavimo se i opremanjem vulkanizerskih radionica Butler strojevima, te alatima i priborom iz asortimana Schrader, Tip Top Stahlgruber, Tech, Wegmann automotive, uz stalnu tehničku podršku.
Tvrtka broji gotovo 300 zaposlenika te ima vlastiti, dostavni vozni park sa 48 voznih jedinica za svakodnevnu distribuciju robe kupcima na cijelom području Republike Hrvatske. 
Raspolažemo s devet prodajno-servisnih centara koji se nalaze u Zagrebu, Velikoj Gorici, Rijeci, Zadru, Stankovcima i Osijeku s dnevnim kapacitetom od oko 1600 putničkih i dostavnih vozila te 50 teretnih vozila i autobusa.
Svi servisi su opremljeni suvremenom opremom za montažu i balansiranje, te za geometriju kotača na kojima radi stručno osposobljeni tim automehaničara i vulkanizera.
Svi Centri su certificirani za montažu guma: RFT (Run Flat Tires), BSR (Bridgestone Support Ring) i PAX (Michelin run on flat tehnologija).
Nakon izmjene vansezonskih guma iste se mogu pohraniti u našem „hotelu za gume“ do iduće montaže. Usluga je dostupna u svim poslovnicama.
Osnovni je cilj tvrtke Vulkal opravdati povjerenje kupca individualnim i profesionalnim pristupom, širokim asortimanom pneumatika, pristupačnom cijenom i kvalitetom usluge.
Da naše usluge udovoljavaju visokim standardima branše potvrđuje i činjenica da svih devet Vulkalovih centara nose Michelin certifikat – standard kvalitete.

Name: The Automotive Community
Description:
Voor wie is The Automotive Community?

The Automotive Community is ontwikkeld voor professionals en bedrijven die actief zijn in, en toegevoegde waarde leveren aan, de autoschadeherstelbranche.

De community richt zich op drie duidelijke doelgroepen:

- Schadeherstellers die willen professionaliseren, verbeteren en vooruitkijken
- Dienstverleners die hun expertise inzetten om schadeherstelbedrijven te ondersteunen
- Toeleveranciers die fysieke producten leveren en hun oplossingen inhoudelijk willen toelichten

Iedere doelgroep heeft een eigen rol, eigen dynamiek en een eigen abonnement. Dat zorgt voor focus, relevantie en kwaliteit.

Waarom The Automotive Community?

- Omdat de branche gebaat is bij samenwerking in plaats van eilandjes
- Omdat kennis delen leidt tot betere beslissingen en betere prestaties
- Omdat zichtbaarheid pas waardevol is als deze relevant en inhoudelijk is
- Omdat kwaliteit boven kwantiteit gaat

The Automotive Community is geen social platform.
Het is een professionele vak community, gebouwd door en voor de autoschadeherstelbranche.

Sluit u aan!!

Of u nu schadehersteller bent, dienstverlener of toeleverancier. 
Als u gelooft in inhoud, samenwerking en vooruitgang, dan hoort u hier.

Name: WashApp
Description:
The basic principle is to reverse the traditional practice where the vehicle goes to the carwash, with a service where the carwash comes to the vehicule.
WashApp respects the ecological standards and offers a practical solution to limit the excessive use of water, electricity, as well as the dispersion of chemical-based detergents and hydrocarbons in the soil.
**The effectiveness is meant to be environmentally friendly !**
To be responsible in the face of the water scarcity and stress that Tunisia is experiencing today. To participate in the fight against pollution, water waste and global warming.
The ecological method of cleaning vehicles is done using biodegradable products, without solvents, using steam and recyclable microfibres cloths.
These products are based on polymer compounds and consist of detergents, lubricants, and polishing agents, providing a 3-in-1 action:  cleaning, polishing and protecting the vehicle while using minimal amounts of water. These products clean all surfaces of the vehicle, including windows, bodywork, plastic, rims, chrome, and tires.
By opting for a global approach, we hope and strive to make your experience with us more environmental friendly, while maintaining our uncompromising attitude towards cleanliness.
