Name: Vertek Elevadores
Description:
UMA EMPRESA COM ELEVADO PADRÃO DE QUALIDADE.
A Vertek Elevadores iniciou suas atividades a partir da experiência de 20 anos de seus sócios no mercado de transporte vertical. Uma companhia que tem como propósito a inovação e a qualidade, garantindo, acima de tudo, a segurança de seus clientes.

> Nossos pilares <
• Segurança como foco principal;
• Ética e transparência nas relações com clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores;
• Agilidade e confiabilidade na operação;
• Foco em resultados.

Projetos e contratos personalizados à necessidade do seu negócio.
Somos especializados em manutenção de elevadores, escadas e esteiras rolantes, projetos de estética e reparos.

> Manutenção Preventiva <
Base para o desenvolvimento de um bom trabalho e garantia de confiabilidade para os equipamentos, a manutenção preventiva de qualidade assegura maior vida útil para os componentes e identifica problemas antes que eles aconteçam. Nesse momento é feita toda a limpeza, lubrificação e ajustes necessários.

> Reparo Programado <
Gerado normalmente por meio de um apontamento da manutenção preventiva, o reparo programado visa à substituição de partes e peças.
Um diferencial da Vertek Elevadores é atendê-lo de acordo com a sua necessidade.
Em muitos casos, esses serviços, em função da atividade do cliente, não podem ser executados em horário comercial. Por isso temos uma flexibilidade especial de horários, não prejudicando a sua rotina.

> Manutenção Corretiva <
Nossa equipe está preparada para as eventualidades! A manutenção corretiva visa ao pronto restabelecimento do equipamento nas situações inesperadas.
Disponibilidade de peças para substituição imediata quando for necessário é uma das nossas prioridades.

> Modernização Tecnológica <
Por meio de estudo específico, identificamos as principais necessidades de atualização de cada equipamento.
Toda modernização é individualmente estudada. Foco em economia de energia, confiabilidade, conforto e segurança aos passageiros.

Name: LeadFoot Automotive Podcast
Description:
Consider LeadFoot the R&D department you've always needed but never thought you could afford. Founded by two shop operators with nearly three decades of combined digital experience, including time at Google, you've never heard an automotive podcast like this. 

Joe and Alex met nearly a decade ago and have spent their time together digitizing Gateway Auto, Joe's family's shop in Omaha, Nebraska. Today Gateway Auto is a multi-shop operation but it didn't start that way. 

Joe, a former Googler and tech leader, hired Alex, a digital native and gearhead while he was traveling the world advocating for a safer internet and better privacy standards. Alex's job was simple back then: help Gateway improve their marketing website, get on Google and do some of the basics needed to market the business. Challenge accepted. Mission complete.

Not long after, Alex identified a list of ways Gateway could do better and the two worked to bring these ideas into the shop. Together, they used their digital know-how to help Gateway Auto transform from a paper-and-pencil single shop operation to a mid-sized multi-shop operation that provides good jobs and community impact while balancing profit and innovation. 

Joe and Alex's experience includes:
- Building and maintaining a robust digital presence for Gateway Auto, Joe's family business
- Development of custom internal automations and intranet to manage operations across the company at a fraction of the cost 
- Migrate the company to cloud-based services and educate the team on how to use tech
- Create and maintain a cybersecurity program
- Monitor the technology landscape to ensure the company is always at the cutting edge, innovating new ways to operate a shop in the automotive industry

Their hard work resulted in Gateway growing more than 5x in revenues. LeadFoot Automotive is here to help shop owners and operators learn the things they've used to drive success and keep ahead of industry innovations. Buckle up!

Description:
NAMRO, yerli/yabancı savunma sanayinde  yılların tecrübesiyle hem özel çözümler hem de özel ürünler sunmak amacıyla özveriyle çalışan ve müşterilerine en iyi hizmeti veren bir bakım/onarım ve üretim kuruluşudur.

Şirketimizin  askeri tırtıllı/paletli araçlar ile uçak, helikopter, denizaltı ve gemilerin belli parça ve sistemleri için  Bakım Revizyon Onarım (BRO/MRO) hizmeti sunmaktadır.

İzmit OSB alanı içinde bulunan onarım atölyemizde  uçak çeker, GPU gibi havacılığa yönelik yer destek ekipmanlarının (GSE) bakım, onarım ve tamirleri hızlı bir şekilde yapılmaktadır.

BRO hizmetlerinde MTU makine parçaları ve bunların bağlı olduğu elektronik kontrol panelleri ile temini zor ve/veya üretimden kalkmış elektronik devre kartlarını yerlileştirerek çözümler üretmekteyiz.  

CASA CN235, C130 uçak parçalarının bakım/onarımlarını da yerlileştirerek havacılık sektörüne hizmet vermekteyiz.

Bahse konu tüm sistemler için, ABD’de yerleşik ofisimiz ve hem Avrupa'da hem Asya'da bulunan iş ortaklarımız aracılığı ile hızlı ve kolay yurtdışı parça tedariki sağlayabilmekteyiz.

Bakım/onarım/üretim işlerinden farklı olarak temini ve transferi zor kimyasalların ithalatını da çok hızlı bir şekilde yapmakta iddialıyız.

Name: Kreisler
Description:
Wir sind ein gemeinnütziger Verein und setzen uns für eine gelebte Kreislaufwirtschaft im Alltag ein. Unser Ziel: Nachhaltigen Konsum niedrigschwellig, praktisch und gemeinschaftlich zu gestalten – und das bewusst jenseits der klassischen Öko-Bubble. 

In Berlin-Gropiusstadt betreiben wir einen multifunktionalen Ort, der Reparatur, Verleih, Workshops und nachbarschaftliche Begegnung miteinander verbindet. So verringern wir effektiv Ressourcenverschwendung, vermeiden Müll und etablieren Reparatur und gemeinschaftliche Nutzung als festen Bestandteil des Alltags. Gleichzeitig befähigen wir Menschen, selbst aktiv zu werden und ihre Umwelt mitzugestalten. Besonders wichtig ist uns, soziale Teilhabe zu fördern – durch einen inklusiven, solidarischen Zugang zu nachhaltigem Handeln.

WAS WIR TUN
– Reparieren statt Wegwerfen: Wir reparieren gemeinsam mit den Nutzer:innen defekte Haushaltsgeräte, Elektronik, Spielzeug, Kleidung und mehr.

– Leihen statt Kaufen: Wir verleihen Gebrauchsgegenstände, die nur gelegentlich gebraucht werden – vom Werkzeug bis zum Party-Equipment.

– Wissen teilen: In Workshops und offenen Angeboten vermitteln wir Reparaturwissen und DIY-Kompetenzen.

– Gemeinschaft stärken: Wir schaffen einen Treffpunkt für nachbarschaftlichen Austausch und gemeinsames Engagement für Nachhaltigkeit.

Die Kreislaufwirtschaft beginnt vor der eigenen Haustür.
Unsere Vision: Ein Kreisler in jedem Kiez!

Name: James Spearman Aircraft LLC
Description:
Welcome to James Spearman Aircraft LLC

Hello, I'm James Spearman, founder and owner of Spearman Aircraft, a beacon of excellence in the aviation maintenance industry. Rooted in a rich aviation heritage that traces back to my grandfather, a dedicated military mechanic and aviator, our company is more than just a service provider – we are trendsetters and visionaries in the field.

Setting Industry Standards

We are committed to setting unparalleled standards in safety and customer service. Our approach to aircraft maintenance is not just about repairs and servicing; it's about ensuring the utmost safety for every flight and providing an unmatched customer experience. We understand the critical importance of these elements in the fast-paced and ever-evolving aviation industry.

Expert Training and Development

Our team, comprising seven of the finest mechanics in aviation, boasts a collective experience of over 100 years. This impressive expertise is continually enhanced through rigorous training provided by JSA and industry leaders. We believe in investing in our team's growth, ensuring that each member is not just equipped with current knowledge but is also prepared for future advancements in aviation technology.

Inspiring Future Generations

Beyond our core services, our mission extends to inspiring the next generation of aviators and entrepreneurs. We understand the importance of dreaming big and the role of mentorship in turning those dreams into reality. At James Spearman Aircraft, we strive to be a source of inspiration and guidance for those aspiring to carve their path in the aviation world.

Our Promise to You

When you choose James Spearman Aircraft, you're not just selecting a maintenance provider; you're partnering with a team that values innovation, safety, and exceptional service. Join us as we not only navigate the present but also shape the future of aviation, fostering a community of passionate aviators and visionary entrepreneurs.

Description:

En cas d’impact, France Pare-Brise répare votre pare-brise en 30 minutes maximum pour limiter le temps d’immobilisation de votre véhicule. Pour cette intervention, nous vous accueillons avec ou sans RDV ! Et si votre vitre automobile n’est pas réparable, notre équipe à Biscarrosse met gratuitement à votre disposition un véhicule de prêt le temps du remplacement !
En tant que réparateur agréé par la plupart des assureurs et mutuelles, France Pare-Brise Biscarrosse remplace tous les vitrages de véhicule et facilite la prise en charge de votre dommage. Dans le cadre de votre assurance bris de glace, les professionnels de notre centre Biscarrosse effectuent pour vous les démarches auprès de votre assureur et vous font bénéficier du tiers payant. Vous n’avancez pas les frais de la prestation, ils sont directement remboursés à France Pare-Brise (selon conditions de votre assurance) !

Name: Planet Auto
Description:
After spending years in the automotive industry, working with top brands and exploring various aspects of the automobile world, we felt a burning desire to do something more. We wanted to create a space where our passion for classic car restoration and redesign could truly shine, and that's how Planet Auto was born.
At Planet Auto, we're all about preserving automotive heritage and bringing back the glory of modern classics. We breathe life into these vintage vehicles, giving them a fresh new look while maintaining their original essence. It's like reviving a piece of history, one car at a time.
As the founder and managing partner, I pour my heart and soul into Planet Auto. I take immense pride in assembling a team of skilled craftsmen who share the same love and dedication for classic cars. Together, we work tirelessly to ensure that each restoration project is nothing short of a masterpiece.
At Planet Auto We combine technical expertise and artistic vision to create automotive works of art that resonate with car enthusiasts worldwide. We value excellence, attention to detail, and the satisfaction of our clients above all else.
In addition to managing Planet Auto will soon be showcasing our work at classic car shows, engaging with fellow enthusiasts, and allowing them to soak in the beauty of timeless machines.
The journey is just the beginning for Planet Auto. There's so much more to explore, so many more classic cars to bring back to life, and we are thrilled to be leading this incredible venture into the future.
With Planet Auto, we hope to leave a lasting legacy in the classic car world and share our passion with enthusiasts all over the globe. Together, let's keep the spirit of vintage automobiles alive and roaring!

Name: United Steel Piping & Mechanical B.V.
Description:
United Steel Piping & Mechanical – waar innovatie door de leidingen stroomt. Vanuit onze thuisbasis in Roosendaal brengen wij techniek tot leven met slimme, duurzame en betrouwbare oplossingen op het gebied van pijpleidingen en mechanica. Wat begon als vakmanschap, is uitgegroeid tot een krachtig samenspel van expertise, creativiteit en toekomstvisie.
Of het nu gaat om het aanleggen van complexe leidingsystemen, het onderhoud van vitale installaties of het herstellen van mechanische componenten – wij brengen elk project in beweging. Onze experts werken zij aan zij met klanten om oplossingen te creëren die niet alleen voldoen aan de hoogste normen, maar ze herdefiniëren.
Met een blik op morgen en twee voeten in de praktijk bouwen wij aan systemen die meegroeien met de wereld van vandaag. Bij United Steel gaan betrouwbaarheid, kwaliteit en innovatie hand in hand – voor een infrastructuur die blijft presteren, nu en in de toekomst.

United Steel Piping & Mechanical – where innovation flows through every pipeline. Based in the heart of Roosendaal, we bring engineering to life with smart, sustainable, and reliable solutions in piping and mechanical systems. What began as craftsmanship has evolved into a dynamic blend of expertise, creativity, and future-focused thinking.
Whether it’s installing complex piping networks, maintaining critical infrastructure, or repairing essential mechanical components – we keep every project moving forward. Our experts work closely with clients to craft solutions that don’t just meet the highest standards, but redefine them.
With our eyes on the future and our hands in the field, we build systems that grow with the world around us. At United Steel, reliability, quality and innovation go hand in hand – creating infrastructure that performs today and endures tomorrow.

Name: Analytik Diagnostik Germany
Description:
Maßgeschneiderte Diagnoselösungen für alle Fachbereiche
Details können im Streitfall rund ums Auto entscheidend sein. Mit eigenem Komponentenprüfstand, 9 (teils Werksnahe Tester-Systeme) und zwei Geräte zur Auswertung von Unfalldatenspeicher können wir professionell und verschwiegen im Hintergrund agieren. So können berechnete, theoretische Werte in der Analyse bestätigt aber auch widersprochen werden. Folge: Die Beweiskraft der jeweiligen Analyse steigt unermesslich...

20 Jahre diagnostische Erfahrung, 15 Jahre Test und Neugier. Seit einem größeren Zeitraum ist es technisch möglich Fahrsituationen, Routen, Ereignisse am Fahrzeug zu simulieren und belegbar nachzubilden. Dies kann im Schadensfall eine schnelle und genaue Rekonstruktion (Geschwindigkeit, Lenkverhältnisse, Bremseingriffe, G-Kräfte, Insassen...) ermöglichen. Natürlich ist die diagnostische Analytik auch bei Fahrzeugdiebstählen interessant. In den seltensten Fällen bleibt das Fahrzeug an seinem Standort, wird das Kraftfahrzeug per Achse (was sicherlich eine gängige Vorgehensweise ist) bewegt, sind im besten Fall GPS-Daten auswertbar, verbaute Notrufsysteme sind auf der ständigen Suche nach Mobilfunkanbindungen. Sollten diese Daten, auf Grund externer Einflüsse, nicht zu Verfügung stehen hat das moderne KFZ noch mehr Angriffspunkte um eine Route zu rekonstruieren und mit bestehenden Landkarten abzugleichen. Dies kann auch zu einem späteren Zeitpunkt erfolgen, Steuergeräte (Computer) aus modernen Fahrzeugen „vergessen“ Ihren Ursprung nicht. So kann mit Hilfe eines Komponentenprüfstand ein einzelnes Steuergerät ausgelesen, ausgewertet und die ursprüngliche Fahrgestellnummer sichtbar gemacht werden. Dies kann bei sichergestellten Baugruppen, Testkäufen aus Verkaufsplattformen den Zusammenhang zu bereits seit längeren entwendeten Fahrzeugen herstellen.

Name: MLK Soluções Automotivas
Description:
Somos especialistas em carros. Mas antes disso, somas profissionais com empatia. Escutamos suas solicitações com atenção, estudamos suas demandas, esclarecemos suas dúvidas, A sua necessidade e a nossa.
Entendemos que cada cliente é único e por isso oferecemos serviços e atendimentos singulares, a partir do diagnóstico baseado em conhecimento, experiência e constante atualização. Dos pequenos reparos até as mais sofisticadas restaurações, nós prevenimos, corrigimos, revisamos, melhoramos e embelezamos.
Oferecemos o que você precisa e também o que você deseja. Seja economizar tempo, evitar problemas ou reparar danos. A manutenção necessária para que você possa desfrutar do prazer de dirigir o seu automóvel por muitos anos mais. Ou a possibilidade de dar um novo futuro a ele - permitir que carregue outras histórias e percorra caminhas desconhecidos. 
Sabemos da importância de simplificar a sua vida. Por isso. Cuidamos com carinho do que facilita o seu dia a dia e otimiza o seu tempo. Agilidade e disponibilidade fazem parte do nosso vocabulário diário e guia a nossa metodologia de trabalho. Nós respeitamos o seu tempo para que você o use como desejar. 
Nós compreendemos a sua urgência de viver.
Sustentamos nosso atendimento em quatro pilares: transparência, segurança, comprometimento e respeito. Nossa missão é atender com presteza e fornecer a convicção dos bons resultados. Sem distinção, seja qual for a sua demanda. Queremos construir um relacionamento honesto, próximo, amigável. E que você se sinta confortável no nosso ambiente.
Por isso, sempre que precisar, apareça por aqui. Estamos sempre disponíveis para uma conversa sincera e um acolhimento que você só encontra aqui.

MLK - O serviço que você precisa com o atendimento que você deseja.

Of je nu een auto wilt huren voor een paar uur, een dag, een week of zelfs maandenlang, bij Autohopper Nieuw-Vennep bieden we diverse verhuuropties en aantrekkelijke tarieven die passen bij jouw specifieke behoeften. Bovendien bieden we ook shortlease-opties voor bedrijven en particulieren die een voertuig voor een langere periode nodig hebben, zonder langdurige contracten en gedoe.

Ons toegewijde team van professionals staat altijd klaar om je te helpen bij het kiezen van de juiste auto en het beantwoorden van al je vragen. We streven ernaar om elke klant een persoonlijke en vriendelijke service te bieden, zodat je met een glimlach de weg op kunt gaan.

Volg onze Facebook-pagina voor het laatste nieuws, speciale aanbiedingen en interessante tips over autoverhuur en shortlease. We houden je graag op de hoogte van nieuwe toevoegingen aan onze vloot, evenementen en andere informatie die jouw mobiliteitservaring nog beter maakt.

Bij Autohopper Nieuw-Vennep Verhuur en Shortlease maken we het huren van een auto eenvoudig, betaalbaar en stressvrij. Ontdek vandaag nog wat we voor jou kunnen betekenen en ervaar de vrijheid van zorgeloos rijden.

Este es nuestro perfil de LinkedIn, donde compartiremos nuestro compromiso con la innovación, la calidad y el servicio excepcional que ofrecemos a nuestros clientes.

Nuestra Historia y Valores

Desde nuestros humildes comienzos hasta convertirnos en un referente global, nuestra historia está marcada por la pasión por la excelencia. Fundada en 2004, Crossaudio ha crecido y se ha adaptado a las cambiantes demandas del mercado de equipamiento para vehículos. Nuestros valores fundamentales, como la integridad, la innovación y la satisfacción del cliente, nos han guiado en cada paso del camino.

Nuestra Gama de Productos y Servicios

En Crossaudio, entendemos que cada vehículo es único y cada cliente tiene necesidades específicas. Es por eso que ofrecemos una amplia gama de productos y servicios diseñados para satisfacer tus requisitos exactos. Desde sistemas de audio de alta fidelidad hasta soluciones de navegación de vanguardia y comunicación manos libres, tenemos todo lo que necesitas para mejorar la experiencia en carretera.
Nuestra Experiencia en el Sector

A lo largo de los años, hemos tenido el privilegio de trabajar con una amplia gama de clientes, desde pequeñas empresas locales hasta grandes flotas a nivel internacional. Nuestra experiencia en el sector nos ha permitido comprender los desafíos únicos que enfrentan las empresas y flotas en la gestión de sus vehículos.

Compromiso con la Innovación

En Crossaudio, estamos comprometidos con la innovación constante, buscando las últimas tendencias y tecnologías para asegurarnos de que nuestros clientes siempre estén un paso adelante en la carretera.

Name: SERVICE PRINTER PANGGILAN JAKARTA 081317138662
Description:
SERVICE PRINTER PANGGILAN JAKARTA 081317138662
JAKARTA PUSAT, JAKARTA TIMUR, JAKARTA UTARA, JAKARTA SELATAN, JAKARTA BARAT

Jasa service printer panggilan dengan ketekunan dan profesionalisme yang tinggi, layanan servis segala brand printer bisa dilakukan. Brother, Epson, Canon, HP, sampai Lexmark bukan tidak barangkali untuk dibetulkan dan digunakan kembali.

Dengan didukung teknisi printer yang mumpuni dan berpengalaman lebih dari 5 tahun, kami dapat membantu dalam menyelesaikan segala permasalahan printer anda. Kami menyediakan jasa layanan service printer panggilan kerjakan dilokasi berbagai jenis dan merk.

Layanan Jasa Service

Dalam memberikan layanan service printer panggilan kami mempunyai keunggulan dalam pelayanan untuk memberikan kepuasan pada pelanggan yang antara lain:

1. Membersihkan Head Printer Buntu

Apabila salah satu warna tidak keluar atau hasil cetak yang bergaris dapat dipastikan terjadi permasalahan pada head printer yang biasanya terjadi kekeringan atau buntu. Hal ini dapat kami atasi dengan membongkar dan mencuci head printer premium sehingga alat ini dapat digunakan serta mampu mencetak dengan hasil seperti menggunakan printer baru.

2. Reset Waste Ink Pad Counter Printer

Permasalahan pada printer yang tidak bisa mencetak dengan muncul peringatan “service required”. Dengan reset printer via online, kami siap membantu anda secara praktis, cepat serta ekonomis.

3. Cek Trouble Printer

Pada printer yang mengalami trouble, teknisi kami akan mengecek dan mencari yang terbaik dalam mengatasi masalah pada printer anda.

4. Ganti Kuras Tinta

Pengurasan dimulai dari tabung, kemudian cartridge serta head printer sehingga printer anda menjadi bersih kembali seperti baru lagi dan siap menggunakan tinta baru.

Dan berbagai kendala lainnya

Name: I'm droid

Name: Studio Søm
Description:
Studio Søm AS er et brukt- og vintagebutikk som har systudioet, på Grünerløkka, Oslo. Vi spesialiserer oss på bærekraftige løsninger gjennom reparasjon, redesign og vedlikehold av klær og tekstiler. Målet vårt er å motvirke tekstilavfall og gi nytt liv til plagg gjennom kvalitet og håndverk.

Etablert i 2023, bygger Studio Søm videre på erfaringen fra reparasjonsstudioet Studio Fikse, som var på Paleet i Oslo, der vi fra 2022 jobbet for å etablere en kultur for reparasjon og ansvarlig forbruk. Våren 2024 endret vi forretningsmodellen vår for å fokusere enda mer på å redusere tekstilavfall og tilby tjenester som holder klær lenger i omløp, både for privatpersoner og bedrifter.

Vi ønsker å gjøre bærekraftige valg tilgjengelige for flere, og tilbyr alt fra skreddersydde reparasjoner og tilpasninger til opplæring og inspirasjon for alle som vil lære mer om hvordan man kan ta vare på tekstilene sine. 

Velkommen til Studio Søm – en plattform for gjenbruk, kvalitet og nytenkning innen tekstilhåndverk.

Våre tjenester:
- Reparasjon og vedlikehold av klær
- Redesign og tilpasninger
- Brukt- og vintagebutikk
- Workshops og kurs innen søm og tekstilpleie

Besøk oss på Grünerløkka, Oslo, eller les mer om oss på studiosom.no. Følg også med på Instagram @studiosom.no for inspirasjon og oppdateringer.

Hos Studio Søm kan du levere inn alt av klær som trenger en reparasjon eller tilpasning slik at det kan leve videre i skapet ditt

I 2024 blev Dan Smedien en del af Grønbech-koncernen – en velrenommeret dansk rådgivningsvirksomhed med rødder tilbage til 1828. Det betyder, at Dan Smedien A/S ikke alene er en moderne smedevirksomhed, vi er også landsdækkende og har knapt 200 års knowhow i ryggen.

Vores hold består af dygtige, certificerede fagfolk, der løbende efteruddannes for at sikre, at vi lever op til de nyeste krav og standarder i branchen. Det betyder, at vi kan varetage hele processen internt – fra idé til færdigt produkt – og sikre hurtig responstid, høj kvalitet og fuld sporbarhed i opgaveløsningen.

* Halter netværket ud til maskinerne?

Name: StegmaierGroup
Description:
Über neunzig Jahre ist es her, dass unser Großvater Hermann Stegmaier seine freie Reparaturwerkstatt in Ingersheim gründete. Sein unternehmerischer Mut basierte auf einem Weitblick, der die Trends der Zeit vorwegnahm: Technisches Können und ein fairer Umgang mit den Kunden waren für ihn selbstverständlich.
Die motorisierte Mobilität steckte in jener Zeit noch in ihren Kinderschuhen. Kraftfahrzeuge waren immer noch rar und vor allem teuer. Das brachte den begabten Techniker auf die Idee, selbst ein bezahlbares Mobilitätsangebot zu entwickeln: ein motorisiertes Dreirad.

Sein Know-how und sein Werk blieben erhalten und wuchsen im Laufe der Zeit zu jener Unternehmensgruppe, die Sie heute kennen.

Doch nicht nur das Unternehmen entwickelte sich rasant weiter, sondern vor allem auch die Mobilität selbst. Die Wirtschaftswunderjahre bahnten der Massenmobilität auf zwei und vier Rädern den Weg; das steigende Güteraufkommen brachte neue Lkw-Sparten hervor, und das gewachsene Umweltbewusstsein stellte neue Ansprüche an die Effizienz.

Als Enkel des Firmengründers beweisen wir heute stete Zukunftsorientierung und eigene technische Kompetenz: Unser Unternehmen ist an der Entwicklung der Elektromobilität genauso beteiligt wie an neuen Mobilitätsdienstleistungen – nie zum Selbstzweck, sondern stets als Lösungsansatz für Kundenbedürfnisse.

Name: Carrozzeria Riva
Description:
Una Storia di Passione e Maestria dal 1924.

Da quattro generazioni, Carrozzeria Riva non è solo un’azienda: è una famiglia, un luogo dove la cura per i dettagli incontra la passione per l'automobile. 
Ogni riparazione, ogni restauro racconta una storia di artigianalità, dedizione e innovazione. 
Con una struttura di 10.000 mq e un team di 20 persone, il nostro lavoro è un equilibrio tra tradizione e progresso, sempre al servizio del cliente.

L’arte del fare bene
Dietro ogni auto riparata c’è un gruppo di persone che mettono cuore e competenze in ciò che fanno. Il nostro team, composto da giovani talenti e professionisti esperti, condivide un unico obiettivo: offrire un servizio che non si limiti a soddisfare, ma che sorprenda e lasci un segno.

Relazioni e Fiducia
Nel corso degli anni, abbiamo costruito partnership solide con concessionari e marchi prestigiosi come Volkswagen, Porsche, Toyota, BMW-Mini e Ferrari, sempre con la stessa filosofia: lavorare con passione e precisione, indipendentemente dal modello o dal valore dell’auto. 
Per noi, ogni cliente è unico, e ogni richiesta è un’opportunità per dimostrare la nostra eccellenza.

Il cliente al centro
Per Carrozzeria Riva, il cliente non è un semplice destinatario del servizio, ma un vero protagonista. Dall’accettazione alla consegna, il nostro approccio trasparente e personalizzato è pensato per garantire fiducia e serenità.

Missione e Valori
La nostra missione è custodire e tramandare l’arte del fare bene, puntando su qualità, innovazione e rispetto per le persone. Crediamo nelle mani che lavorano, nelle idee che innovano e nelle relazioni che crescono. Investiamo costantemente in formazione e tecnologia, certi che il futuro si costruisca insieme, un passo alla volta.

Name: RESTORE BAY
Description:
Discover RESTOREBAY, We're dedicated to extending the life of furniture through expert repair services, promoting sustainability, and reducing waste.

Globally, over 2 billion tons of municipal solid waste are generated annually, with projections indicating a 70% increase by 2050. In India, nearly 9.4 million tons of plastic and wooden waste are produced each year, much of which could be avoided through recycling and repair. The growing furniture waste in cities like Pune, Mumbai, Bengaluru, and more, where homes are being upgraded rapidly, further contributes to landfill issues.

Our mission is to provide reliable solutions that help reduce waste and foster a sustainable future by giving cherished pieces a second life. With a focus on craftsmanship, we ensure that each repair is done with precision and care, guaranteeing that furniture not only looks like new but is built to last for years to come. We believe in the power of restoration and the value of maintaining the products we already own, rather than constantly replacing them.

Choose repair, and help give our planet another chance to breathe healthier, thriving in a fresher, more sustainable environment.

#BetterTomorrow

Name: Wheels Repair
Description:
Les jantes alu de votre véhicules sont bonnes à changer ? Rayées ? La couleur passée ? Des traces d’impacts ? 

Et si vous tentiez la rénovation ? Plutôt que le remplacement ? 

Wheels Repair, ce sont trois camions, équipés de tour numérique, qui sillonnent l’Aquitaine pour réparer vos jantes. 

Nous venons jusqu’à vous, pour vous faire gagner du temps, de l’argent, et réduire l’impact écologique des jantes alu sur notre planète. 

Une jante neuve, c’est entre 250 et 1500 euros, + le déplacement chez votre concessionnaire.

Une jante rénovée, c’est à partir de 180 euros, depuis votre canapé, votre salle de sport, ou sur le parking de votre supermarché.

Une jante neuve, c’est aussi un bilan carbone conséquent.

Une jante rénovée, c’est le déplacement de notre camion jusqu’à vous, et l’énergie nécessaire pour faire fonctionner le tour numérique. Une paille en comparaison !

Crée en 2018, Patrice Blanchard est le premier à avoir introduit la rénovation de jantes en France sur atelier mobile. Jusque-là, nos jantes abîmées étaient collectées auprès des concessionnaires, garagistes… Puis acheminées au Portugal, réparées, et réexpédiées en France, avant d’être réinstallées sur vos véhicules. 

Une perte de temps, d’argent, et un gâchis énorme pour notre planète !

Désormais, si vos jantes alu :

- sont rayées à force de flirter avec les trottoirs
- sont endommagées suite à un accident
- ont besoin d’un coup de neuf dans la perspective d’une revente

Réparer, au lieu de remplacer.

Avec Wheels Repair !

Name: Nimble.Repair
Description:
Nimble is revolutionizing our relationship with stuff. 

Starting in the East San Francisco Bay Area, Nimble makes it easy to repair household goods: we figure out how to repair your item, who can repair it, and we pick up and drop off so repair fits into your life. 

Further, our model is revitalizing the third-party repair economy, enabling people to grow their repair skills and earn more income through repair.

Nimble’s theory of change is that easy repair will lead people to factor repairability into purchasing decisions and thereby incentivize companies to make goods more repairable in the first place. 

As an agile startup founded in the world of design strategy, Nimble fosters a culture of experimentation & testing assumptions to see what works, understanding our human complexities, working together as a team for a good outcome, and playing the long game so our impact can meet the scale of the need: reversing disposable culture and moving human societies towards right relationship with Earth.

Now is an exciting time for repair, as California’s Right to Repair law just went into effect July 1, 2024 (part of a growing number of states/countries adopting similar legislation)!

What We Do
We specialise in keeping your facility in top condition through expert repairs and maintenance:

Electrical: We handle wiring issues, power distribution, lighting repairs, and appliance servicing to ensure safe and efficient electrical systems.
Plumbing: Our services include leak detection, drain clearing, fixture replacements, and water heater maintenance to keep your plumbing running smoothly.
Air Conditioning (AC): We provide AC servicing, repairs, and maintenance to ensure efficient cooling and comfort throughout your facility.
What Sets Us Apart
Expert Technicians: Our highly skilled technicians each have over 15 years of experience in their fields, ensuring top-quality service every time.
Reliable & Timely: We pride ourselves on our quick response times and commitment to getting the job done right, minimising any disruption to your operations.
Transparent Pricing: Enjoy predictable costs with our clear pricing structure, making budgeting for maintenance simple and stress-free.
Guaranteed Quality: We use certified parts and materials to ensure lasting repairs. All our work is backed by guarantees for your peace of mind.
Tailored Solutions: We offer customised services to meet your facility's specific needs, ensuring that all maintenance is relevant and effective.

Our Clients' Success
Clients who work with us experience reduced downtime, more streamlined maintenance, and long-term savings on repair costs. We ensure that critical systems function efficiently, so you can focus on your core business without worrying about unexpected maintenance issues.

Connect with us to discover how Shapperly can support your facility needs and keep your operations running smoothly.

Name: Mint Maintenance Intelligence
Description:
Mint Technology Engineering Maintenance & Consultancy Inc. is a Turkey centered condition based monitoring & reliability engineering company. It's name is inspired by the shortenings of "Maintenance intelligence" words.
Mint provides state of the art service called end-to-end Protective & Predictive Maintenance such as: Condition Monitoring, Vibration Analysis, Work Order Management, Plant and Machine Health Scoring services as well as Equipment installations, Machinery Balancing, Precision Alignment, Route Measurements, Fault Troubleshootings in site operations.
The Protective & Predictive Maintenance approach should be SMART. It evaluates the condition of rotating machinery and can provide early identification and elimination of a fault before it causes serious problems. The aim is to extend machine life, reduce maintenance costs, avoid unexpected failures causing interruptions in productivity and to carry out maintenance on a more informed basis.
We are offering you a totally wireless 7/24 h monitoring, data collection, vibration analysis, action response and reporting service which is called end-to-end Protective & Predictive Maintenance with our experienced valuable team in industry, advanced wireless vibration & temperature sensors and machine learning based, AI supported unique software solution to make your machines more reliable and sustainable.

Name: REGENTECH
Description:
REGENTECH empowers your sustainable development by addressing the responsible consumption part, related to your network or power installation. Our in-house repair technologies enable our customers be more sustainable by extending equipment lifetime and therefore reducing electronic waste - which is fully in line with today's ESG criteria. In addition to that, repair provides an undisputed cost efficiency versus procurement of new equipment.

In addition to repairs of current and legacy products, we offer complete refurbishment and advance supply of replacement units with extended warranty.  Major areas, such as Radio Access Network (RBS, BSC/RNC, RET), Transport (Microwave, Optical), Power (Rectifiers, Inverters, UPS, Controllers), Professional Sound (Amplifiers, Processors) and other are addressed.  Global and local players, active in telecommunications, oil & gas, transportation, entertainment and utilities form our actual customer base.

The combination of highly trained in-house engineers, complemented by multi-area workshops & test rooms, with several sources of quality components form the basis for our "first time right" approach to repairs & refurbishments, securing that ready units are fully functional within their intended environment.

RegenTech carries a stock of tested second-user and new equipment, which is immediately available for advance replacement or purchase. In addition to that, we are able to source the required equipment or specific parts through our wide range of industry contacts.

Name: HMI - Handelsmarketing-Initiative
Description:
Das Kooperationskonzept HMI (Handelsmarketing-Initiative) ist mit rund 600 Mitgliedern in Deutschland und weiteren 90 angeschlossenen Betrieben in Österreich das größte Handelssystem unter dem Dach der GRS, den Goodyear Retail Systems, einer Tochter des Goodyear-Konzerns. Seit fast 40 Jahren verbinden die GRS hohe Beratungskompetenz mit fundierten Kenntnissen aus dem Kfz- und Reifenmarkt. Gerade in Zeiten der Digitalisierung liefern die GRS wertvolle Unterstützung, mit der die Auswirkungen auf die Abläufe in den Werkstätten, das Serviceangebot und veränderte Kaufverhalten von Kunden bewältigt werden können. Bereits seit 1986 schließen sich Reifenfachhandelsunternehmen dem Konzept an, die sich im harten Wettbewerb mit einem individuellen Marktauftritt behaupten wollen. Unternehmer, die sich dafür entscheiden, das Goodyear Marken-Portfolio überdurchschnittlich zu vermarkten, können Mitglied der Handelsmarketing-Initiative werden und von dem Erfahrungsschatz und fachspezifischem Marketing-Know-how profitieren, das beim Abverkauf von Reifen und Dienstleistungen eine wertvolle Unterstützung bietet. Zum Angebot gehören handelsbezogene, individuell auf jedes Mitglied zugeschnittene Werbemaßnahmen – vor allem während der klassischen Umrüstperioden – und verschiedene Händler-Homepage-Pakete mit integriertem Online-Terminplaner. Zudem profitieren HMI-Mitglieder von zahlreichen exklusiven GRS-Leistungen wie dem Flottenmanagement der 4Fleet Group, dem Zentraleinkauf über die Freie Reifeneinkaufsinitiative (FRI), dem Warenwirtschaftssystem tiresoft 3 und der automatischen Nachschubbesteuerung VMI. 

Impressum:
Goodyear Retail Systems GmbH
Goran Zubanovic (Geschäftsführer)

Name: Vahan Sewak
Description:
At Vahan Sewak, we believe a vehicle breakdown shouldn't bring your life to a halt. The traditional roadside assistance industry is fragmented, slow, and lacks transparency, leaving drivers stressed and vulnerable. We are here to change that.

Vahan Sewak is a pioneering auto-tech platform building India's most reliable on-demand roadside assistance ecosystem. Our technology creates a seamless, three-sided marketplace that connects:

Vehicle Owners in distress with immediate, trusted help.

Skilled Mechanics & Garages with a steady stream of verified jobs to grow their business.

Local Parts Suppliers with a direct, efficient channel to the mechanics who need their inventory.

Our entire platform is built on three core promises to the customer:

Speed: A verified mechanic at your location in under 30 minutes.

Trust: Vetted experts and verifiable, evidence-based diagnostics.

Transparency: Upfront digital quotes, live tracking, and secure digital payments. No more haggling, no more hidden costs.

We are not just an app; we are a service dedicated to delivering peace of mind. By empowering local service economies and leveraging cutting-edge technology, we are making India's roads more reliable.

Join us as we build the future of automotive services and ensure that for everyone, Zindagi Rukni Nahi Chahiye (Life Shouldn't Stop).

Specialties:
Roadside Assistance, Automotive Technology (Auto-Tech), On-Demand Services, Platform Economy, Mobile Applications, Logistics, and Electric Vehicle (EV) Support.

Projekte in Bestandsgebäuden bzw. mit bestehenden Aufzügen sind unsere besondere Stärke. Unsere Leistungen für Sie: 

- Servicedienste und Reparaturen 
- Modernisierung von Aufzugsanlagen 
- Neu- & Ersatzanlagen / Komplettaustausch 
- Nachträglicher Anbau an / in bestehende Gebäude 

Gemeinsam mit unserem starken Partner ATH Aufzüge GmbH setzen wir auch Projekte mit Schwerlastaufzügen oder Autoaufzügen für Sie um. Die von uns im Rahmen von Modernisierung und Neubau eingesetzten Komponenten namhafter Hersteller unterliegen keiner Bindung an den Errichterbetrieb. Testen Sie uns – auch für Ihren Bedarf finden wir eine passende Lösung.

Alle Leistungen rund ums Dachfenster aus einer Hand. Wir sind der Spezialist für Reparatur, Wartung, Einbau und Austausch von Dachfenstern aller Art. 

Wohnen, kochen, schlafen, wohlfühlen: Ein Leben unter dem Dach soll hell, freundlich und unter besten klimatischen Bedingungen stattfinden. Dachfenster leisten hierzu einen wichtigen Beitrag, sorgen sie doch für mehr Kopffreiheit sowie frische Luft und Tageslicht, genau dann, wenn Sie es wünschen.

Die Dachfenster-Retter treten dafür ein, dass Ihr Zuhause langfristig sicher, energieeffizient und gemütlich bleibt. Ob Reparatur, Wartung, Einbau oder Austausch: Aufgrund unserer Spezialisierung auf Dachfenster, der engen Zusammenarbeit mit den Herstellern sowie mit passender Ausstattung lösen wir jede Herausforderung professionell, zeitnah und zu Ihrer vollen Zufriedenheit.

Digitalisierung liegt uns am Herzen: Deshalb haben digitale Medien und Mittel schon lange Einzug in unseren Unternehmensalltag erhalten: Schicken Sie uns ein Bild Ihres Fensters und des Typenschildes per WhatsApp oder Mail: Wir kommen direkt mit den passenden Materialien zu Ihnen. So sparen wir und Sie das Geld und die Zeit für mehrere Anfahrten.

Name: Bayonsis Mühendislik ve Bakım Hizmetleri San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti.
Description:
Bayonsis olarak, dürüstlük, doğruluk ve tecrübeyi işimizin merkezine yerleştirerek faaliyet gösteriyoruz. 20 yılı aşkın süredir sektörümüzde yer alıyor ve müşterilerimize hizmet verirken bu değerleri her zaman en üst seviyede tutuyoruz.

Müşterilerimizle aramızda her zaman açık ve dürüst bir iletişim kurmak güven tabanlı partnerlik için önemlidir. İşimizle ilgili her konuda dürüst ve şeffaf bir şekilde iletişim kuruyoruz. Bu sayede müşterilerimizin bize duyduğu güveni her zaman koruyoruz.

İşimizle ilgili verdiğimiz her bilgi doğru ve kesinlikle yanıltıcı değildir. Müşterilerimize, ihtiyaçlarına uygun çözümler sunmak için tüm bilgi ve tecrübemizi kullanırız. Bu sayede müşterilerimizin işlerinde başarıya ulaşmalarına yardımcı oluruz.

20 yılı aşkın süredir sektörümüzde yer alan ekibimizle müşterilerimize yüksek kaliteli hizmetler sunmak için gerekli tecrübeyi edindik. Bu tecrübemiz sayesinde, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına en uygun çözümleri sunmak için her zaman hazırız.

Eğer siz de dürüstlük, doğruluk ve tecrübe değerlerini önemsiyorsanız, sizinle çalışmaktan mutluluk duyarız.

KoZo Services is a leading provider of comprehensive home appliance repair solutions, committed to delivering exceptional service, reliability, and customer satisfaction. With a team of highly skilled technicians and a dedication to staying at the forefront of industry trends, we specialize in repairing a wide range of home appliances efficiently and effectively.

Our customer support team is responsive and attentive, ensuring that all inquiries are handled with care and efficiency. As a company, we invest in the continuous professional development of our technicians, equipping them with the latest tools and techniques in home appliance repair. This allows us to handle repairs for a wide variety of brands and models, providing comprehensive solutions that meet the highest quality standards. We take pride in our ability to resolve complex issues and restore appliances to optimal functionality.

At KoZo Services, we also recognize the importance of staying ahead of technological advancements. By forging strategic partnerships with manufacturers and suppliers, we have access to genuine parts and cutting-edge resources. This enables us to offer long-lasting repairs that enhance the performance and lifespan of our customers' appliances, while also providing cost-effective solutions.

We value collaboration and believe in fostering strong relationships within the industry. Our commitment to excellence has earned us a solid reputation, and we are proud to serve both residential and commercial customers. Whether it's homeowners in need of reliable repairs or businesses seeking a trusted partner for their appliance maintenance needs, we deliver solutions that meet their specific requirements.

Discover the KoZo Services difference and let us handle your home appliance repair needs. Visit our website at www.kozoservices.com or connect with us on LinkedIn to learn more about our services. Together, we can ensure that your appliances continue to perform at their best, providing convenience and comfort to your everyday life.

Description:

Nacidos en un patio trasero, desde Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz…Queremos hacer realidad tus sueños!

¿ Quienes somos ?  Un joven arquitecto, asociados y amigos con ilusión y ganas de crear. 

" Llevo experimentando la acampada desde muy pequeño y siempre soñé con construir mi propia casa rodante. Tras terminar el trabajo final del Grado en Arquitectura «En busca del Moksa» acerca de la relación entre la «Existence minimum» y este modo de vida itinerante, desarrollé varios proyectos de camperización y pensé…¿Porqué no? Así que me lancé, dando como resultado espacios camper realmente acogedores, funcionales y sorprendentemente con muy buenas críticas.

Y aquí estamos…a vuestra disposición para hacer de vuestros vehículos cabañas a medida!

Unser Familienunternehmen wurde 1929 gegründet und wird in der vierten Generation von Christian Emigholz und Ralf Gutknecht geführt. Name: Lady Mechanic Initiative LMI
Description:
The Lady Mechanic Initiative (LMI) is a non-governmental organization headquartered in Lagos-Nigeria with global outlook. Established in 2004 to empower vulnerable girls/women with mechanical and technical skills for a better life. Award-winning first mechanic in Nigeria, Sandra Aguebor, is the founder and CEO of the Lady Mechanic Initiative (LMI).
LMI occupies a very unique space in the world of vocational skill acquisitions, employment and job creation in Africa. LMI skill acquisition programmes target and empower girls/women from disadvantaged backgrounds, those failed by the education system, trafficked or working as sex slaves, single parents, child-labour victims, and others stigmatized by cultural, religious and gender biases.
Designed to make positive, real and measurable impacts, the programmes provide comprehensive hands-on skills training and classroom curriculum in auto mechanic/electrician, professional driving, generator repairs, speedboat repairs and house plumbing.
Additional programmes provide education and training in employability/productivity skills such as customer care, communications and business etiquettes, personal development, relationships and financial management.

Name: Auto 4
Description:
J'ai rencontré Auto 4 dans les années 80..... cette enseigne était déjà une référence régionale pour se procurer les pièces détachées d'occasion Mercedes, quel que soit le numéro de série de la voiture..
J'ai depuis mon plus jeune âge la passion de la mécanique, des formes artistiques, de l'ingéniosité de l'automobile. Pour ma part ce n'est uniquement un simple moyen de se déplacer.....le moyen de voyager fait totalement partie du voyage et de la destination prévue.

Ma vie de chirurgien a toujours été partagée avec cette passion de réparer, restaurer, conserver un patrimoine artistique, gravé dans la mémoire de chacun de nous..... chaque génération se passionne pour la voiture mythique ou représentative de sa propre enfance. ...... celle d'un parent disparu, celle que notre père rêvait de conduire, celle dans laquelle nous partions en vacances......

Ainsi, quand j'ai appris que le propriétaire partait en retraite, tout naturellement, j'ai fait acte de candidature car la passion de la chirurgie pouvait alors désormais s'épanouir dans celle de la voiture Mercedes.

Cette marque, à trois branches, symbolisée par la volonté de concevoir les meilleures mécaniques sur TERRE, sur MER, et dans les AIRS, s'inscrit fortement dans ce monde de l'automobile depuis son invention.Elle a marqué L'HISTOIRE.

L'attractivité d'Auto 4 réside dans la spécialité de vente de pièces détachées d'occasion EXCLUSIVEMENT MERCEDES. Notre société s'inscrit dans le recyclage automobile qui obéit à des normes environnementales très strictes.
Nous contribuons au développement durable en évitant une surconsommation et surproduction des pièces automobiles.. Nous permettons à chacun de trouver LA pièce défectueuse qui l'empêche d'utiliser sa voiture au quotidien .
Ainsi, pour sa voiture ancienne ou récente, Auto 4 met tout en œuvre pour conseiller, dénicher, démonter, et reconditionner.

Daniel Gonties
Président d'Auto 4

Name: ERS solutions
Description:
ERS Solution est votre partenaire de confiance pour tous vos travaux de serrurerie, vitrerie, plomberie, peinture, électricité en Île-de-France. Avec plusieurs années d’expérience, nous offrons des solutions adaptées à vos besoins, que vous soyez un particulier, un professionnel ou un syndic de copropriété. Spécialisés dans les interventions rapides et efficaces, nous traitons aussi bien les travaux programmés que les urgences nécessitant une action immédiate.

Notre équipe de techniciens qualifiés et réactifs intervient pour vos réparations, installations et rénovations, en veillant à respecter les plus hauts standards de qualité. Que ce soit pour une réparation de serrure, un remplacement de vitre, une rénovation de plomberie ou une remise à neuf de vos installations électriques, nous mettons notre savoir-faire au service de vos projets.

En plus de ces services, ERS Solution est également spécialiste de la rénovation énergétique. Nous proposons des solutions performantes pour améliorer l’efficacité énergétique de vos bâtiments. Parmi nos services : l'installation de panneaux solaires, de pompes à chaleur, ainsi que des travaux d’isolation thermique pour réduire vos dépenses énergétiques tout en augmentant votre confort. Nous vous accompagnons également dans l’optimisation de vos systèmes de chauffage et de climatisation.

Nos solutions sont conçues pour répondre aux défis écologiques et économiques actuels, tout en vous permettant de réduire vos factures d’énergie et de contribuer à la préservation de l’environnement. Grâce à notre expertise et à notre maîtrise des technologies modernes, nous vous assurons des prestations durables et adaptées à vos besoins.

 Zone d’intervention : Toute l’Île-de-France
 Disponibilité : Interventions rapides & urgences

Pour tous vos travaux en rénovation énergétique ou interventions d'urgence, contactez ERS Solution, votre expert en solutions énergétiques et techniques.

Name: Kalk - Manutenção, obras e facilities
Description:
A Kalk é uma empresa que tem como objetivo prestar serviço em três grandes macroáreas: Manutenção, Obras e Reformas e Facilities.

Com uma equipe com mais de 15 anos de experiência no mercado dentro das áreas nas quais prestamos serviço, temos um time que conta com experiência de atuação em gigantes do varejo como WalMart, Carrefour, Vivara, Porto Seguro, entre outras do segmento empresarial.

Nosso time conta com um líder extremamente capacitado por trás de todos os projetos da Kalk, o nosso fundador, que traz um amplo background profissional que sustenta a experiência na área e difunde conhecimento para o nosso corpo profissional em diversas áreas.

Por contarmos com uma gama de profissionais que possuem experiência em áreas empresariais de manutenção, nossa equipe compreende todas as reivindicações que podem surgir nos mínimos detalhes de uma loja de varejo. Portanto, ao realizar nossos trabalhos, focamos em compreender e sanar todas as dores do cliente, pois entendemos a gravidade de cada item que necessita reparo ou manutenção.

Prezamos por um trabalho com qualidade, eficiência, com relatórios de entrega em dia, acompanhamento humanizado e otimizado, bem como garantia de um ótimo serviço e atendimento.

Name: AP Fleet Management
Description:
AP Fleet empowers organisations with access to the largest Australian Aftermarket Vehicle Servicing, Fleet Management, Next Mileage Delivery & Workshop Automation Platform, to keep you and your company on the road 24/7. 

AP Fleet Management was established in 1995 to provide critical servicing, maintenance, repairs and breakdown support to emergency services vehicles in multiple states of Australia. We are a wholly owned subsidiary of the Ultra Group of Companies who have been in business since 1979 and are one of Australia’s leading independent automotive brands.

Based in Adelaide, South Australia, our purpose built contact centre employs more than 55 staff and operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. We currently provide service to almost 1 million fleet and privately owned vehicles nationally across the vehicle servicing, maintenance, repair and roadside assistance spaces.

Our operations are PCI compliant with full redundancy and business continuity plans in place to ensure that we can continue to provide service to all customers under almost any circumstance.

We are also fully accredited to ISO27001:2022 (Information Security Management Systems) with ZERO concerns noted which demonstrates our highest commitment to data security and customer privacy.
